# Seat-Based Billing

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Flowlu Membership & Subscription](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/756--subscription/ "Flowlu Membership & Subscription")
    
4.  Seat-Based Billing

Seat-Based Billing
==================

* * *

This guide explains our seat-based billing model, how subscription changes are managed, and the specific rules that apply to different plans.

### What is a User Seat?

Instead of paying for specific individuals, your subscription is based on the number of user seats you purchase. A seat is a spot in your account that a user can occupy. You are billed for the total number of seats you have, regardless of whether they are filled.

*   **Occupied Seats**: A seat is considered occupied by any user who is active, has been invited to join your workspace, or was converted from an external user into a regular team member.
*   **Flexibility**: If an employee leaves, you can free up their seat by deactivating, archiving, or deleting their account. You can then invite a new user to fill that same seat without any changes to your billing.

### Managing Your Billing and Subscription

You can adjust your plan and seat count at any time from your subscription settings. All payments, prorated calculations, and invoicing are handled by our payment partner, Paddle.

**Adding Seats**

You can add more seats whenever you need them. The change is effective immediately.

✅ You will be charged a prorated amount for the new seat(s) to cover the remainder of your current billing period.

✅ Your next renewal invoice will reflect the new total number of seats.

**Removing Seats**

You can reduce your seat count if your team size changes. The change takes effect immediately.

> Important: You cannot reduce your seat count to a number lower than your current number of active and invited users. For example, if you have 8 users, you can only reduce your seat count to a minimum of 8.

We do not issue refunds for removed seats. Instead, a prorated credit for the unused time is generated. This credit is automatically applied to your future invoices.

### Changing Your Subscription Plan

**Upgrading Your Plan**

When you upgrade to a higher-tier plan, the change is applied immediately. You will be charged a prorated amount for the difference in cost for the rest of your current billing period.

**Downgrading Your Plan**

If you are within the new plan’s limits: The downgrade will take effect immediately. A prorated credit for the price difference will be applied to your account to be used for future payments.

If your usage exceeds the new plan’s limits: The downgrade cannot be processed automatically. The system will require you to reduce your usage to meet the new plan's quotas before you can complete the change.

**Changing Your Billing Cycle**

*   **From Monthly to Annual**: This change takes effect immediately. You will be billed a prorated amount for the new annual subscription.
*   **From Annual to Monthly**: This change is also effective immediately. The remaining value from your annual plan is converted into account credit, which will be used to cover your upcoming monthly payments until it runs out.

> If your subscription was started on one of our previous pricing plans, you will not be able to switch to the new plans automatically through your subscription settings. However, migration to a new plan is possible. To make the switch, please contact our support team.

### Plan-Specific Billing Rules

Different subscription plans have unique rules for managing seats:

*   **Trial Plan**: Your trial includes all the features of the Advanced plan but is limited to a maximum of 2 user seats.
*   **Free Plan**: This plan includes a fixed number of 2 user seats. You cannot add or remove seats. To get more seats, you must upgrade to a paid plan.
*   **Essential Plan**: You can have up to 20 user seats.
*   ****Advanced** Plan**: You can have up to 40 user seats.
*   **Ultimate Plan**: This plan is for teams with 40+ users and operates on a custom basis. On this plan, you will not have options to manage the seat count, change your plan, or select a billing cycle directly from the subscription page.

### Canceling Your Subscription

You can cancel your subscription at any time. The cancellation is managed through our payment partner, Paddle.

Your subscription will remain active and fully functional until the end of your current paid billing period, after which it will not renew.

While a cancellation is pending, you cannot make changes to your plan, such as adding or removing seats.

> **If you have any issues or concerns, please contact our customer support via in-app chat or email us at [\[email protected\]](mailto:support@flowlu.com)
> **

[Previous How to Cancel your Subscription](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/756-545--cancel-subscription/)

# Flowlu Membership & Subscription

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  Flowlu Membership & Subscription

Flowlu Membership & Subscription
================================

* * *

Flowlu offers three membership plans:

*   **Essential** 
    
*   **Advanced**
    
*   **Ultimate**
    

Plans can be billed monthly or annually.

#### **What’s Included in All Plans:**

*   Free support via email or online chat
    
*   Help Center with articles and videos
    
*   iOS & Android mobile app
    

For the most up-to-date pricing and features included on each plan, visit [our website](https://www.flowlu.com/pricing/)
 or check the My Subscription page inside your account.

For any subscription-related questions, contact us at [\[email protected\]](mailto:support@flowlu.com)
.

**Frequently Asked Questions**
------------------------------

#### **Why can’t I upgrade or switch to another plan?**

If you're unable to switch plans, you might have exceeded your plan’s limits for features, storage, or user seats. If you see a notification, check which limits are affected and compare them to your desired plan. If you still need help, reach out to our Support team, and we’ll be happy to assist.

#### **How do I cancel a trial?**

No need to worry about canceling—trials automatically expire after 7 days. We don’t ask for credit card details, so you won’t be charged. If you don’t upgrade, your access to Flowlu features will be limited unless you switch to a Free plan or choose a paid subscription.

#### **Is there a free plan available?**

Yes! Flowlu offers a free plan that includes essential features to help you get started. It’s perfect for individuals or small teams who want to explore the platform before upgrading. The free plan gives you access to basic project management tools, CRM and invoicing, task management, knowledge base. It includes up to 2 users. The free plan doesn’t expire, and you can use it as long as you need. If you ever need more advanced features or additional users, you can upgrade anytime.

# Flowlu Help Center | Homepage & Dashboards

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Working in Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474--working-in-flowlu/ "Working in Flowlu")
    
4.  Homepage & Dashboards

Homepage & Dashboards
=====================

* * *

Individual users can customize the homepage based on their needs. Each homepage can include various components like a company feed, dashboards, your teammates' birthdays or onboarding. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/621/a8909b0c-fc28-11ec-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Dashboards help you to visualize the most relevant data in real time. Add dashboards for financials, tasks, agile issues or knowledge base. You can create multiple dedicated homepages for dashboards to organize your workspace the way you need it and quickly switch between your data. 

How to create a new homepage?
-----------------------------

To create a new homepage, click on the "+" button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/621/73a8690d-fc21-11ec-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Then enter its name and click anywhere on the screen or press "Enter".

How to add and remove dashboards?  

------------------------------------

Navigate to the home page you want to add a new dashboard to. Then click on the "Add" button and select the appropriate one.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/621/d40e4dcb-fc22-11ec-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can move the dashboards by simply dragging and dropping them or by clicking the "Reorder" button through the "three dots" menu. By using this option, Flowlu will automatically arrange the dashboards in the most convenient way.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/621/0b252164-fc23-11ec-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To delete or edit a dashboard, go to the menu in its upper right corner and select "Delete".

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/621/297e825e-fc23-11ec-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to delete a homepage?
-------------------------

To delete a page, hover over its name and click on the "x" icon. To edit the title press on the pencil icon.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/621/6393a225-fc23-11ec-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Activity Feed
-------------

One of the widgets you can place on dashboards is the **Activity feed**. Activity feed shows latest posts from your teammates. Any member of your team with access to the feed can leave a post, like, or comment on it.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/621/1b45d086-7249-11ee-a5ba-fa163e2ff576.png)

To add this widget to your dashboard, click the **Add** button → **Default → Activity Feed.**

**![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/621/6d84e97e-724c-11ee-a5ba-fa163e2ff576.png)**

### **How to Segment Activity Feed for Groups** 

In Flowlu, you can create different groups (workspaces) for the company's departments. Each group has its own personal feed, but each post from the group's feed is also displayed on the main company's feed. Anyway, only users with access to this group can see these posts.

You can create posts for groups even via the main activity feed. To do that, just pick any type of post (message, announcement, or poll) and select the group from the drop-down menu. If you want the message to be available to everyone, pick the **General Feed** option.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/621/d64823f4-7252-11ee-a5ba-fa163e2ff576.png)

If the post is visible only to a specific group of users, the post will have the name of this group next to the name of the employee who posted it.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/621/87e92f07-7253-11ee-a5ba-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/621/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Time Off Management

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Team Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1473--team-management/ "Team Management")
    
4.  Time Off Management

Time Off Management
===================

* * *

This feature allows you to track when employees are on business trips, sick leave, or any other type of time off.

Time Off Management will help you stay informed about when employees or teammates are out of the office, so you can plan activities better and avoid overlapping schedules.

Except for the 4 default types of time off (Paid Absence, Business Trip, Sick Leave, and Unauthorized Absence), there are also holidays and your custom time off types.  

How to Install Time Off Management
----------------------------------

To add this feature, click your avatar in the top right corner and go to the **Apps** tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1627/3ef501d9-e4b5-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Find **Time Off Management**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1627/45275853-e4b5-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Click the **Install** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1627/4d242e2e-e4b5-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Once the app is installed, you can find it in the **My Team** tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1627/538e230c-e4b5-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

List of All Time Off
--------------------

In this list, you can see all previous, current, and future time off. You can filter them by user, job titles, dates, comments, and status.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1627/5ad6013b-e4b5-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

How to Add a Time Off Entry
---------------------------

To add a new time off entry, click the **Add** button in the top right corner and select **Time Off** from the dropdown menu.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1627/61a656c8-e4b5-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Here you can specify the employee, the status of the absence, start and end dates, and leave a comment. If the time off overlaps with a holiday, you can also take it into account. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1627/6accdb7c-e4b5-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Time Off Chart
--------------

In the time off chart, you can see all past, current, and future time off. Each type has its own unique color. You can not only observe time off per employee, but also see upcoming holidays.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1627/6fd2137b-e4b5-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

In the chart, you can filter time off by user and year.

To change the view, hover over the chart, press Shift and scroll to zoom in or zoom out.

How to Create a Custom Absence Type
-----------------------------------

To create a custom absence type, click the three-dot button in the top right corner → **Absence Types**. There you’ll find the full list of absence types. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1627/75370586-e4b5-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

To create a new one, click the **Add** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1627/87089c53-e4b5-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

In the opened window, you can specify the **Title** and select the color. Also, there is an option to add a custom duration, which will be the default for this absence type. You can also change the duration for default absence types (Paid Absence, Sick Leave, Business Trip, etc.). In the time off chart, your custom type will be displayed with the color you choose.

The **Include holidays** option takes public and custom holidays into account if any time off matches a holiday. If this option is turned off, the duration will remain as set.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1627/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [Time Off Management Widget](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1473-1627-1482--leaves-absences-widget/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Buy a Subscription

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Flowlu Membership & Subscription](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/756--subscription/ "Flowlu Membership & Subscription")
    
4.  How to Buy a Subscription

How to Buy a Subscription
=========================

* * *

After signing up, you get a 7-day free trial. During this time, you can use all features without any restrictions. Once the trial ends, you'll need to choose a plan to keep using the software.

To upgrade your account, please follow the steps below.

### Step 1. Select Subscription 

Click on **your avatar** at the top right corner of the screen and go to the **My Subscription** page**.**

Choose a billing period using the period toggle — monthly payments or annual payments **(1)**, find your Subscription plan and click the **Buy** button **(2)**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/467/1551426f-bccf-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Step 2. Fill Out the Billing Info  

> The order processing is conducted by our online re-seller & merchant of record [Paddle.com](https://paddle.com/)

When you click **Buy** you will need to enter your email address and select a country and region.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/467/853eb6ae-0229-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you're located in the United States or Australia, you will be offered to enter a ZIP code.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/467/bced6ef8-0229-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you're located in other country with VAT, after country selection you'll be offered to fill out the extended billing form with VAT number (Tax ID) and address fields. This is not mandatory, but in this case you'll be able **to refund charged VAT** that was applied for your order.

Click **Add VAT Number** to open the form:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/467/2a980395-022a-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Fill it out and click **Add VAT number**:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/467/713a968b-022a-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Step 3. Payment options

After you've filled out all the billing information, you'll be able to make a purchase using PayPal or a bank card. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/467/d3e809bb-022c-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

> Don't forget to apply a coupon/promo code if you have one.  
> Please read: [How to apply a coupon](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/467-473--applying-a-coupon/)

#### Pay by Card

To pay using your debit/credit card, fill out all the required fields and click **Subscribe now**:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/467/62d972e4-022d-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

> Flowlu **doesn't store any billing information,** including your card credentials. All orders are processed by our merchant of record [Paddle](https://paddle.com/)
> .  

#### Pay using PayPal

If you want to pay via PayPal, click the **PayPal** button:  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/467/b074bfe2-022d-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

You will see a pop-up window where you can log into your PayPal account and continue the purchase using your PayPal balance or a card added to your PayPal account.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/467/5b5ed58b-022e-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

### Applying a coupon

If you have a coupon (or promo code) you can apply it to get a discount on your subscription. Just click **Add discount** in the payment widget, enter a **valid code** and click **Apply**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/467/d2691a3f-022e-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

You'll see an updated subscription plan price and applied coupon in the payment widget:  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/467/b01c327d-022e-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

> **_If you have any issues or concerns, please contact our customer support via in-app chat or email us at_ [](https://www.flowlu.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#12616762627d606652747e7d657e673c717d7f)
> [\[email protected\]](mailto:support@flowlu.com)
>   
> **

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/467/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Activate a Coupon or Promo Code

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Flowlu Membership & Subscription](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/756--subscription/ "Flowlu Membership & Subscription")
    
4.  How to Activate a Coupon or Promo Code

How to Activate a Coupon or Promo Code
======================================

* * *

If you have a coupon (or promo code), you can apply it for the subscription. Just click **Add discount** in the payment widget, enter a **valid code** and click **Apply**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/473/978ce096-0c49-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

You'll see an updated subscription plan price and applied coupon in the payment widget:  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/473/d62455a3-0c48-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

After that, you can pay for your subscription using one of the payment methods provided. [Please read this article to find out more on how to buy a subscription.](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/467--how-do-i-purchase-a-subscription-and-upgrade-an-account/)

> **N****ote**: you can apply each code **only once**. If you switch to another type of subscription, the promocode is no longer valid for a new subscription, and the total price will be calculated using [our current pricing](https://www.flowlu.com/pricing/)
>  + tax.

> **_If you have any issues or concerns, please contact our customer support via in-app chat or email us at_ [\[email protected\]](https://www.flowlu.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#f98a8c8989968b8db99f95968e958cd79a9694)
> .**

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/473/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [How to Apply a Coupon or Promo Code to Your Subscription](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/756-473-1580--subscription-promo-code/)

# Email Automations

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Email](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494--email/ "Email")
    
4.  Email Automations

Email Automations
=================

* * *

Email automation in Flowlu helps to organize your projects and workflows, so all teammates can free their hands from manual to-dos, such as task creation and communication with colleagues.

> Note that email automations are available starting with the Team subscription plan.

How to Create Automation Rules for the Email Module
---------------------------------------------------

First, you need to have the installed email module and at least one linked email inbox to set automations for. Note that automations are applied to a certain inbox, not the whole email module.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/690/2db3337e-c98c-11ee-b6f1-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened window, click the **Create Rule** button to set an automation rule.

Currently, there are the following automation rules to create in the Email module:

*   Notification
*   Request a response
*   Comment
*   Webhook
*   Task 
*   Event 
*   Issue
*   Slack

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/690/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   ﻿[Notification](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-690-691--email-notification/)
    
*   [Request a Response](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-690-692--email-request-a-response/)
    
*   [Comment](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-690-693--email-comment/)
    
*   [Create Webhook](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-690-694--email-webhook/)
    
*   [Create Task](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-690-695--email-create-task/)
    
*   [Create Event](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-690-696--email-create-event/)
    
*   [Create Issue](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-690-697--email-create-issue/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Managing Opportunities

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322--crm/ "CRM")
    
4.  [Opportunities](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323--opportunities/ "Opportunities")
    
5.  Managing Opportunities

Managing Opportunities
======================

* * *

The opportunity record stores the entire history of communication with the client. You can easily track all client information and interaction — issued invoices and estimates, scheduled tasks and events, sent emails and stage updates, etc.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/0f205143-5047-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can change the name of the opportunity by clicking on it.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/62377c56-5047-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

At the very top of the opportunity record , you can change the sales pipeline of the opportunity in the drop-down list. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/456ae81a-5047-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can quickly move an opportunity to the next stage by clicking on the appropriate stage.  

To close a opportunity, you should click on the "Close Opportunity" stage. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/854773de-5047-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Flowlu will offer to mark an opportunity as won closed or lost. If you choose the first option, you should specify the date of closing the opportunity. You can also leave a comment. At choosing the second option, it is necessary to specify date and loss reason. If you wish, you can leave a detailed comment.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/98ded6fd-5047-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

By icons in the top panel you can open the opportunity in a new window, copy the external link or send an email to the client.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/b3d517c5-5047-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

By clicking on "**Create**" button you can issue an invoice or estimate, create the project, event (appointment, call, email), task, or send an email.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/cc4126ac-5047-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you click on the button with the three dots, you can edit, copy or delete the opportunity.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/dd07fe10-5047-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Additionally, if you need to pause an opportunity, click on the button with the three dots. From there, you can choose to mark the opportunity as "Paused." Once marked as paused, the opportunity will be moved to the archive, similar to how other statuses work. In the archive, you can apply filters, review the reason for pausing, and access other relevant details.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/d53bf1bb-95bf-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

We’ve also included automation options for the "Paused" status, allowing you to set up automation rules to manage these opportunities effectively.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/016002f3-95c0-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

For your convenience, the record contains separate tabs:

Main
----

The "Main" tab displays all the basic information on the opportunity—the amount, terms, source, customer, manager, files, tags, as well as any additional information that will be useful to you in during your opportunity process. Custom fields will also be displayed here.

Only one company can be added to an opportunity, but you can also add a contact to an organization. To change the information, hover over the necessary field and click on the 'pencil' icon.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/f2723800-5047-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can add a description to the opportunity. Click on a field to add information. To save the description, click on the checkmark.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/229b65c3-5048-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

There is only one responsible manager for the opportunity. You can change it by clicking on the 'pencil' icon.

Here you can also select followers for the opportunity. Followers can view and comment on the opportunity. They will also receive notifications on all major opportunity's updates.

On the right side, you can see the activity feed with the planned events. Overdue events are displayed at the very top of the feed.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/5d6a28e9-5048-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To open the event, click on the event name. The event can be marked as completed directly from the feed.  

From the comment toolbar, you can not only leave a note and request a response, but also quickly create an email, task or event.

Invoices
--------

In the "Invoices" section, there is a list of all invoices connected with this opportunity. You can also create and send the invoice to the client by clicking on the 'Create' button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/9b10c080-5048-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Estimates
---------

On the "Estimates" tab, you can view a list of all estimates for an opportunity. You can quickly create and send an estimate to a client by clicking on the "Create" button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/b353549f-5048-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Activities
----------

The "Activities" tab includes related events and tasks for the opportunity. To create a new event or task, click the "Create" button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/e3ad94fe-5048-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Email   

---------

The "Email" section displays the whole history of email communication at the current opportunity. Here you can easily find necessary incoming and outgoing messages. To go to the incoming or outgoing messages, use the toggle in the upper right corner of the page. To quickly create a new email at a opportunity, click the **New Email** button.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/1ed839d6-5049-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/328/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Next Loss Reasons and Sources](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323-325--setting-up-loss-reasons-and-sources-of-opportunities/)

Use Cases
=========

* * *

In the Use Cases series, we provide the best practices to set up your Flowlu account so it suits your business needs. Here you can find **ideas and tips specific to your goals or professional field**. 

*   [Flowlu for Task Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/616-617--use-case-flowlu-for-task-management/)
    
*   [Flowlu for Project Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/616-618--use-case-flowlu-for-project-management/)
    
*   [Flowlu for Client Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/616-619--flowlu-for-client-management/)
    
*   [Flowlu for Marketing Agency](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/616-620--use-case-flowlu-for-marketing-agency/)
    

If you would like to learn from other companies' experience, feel free to check out our blog for **case studies**: 

*   [Case Study: Pharmaceutical Consultancy](https://www.flowlu.com/case-studies/pharmaceutical-consultancy-company/)
    
*   [Case Study: Renovation Brokers](https://www.flowlu.com/case-studies/improva-renovation-brokers-moved-from-spreadsheets/)
    
*   [Case Study: Law Firm](https://www.flowlu.com/case-studies/how-hull-firm-scaled-their-business-during-the-pandemic-with-flowlu/)
    
*   [Case Study: Wedding Dress Designers](https://www.flowlu.com/case-studies/case-study-flowlu-crm-for-wedding-dress-designers/)
    
*   [Case Study: eCommerce Marketing and Development Services](https://www.flowlu.com/case-studies/how-skyquest-improved-business/)
    
*   [Case Study: Renewable Energy Provider](https://www.flowlu.com/case-studies/how-flowlu-streamlined-solarages-workflow-and-operations/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Cancel your Subscription

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Flowlu Membership & Subscription](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/756--subscription/ "Flowlu Membership & Subscription")
    
4.  How to Cancel your Subscription

How to Cancel your Subscription
===============================

* * *

If you wish to cancel your subscription, you will need to follow these steps:  

1) Click your profile picture in the top right corner of your Flowlu portal and select _My Subscription_ in the drop-down menu.         

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/545/61cdfbc2-23db-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

2) Open _Subscription History_.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/545/73acafb4-23da-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

3) Click _Cancel Subscription_.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/545/a6589dc8-23db-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Delete Your Account
--------------------------

If you need to delete your account, go to the _System Settings_ → _Main Settings_. Scroll down the page till bottom and find the _Delete Your Account_ option. Click the appropriate button. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/545/9af0c090-bcd1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Select the reason for account deletion and click the button to permanently delete your account.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/545/b5921aaf-bcd1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

When you press this button, all your project, customer, finance, etc. data will be removed permanently and will not be recoverable. Please note that you’re going to delete company’s account. This means that all users will no longer be available to access this account. Only account administrators can delete the account. If you want to delete a specific user, check out [this instruction](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-270-274--how-to-delete-employee/)
. 

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/545/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Merge Duplicate Records

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322--crm/ "CRM")
    
4.  [Organizations and Contacts](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-332--companies-and-contacts/ "Organizations and Contacts")
    
5.  How to Merge Duplicate Records

How to Merge Duplicate Records
==============================

* * *

If you have created two identical contacts or companies and linked them to different opportunities or projects, you can merge these duplicate records into one CRM record. Flowlu offers two ways to handle the duplicate contacts and companies.  

How to Deduplicate Records in Bulk
----------------------------------

If you have a large customer base, finding duplicates manually can be quite challenging. Instead, run an auto duplicate check and merging to avoid doing manual actions. 

Go to your Contacts or Organizations. In the upper right corner, click on the three-dot button and select "**Manage duplicates**."

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/575/960697bf-5137-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You'll be taken to the screen with four tabs. Flowlu will automatically display duplicates by name, phone number, email, and tax ID.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/575/c6625298-5137-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

> _Note that Flowlu can display up to 100 duplicates per a duplication check. To display more duplicates, simply go to Duplicate Management again and repeat the same steps for merging duplicates._  

Navigate to the specific tab. For example, if you go to the Email tab, Flowlu will search for all the Contacts/Organizations in which the Email field values are the same.

Review the records and exclude those records you do not want to merge.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/575/f79601d0-5137-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Next, determine into which record you want to merge the selected contacts/organizations (master record).

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/575/12d13437-5138-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click "Merge" in the upper right corner. Please note that the contacts/organizations merged to the master record will be removed permanently and cannot be restored

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/575/227e8dcb-5138-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Once the de-duplication is complete, you'll see the number of duplicates merged.  

How to Find and Merge Duplicates Manually
-----------------------------------------

Sometimes, you may stumble upon duplicate records accidentally. In this case, you can merge such records manually on the spot. To do this, go to the **Contacts** or **Organizations** tab. Select two or more records and click the **Merge** button.

Next, select the CRM account page into which you want to transfer the data. Save.

After this, all information (that is not in the selected CRM record) will be added. For example, contact data, invoices, projects, opportunities.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/575/bab06b42-5138-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/575/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Contact & Organization Pages](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-332-341--how-to-work-with-an-account-card/)

[Next Import CRM Contacts](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-332-429--contacts-import/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Create a Project

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126--projects/ "Projects")
    
4.  How to Create a Project

How to Create a Project
=======================

* * *

You can create a project: 

*   **in the Projects** section. To create a new project, click **Create**:![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/127/768c2bba-4f96-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **in the Project Workflows**. If there are several [workflows](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-199--how-to-create-project-workflow/)
    , you can immediately select the one you need, so that when you create a project, a link to it will be automatically created.

You can add a new project through the full form , or use the quick add form:  

**![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/127/b602ec4d-4f96-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)**

**through the top menu bar**—move the mouse over the "+" icon and select the required item:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/127/d294c436-4f96-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **from the CRM contact page** via the **Create** button:![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/127/35bfed5f-4f97-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **from the Opportunity**, also using the **Create** button:![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/127/5650e676-4f97-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened sidebar, specify **the project name**. The remaining data can be filled later. The data such as:

*   project priority;
*   workspace (if application "Workspaces" is installed);
*   description;
*   a customer from CRM. In the same column, you can add a new account card (when selecting an account, the **Create** button is displayed).
*   project manager;
*   [task workflow](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-549--custom-task-workflows/)
    ;
*   [project template](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-199--how-to-create-project-workflow/)
    , in which the stages, milestones, and tasks are already created. If you are creating a non–standard project, then you need to select the _Custom Projects_;
*   team;
*   project chat. You can enable project chat only during project creation, such option is not available after that;
*   project duration;
*   project financial management;
*   tags.![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/127/8526c982-4f97-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

All general data on the project can be altered at any time through the **Edit** button:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/127/e9eacab8-4f97-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Or you can modify it on the project page:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/127/08f91a90-4f98-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/127/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Create an Opportunity

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322--crm/ "CRM")
    
4.  [Opportunities](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323--opportunities/ "Opportunities")
    
5.  Create an Opportunity

Create an Opportunity
=====================

* * *

An opportunity is any potential customer who got in touch with you and is interested in purchasing your products or services. Such people have high probability of becoming your clients. 

In Flowlu, the opportunity page stores the entire client communication record — events, tasks, invoices, estimates, tasks, files, and more.

If the opportunity is won, you can issue an invoice and [convert it to the project](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126--projects/)
. Won closed opportunities are moved to the _Archive_ section. The lost opportunities are closed with an indication of the loss reason.  

You can create the opportunity manually or [automatically](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323-329--automate-lead-creation/)
. 

In this manual, you'll learn how to add the opportunity manually.

How to Add an Opportunity
-------------------------

In Flowlu, there are several ways to create an opportunity.

### Method #1

Through the **Create** button, in the **Opportunities** section:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/326/e8519e11-503d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened window, add the necessary information for the opportunity: 

*   name and budget;
*   the source — where did this client come from. 
*   identify the [pipeline](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323-324--setting-up-the-sales-funnel/)
    ;
*   select a [CRM account](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-332-334--how-to-create-a-company-or-contact/)
     from the list or create a new one.

### Method #2  

Through the **Quick Add** button on the Opportunities board:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/326/f991b36e-503d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Enter the opportunity title, its budget, specify the CRM account and click on the checkmark or _Enter_ to save:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/326/212ca39f-503e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Method #3

Through **"+"** in the upper menu regardless of which section you are at this moment:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/326/5133317a-503e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Method #4

From the organization or contact record.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/326/b187a7b0-503e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/326/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Notifications

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Working in Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474--working-in-flowlu/ "Working in Flowlu")
    
4.  Notifications

Notifications
=============

* * *

In Flowlu, there are web push notifications, mobile pop-up notifications and email notifications if they are enabled in your settings. To see the notification feed, click on the button with a bell on the top toolbar: 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/415/e6b75ec3-673a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

All notifications are displayed by date. In Flowlu, notifications can be important and ordinary ones.   

This option allows you to filter important notifications from all notifications and to see only those notifications where your reaction or action is required.

**Important notifications include the following:**

*   you have been assigned a task;
*   the task needs revision;
*   you've been requested a response;
*   you were mentioned in a comment;
*   the invoice assigned to you has been paid or approved;
*   the task was completed (if you're the owner and approval is disabled);
*   an announcement in the Company Feed or a Workspace.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/415/fae5c840-673a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

All notifications that require your action will have additional options: if you've been requested a response, a "reply" link will be displayed, a click on which will open the necessary section and show the necessary comment, or a "I've read" button for an announcement. Such notifications will be highlighted in yellow.

You can **mark** all notifications **as** **read** by using the corresponding option in the upper right corner. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/415/1ea3530d-673b-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can **mark** each individual notification **as unread**, so that you don't forget to get back to it later if needed. Just click on the circle in the upper left corner and mark the notification as unread.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/415/3a5dce99-673b-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/415/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [Notification Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474-415-486--notification-settings/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Tasks: Main Settings

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Tasks](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118--tasks/ "Tasks")
    
4.  Tasks: Main Settings

Tasks: Main Settings
====================

* * *

Before you start working with tasks, familiarize yourself with the module settings. They allow you to activate additional features and tailor the module to your workflow.

Where are the module settings located?
--------------------------------------

Settings are available to **Tasks** module administrators. You can access settings in several ways from different system locations.

### Method 1: Via Portal Settings

If you are a portal administrator, you can configure each module through the portal settings. To access them, click on your avatar in the upper right corner and select **Portal Settings** from the context menu.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/414/5f7c3a83-efa4-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

In **Portal Settings**, find the **Tasks** block in the left menu and go to **Main Settings**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/414/7763c1ce-efa4-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

### Method 2: Via the Side Menu

Hover over the **Tasks** module (1) and click **Settings** (2) in the tab that appears. The module settings window will open on the right.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/414/86a5b983-efa4-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/414/95f08e43-efa4-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

### Method 3: Within the Tasks Module

Administrators of the Tasks module will see a gear icon at the top of the screen. Clicking it opens the module settings directly.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/414/a2657ffa-efa4-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

What can be configured in "Tasks"?
----------------------------------

The **Main Settings** contain options that affect the user experience. Most are enabled by default. Check or uncheck the boxes as needed and remember to save your changes.

### Task Approval

If this option is enabled, the checkbox "This task needs approval from the owner" will be active by default when creating a task. This feature ensures the Assignee cannot close the task independently.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/414/b5882ab7-efa4-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

This option only applies to tasks whose Workflow includes a stage with the Approval status. In workflows without such a stage, the checkbox will not be displayed.

During the Approval stage, the Owner has the opportunity to evaluate the result using additional buttons:

*   Accept task without evaluation;
*   Accept with a positive rating;
*   Accept with a negative rating.

All these buttons move the task to the Completed status.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/414/c5c403ec-efa4-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

### Automatically complete the parent task after all subtasks are finished

*   If enabled, the parent task will be completed automatically once all subtasks are closed.
*   If disabled, the parent task must be moved to the Completed stage manually.

### Use report in the task

Activates the Report field in the detailed view of each task.

If enabled, the field appears automatically when moving the task to the Completed stage. Here, the Assignee and Collaborators can, for example, summarize the work or share a link.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/414/d666e630-efa4-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

**Important:** The report can only be filled out by the Assignee and Collaborators.

### Allow viewing emails for tasks

Tasks in Flowlu can also be created via automation rules after receiving emails with specific criteria. This is possible due to Email integration.

This option allows employees who do not have direct access to the connected mailbox to view the original email. For example, if only the Owner has mailbox access, enabling this allows the Assignee, Collaborators, and other participants to see the relevant correspondence.

### Use progress bar

The progress bar is a visual interface element that tracks the task's advancement. It updates automatically based on the current stage of the task's Workflow. As the task moves through its statuses, the indicator reflects the completion percentage, allowing the Owner and Followers to instantly evaluate the task's progress without manual input.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/414/e5e377fe-efa4-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

By default, this option is disabled.

### Display attached images on the task card (Kanban board)

If enabled, images added to the task description will be visible on the card in Kanban mode. This helps you find specific tasks in the list more easily.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/414/ee836934-efa4-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/414/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Project Workflows

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126--projects/ "Projects")
    
4.  Project Workflows

Project Workflows
=================

* * *

**Project Workflows** allow you to quickly create projects with a predefined structure and automate progress tracking. They include stages, standard tasks, and checklists. A new project based on a workflow can be created in just a few clicks.

Checklists and tasks from a workflow can be adjusted for individual projects. You can add new items or remove irrelevant ones without affecting the original workflow.

**See also:** [The Ultimate Guide to Flowlu’s Project Workflows](https://www.flowlu.com/blog/project-management/the-ultimate-guide-to-flowlus-project-workflows/)

How to Set Up a Project Workflow
--------------------------------

To create a workflow, go to Projects → Project Workflows and click Create.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/04b163f6-c373-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   In the opened window, specify the **name** of the workflow. The name will be displayed as a title on the Project Workflow Board. There might be several workflows — for each type of a project or an activity.
*   Indicate workflow's **description** to explain its purpose. Here you can also pre-define your projects' description.
*   **Task creation mode** lets you choose whether to create tasks only for the current project stage or all at once. 
*   You can also set up when you projects should **start and end**. 
*   Do not check _**Activate**_ option before you build your project workflow. 

Once you enter all this information, click Save and start building your workflow.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/26ca366a-c373-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Project Stages

**Workflows** include five default stages aligned with PMBoK process groups: Initiation, Planning, Execution, Monitoring & Control, and Closure. These stages can be customized to suit your needs. For example, you can simplify the lifecycle to three stages or tailor it to specific projects, such as "In Queue," "Foundation," "Construction," "Finishing," and "Completion."

To **modify stages**, you can add a new one by hovering over an existing stage and clicking the plus icon, rename or delete stages through the context menu, and rearrange them using drag-and-drop.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/64f99050-c373-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Stages form a Kanban board where each stage is displayed as a column, and checklists appear within project cards to make progress tracking easier.

### Stage Checklists

**Checklists** track the progress of each stage. Each item can include **an assignee, a brief description, and a report**. These items can represent tasks that don't fit standard categories or outcomes expected for a stage. You can also enable automatic stage completion when all checklist items are done.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/7d656f8c-c373-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

To add a checklist item, use the quick form by clicking "**Add Checklist**," entering a name (1), and saving it with Enter or the checkmark. For more options use the advanced form (2).

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/938bfb20-c373-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Project Tasks

Tasks in workflows serve as templates for future projects. Any task field can be adjusted in individual projects without affecting the workflow.

To create a task:

1.  Go to the **Tasks** subsection.
    
2.  Click **Add Task**.
    
3.  Enter a **name**, **description**, **owner**, and **assignee**. Save it with Enter or the checkmark.
    

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/54ececef-c376-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

> **Note:** Project Manager is a variable that will be replaced by the user — manager of each project created by the workflow. Changing this field (e.g. selecting another user) during the project execution will not affect the previous tasks performed. Changes will affect only future tasks.

A task can be created using the full form by clicking on the icon at the top right corner of the quick form.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/b0adeba9-4f9a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can set **advanced parameters** for a task in the full form. Learn more about creating task templates in our [knowledge base article](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-247--task-templates/)
.  

### Workflow Settings

In the **workflow settings**, you can activate the workflow by checking the checkbox next to the corresponding option. You can also activate the workflow in the upper right corner by clicking on the corresponding button.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/03e48d4b-c374-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

When you make changes to a **project workflow**, for which you have already created projects, and reactivate it, you can choose whether you want to apply the changes to all existing projects or not. Please note that if you select this option, the changes will affect all the projects created by this workflow. If you make changes to the task template, only the following fields can be modified for the the existing project tasks: stage, checklist, name, description, estimated time, task order. 

**Task creation modes include two options**:

1.  **Create the tasks only for the current project stage**. Tasks for each stage are created as the project progresses to that stage.
    
2.  **Create all the tasks when creating a new project**. Tasks for all stages are generated immediately, and notifications are sent to assignees.
    

**Project Time Frame** — preset start and end dates of the project relative to the moment of its creation.

### How to edit a workflow

You can edit, delete, or view all **project workflows** by clicking the three-dot menu in the upper-right corner and selecting the desired option.  
  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/b72e874b-c378-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Here you can see a table with data on the number of created projects by this workflow, description, workflow id, and activity status of the workflow.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/01939026-c379-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

> **Please note:** It is not recommended to change the workflow of a created project, as the connection between the completed tasks and the project will be lost.

### How to create a project by the workflow

To create a project from a workflow, go to **Projects → Projects by workflows**, click **Create** in the upper-right corner, and select a workflow.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/feb6f514-c379-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also create a new project directly from the first stage of the workflow. Hover over the first stage, click the "+" button, enter the project name, set the start and end dates, and select the project manager.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/f980bec6-c37c-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Copy Project Workflow
----------------------------

1.  Go to "Projects" → "Project Workflows."
2.  Go to the project workflow and click on the three-dots button in the upper right corner. Open the editing mode. 
3.  Click on the three-dots button in the upper right corner and select the option to clone a project workflow.  
    

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/e7afe34e-c381-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/199/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [Unlinking a Project from a Project Workflow](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-199-1625--unlinking-a-project-from-a-project-workflow/)
    

[Previous Project Portfolio](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-654--project-portfolio/)

[Next Unlinking a Project from a Project Workflow](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-199-1625--unlinking-a-project-from-a-project-workflow/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Custom Task Statuses

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Tasks](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118--tasks/ "Tasks")
    
4.  Custom Task Statuses

Custom Task Statuses
====================

* * *

Flowlu allows you to create your own statuses by customizing **task workflows**. Instead of regular statuses like “To Do,” “In Progress,” “Approval,” and “Done,” you can set up your own statuses for the tasks to match your company requirements.  

How to create a workflow
------------------------

Go to the **Portal Settings** → **Tasks** → **Workflows**.

Click "Create" button at the top right corner. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/549/98587f1d-3813-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Enter the workflow name. 

Hover over the _three-dot button_ and click on the _p__encil_ icon to change its name. 

Click "+" button to add a new status.   

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/549/d044810a-3814-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Indicate its name and relate it to one of four of the system status types:  

*   To Do (dark blue), 
*   In Progress (yellow), 
*   Approval (violet), 
*   Completed (turquoise).  

Each new status that you create should fall under one of these four status types.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/549/cb7ec6b7-3815-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The "To Do" and "Completed" statuses are set by default and cannot be deleted. If you want to implement task approval, then add the "Approval" stage to your workflow. Once the task is finished, it will be displayed at the "Approval" stage until it is approved by the task owner.

To delete a status, hover over the status card and then tap the _bin_ icon.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/549/3645183f-3816-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Use drag & drop to rearrange statuses in the workflow.   

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/549/76a6128b-3817-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

For each workflow, you can add certain automation rules and conditions. [Learn more](https://support1.flowlu.ru/hc/4/118-532--automation)
.   

Once you created a workflow, all the teammates can use it for their tasks. 

How to apply a custom workflow
------------------------------

A task workflow can be selected when creating a new or editing an existing **project**. In this case, all the project tasks will inherit this workflow.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/549/e5b5be21-3817-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also assign a workflow for each **workspace**. Therefore, all the workspace's tasks will inherit this workflow.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/549/7f1415e0-3818-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[Project workflows](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-199--how-to-create-project-workflow/)
 also allow to configure task workflow. Go to the Edit mode and select the "Task Workflows" tab. Here, you can create a new workflow or select an existing task workflow from the drop-down list. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/549/f31a9ab7-3818-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also choose a workflow for each **task** unrelated to any project or workspace.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/549/c77cb078-3819-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/549/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Organization Settings

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  [Invoices](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258--how-to-prepare-an-invoice/ "Invoices")
    
5.  Organization Settings

Organization Settings
=====================

* * *

In Flowlu, you can manage one or several companies and create [Invoices](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258--how-to-prepare-an-invoice/)
, [Estimates](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251--what-is-an-estimate/)
 or track cash flow on their behalf.

To edit information about your company, add a new bank account, or create a new company, go to Settings in the **Finance** module and select **Accounts and Organizations**  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/259/c3e1168e-c42f-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also edit your company by clicking the profile picture in the top right corner and going to **Portal Settings** → **Finance** → **Accounts and** **Organizations.**

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/259/b96518cf-8db8-11ee-8dbe-fa163e2ff576.png)

You will see that one organization has already been created by default. To open its settings, click on its name:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/259/131c97fe-c430-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the **Main** tab you can specify the following data:

*   **Organization name** — short name for your company used only inside Flowlu, **legal company name** is used for all external documents.
*   **VAT** number  
    
*   **Legal** and **Shipping** addresses.
*   Contact Information — website, email, phone numbers, fax.

The second tab, **Invoices,** allows you to configure additional information about your company that can be used when creating external documents, such as Invoices:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/259/9c1e982a-c436-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

This includes:  

*   Taxes — you can add two tax rates for your company. If selected, a tax rate will automatically be applied and calculated in an Invoice  
    
*   Custom logo that can be displayed in documents
*   Custom prefix before invoice number
*   Starting number for Invoices and Quotes — new invoices will automatically be numbered based on the number you've entered. You can always reset the numbering and start it over from any other number.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/259/69ae2b82-c438-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **Invoice payment deadline** —set the number of days customers have to pay your invoices. The **Payment Due** date will automatically be calculated and displayed in an Invoice. If an invoice isn't paid by its due date, it will be marked as **Overdue** You can adjust payment terms for each invoice individually.

*   Enable or Disable Taxes for Invoices and Estimates

Click **Save** at the bottom of the window when you've finished editing your organization.

If you plan to manage several organizations at the same time, mark the one that you issue Invoices for most often as **Default** 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/259/940c438d-c43c-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

This organization will be selected in Invoices automatically, but you can also change it manually.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/259/4ee05022-c43c-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

While you're on this page, you can also add another organization to your Flowlu account **(1)**, or create a new bank account for your existing organization(s) **(2)**

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/259/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Invoices](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258--how-to-prepare-an-invoice/)

[Next Setting a Custom Invoice Template](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-260--setting-the-print-form-of-invoice/)

# Project Portfolio

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126--projects/ "Projects")
    
4.  Project Portfolio

Project Portfolio
=================

* * *

If you have a few projects with lookalike goals and strategies, you can place them in the portfolio, so you’ll be able to observe all the information related to multiple projects at once.

> **Not****e:** Only **Administrators** and **Project Managers** can create portfolios. To learn more about access rights, [**explore the related article**](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-249--access-rights-in-the-projects/)
> .

How to Create a Portfolio
-------------------------

To create a portfolio, go to the Project module and click the **Portfolios** tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/fa515cb2-b73f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click the **Create** button in the top right corner.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/c26b12e8-b683-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened window, you can specify the name of your portfolio, write a description, and assign users and roles. 

You can set up two access types for the portfolio:

*   **Portfolio manager**: able to populate and edit portfolios. Note that the portfolio manager will automatically gain [**project** **manager access**](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-249--access-rights-in-the-projects/#:~:text=by%20other%20users).-,Project%20Managers,-Project%20managers%2C%20like)
     to all projects inside the portfolio.
*   **Observer**: able to observe a certain portfolio, but can't change it. Note that an observer will automatically become a [**member of the project's tea****m**.](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-412--overview-of-project-sections/#:~:text=project%20finances.-,Team,-Add%20your%20co)
    

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/367ca961-b684-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click **Save**. 

You can change this information at any time by clicking the _three-dot_ _button_ in the top right corner. 

How to add a Project to the Portfolio
-------------------------------------

There are two ways to add a project to the portfolio. 

### Method 1

Open the project you want to add to the portfolio and click **Add relation.** 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/0b1a1023-b740-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Method 2

Go to the portfolio you want to populate. Click the **New Projec****t** button to create a project from scratch, or click the _small arrow button_ to link an existing project. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/20d42f3f-b740-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you just want to link a project, you can see all the projects in the list and pick any of them.

> **Note:** you can link only those projects to which you have access.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/82be767e-b686-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you want to add multiple projects to the portfolio in one go, mark all the projects you want to add and click the **Link Projects** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/882205f3-b686-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

What's Inside the Portfolio
---------------------------

### Main Page

On the main page, you can see all the essential information about portfolio and linked projects: 

*   Revenue, Expenses, Profit and Profitability.
*   Detailed information about each project (manager, start and end dates, stage).
*   Description.
*   Users.
*   Comments.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/d4013135-b688-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Projects

On the project page, you can observe all the basic information about active and archived projects related to the portfolio. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/1a61bc63-b689-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can use filters to sort them or export all projects from the list by clicking on the export button. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/d683fed8-b73f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Finance

> **Note**: this tab is available for all users who have access to the Finance module.

On this page, you can monitor all transfers for each project and estimate the overall revenue, expenses, profit, and profitability of a portfolio.

You can also compare estimated and actual revenues and expenses, as well as take a look at invoices and estimates.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/c83f7571-b73f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also filter projects by their types to have a clear overview of finances. For example, you can select only active, closed, failed, successfully closed, or paused projects.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/7680feea-bf17-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Tasks

On the task tab, you can observe overall tasks from the portfolio. You can filter tasks by assignees, owners, stage, and other details. You can also check if the task is billable and its hourly rate.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/a5ba3c88-b73f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/654/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Create and Send Email Messages

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Email](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494--email/ "Email")
    
4.  [Managing Emails](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-515--managing-email/ "Managing Emails")
    
5.  Create and Send Email Messages

Create and Send Email Messages
==============================

* * *

After connecting one or more of your email accounts to Flowlu, you can send messages to your customers directly from your account and keep in touch with your contacts without having to leave the page! 

In Flowlu, you can create new emails:

*   in the **Email** module.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/aa8dca17-b1d8-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   on the **opportunity** page.  
    

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/e89e5359-b1d8-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   on a **task** page.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/5ca57721-b1d9-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   on a **company/contact** page by clicking on an email address or in the activity feed.  
    

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/cabdf496-b1d9-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/e191a1f5-b1d9-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened email composer window:  

Select a sender if you have several email accounts available.

Specify the recipient and enter the subject line (required). If you create an email from an opportunity, the recipient will be automatically filled in.

Click **CC** (Carbon Copy) or **BCC** (Blind Carbon Copy) if you'd like to add those fields. The other recipients will not know about the email addresses in BCC.

Enter the text in the email body. Format your text using the toolbar options: select a font, make your text bold, italicized, or underlined, change the text color, set the alignment, add lists, hyperlinks or tables, insert images or videos.

If you have a signature set up for this email account, it will automatically be inserted to the email body.  

If necessary, add a relation to the opportunity.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/eaf01bf5-b29e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Attach files.  

Use templates or create a new one.

If you have the email tracking feature activated for this email account, be sure to check the appropriate icons in the top right corner of the message before sending it.

Once your mail is drafted, click the **Send** button in the bottom right corner of your composer.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/342b5928-b29f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Congratulations, your email has just been sent to the recipient!

The messages will be sent from your own email account. You can find this email in your **Sent** folder.

### Email Page

All emails can be accessed in the **Email** section of the main menu. Unread emails are listed in **bold.** You can quickly mark an email as unread, so you can get back to it later. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/742fa791-a64a-11ea-9c58-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

Click on any email to expand it and see the full message.

In the top toolbar, you have the following options:

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| **Move to** | Move the email to another folder |
| **Reply all** | A reply will be sent to all the recipients of the email |
| **Forward** | An email will be sent to the recipient of your choice |
| **Mark as spam** | An email will be moved to the spam folder |
| **Trash** | An email will be moved to the trash folder |
| **Mark as unread** | An email will be automatically closed |

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/2df01469-b68f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can mark your email as completed. The completed emails will be moved to the folder your set up in the mailbox settings. In the activity feed of the opportunity or contact/organization, the completed emails would not be displayed in the Planned section. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/6de57e18-b691-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The links of an email to an opportunity, contact, project or task are displayed to the right. If a relation is set, then this email will be displayed on the page of the necessary object. You can always change or delete the relation by clicking on the appropriate options. You can also easily create a new contact or opportunity and link the appropriate email to it.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/b3c044ee-b691-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To create a task from an email, click the appropriate button.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/875cd592-b692-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also create a task, opportunity or contact by clicking on the 'plus' or 'create new' button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/5785c6ed-b693-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Once an email is read, there is a checkmark next to the recipient address.   

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/cbc2e3a9-bcc4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also find out whether an email has been read from the list of mails.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/5838e21e-a64f-11ea-9c58-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

You can track the links in the Click Tracking section. If you hover over the appropriate link, you'll see the exact date and time of clicking the link, as well as their total number of clicks.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/2e72d4f9-b699-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can leave a comment to each email to get the attention of your colleague with mentions or request a response option.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/43f53c93-b694-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/516/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)
