# How to Create Document Templates

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Documents](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/683--docs/ "Documents")
    
4.  How to Create Document Templates

How to Create Document Templates
================================

* * *

Templates are pre-made forms of your documents. Some of them are default, but you can create your own custom ones as well under document types.

How to Create a Template
------------------------

To create a new template, click the **New Template** button under the document type you need.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/686/8e9ac9cb-9fe1-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened window, you'll see a few options: you can create a new template from scratch or based on templates you already have (which include only templates related to the exact document type).

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/686/712ac215-9fe7-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

Template Variables
------------------

Templates can be created from scratch, or you can upload content via.docx import. You don't need to edit the.docx file before uploading; all text content and variables can be changed while setting.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/686/155e52c8-9ff1-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

Variables that you can use for the template are displayed on the right sidebar.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/686/f887edba-9fec-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

Variables can be copied by clicking on them.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/686/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Document Types](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/683-685--document-types/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Recurring Invoices

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  [Invoices](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258--how-to-prepare-an-invoice/ "Invoices")
    
5.  Recurring Invoices

Recurring Invoices
==================

* * *

This feature is perfect for the companies who often issue similar invoices to their customers.  

> **For example, you provide customer support every month and regularly charge the same fee.**

Recurring invoices help you to facilitate the work with invoices which need to be sent frequently. 

How to Create Recurring Invoices
--------------------------------

Go to the **Finance** -> **Recurring Invoices**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/460/3c87066c-85e2-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

> If this section is not displayed, go to the **Portal Setting****s**\-> **Finance**\-> **Main Settings** and check the **Use recurring Invoices** option. Also, if you want to allow employees who do not have Administrator access to the Finance to create such invoices, check the option **A****llow users to create recurring invoices**.

To create a recurring invoice, please click the **Create** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/460/a4f4a4b4-85e2-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The following window opens:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/460/fca29691-85e3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **Invoice name**: enter the name of a recurring invoice that will make it easy to identify for which services this invoice is issued.
*   **Customer**: select the company or contact to whom you plan to issue an invoice.
*   ****Organization/Account**:** select the organization (if there are several of them) from which you will invoice and currency.
*   **Assignee**: select a responsible employee who will have access to this template and the invoices related to him/her.
*   **Custom Template**: indicate the template name of the invoice, which is available for the selected legal entity or individuals.
*   **Order number**: if required, indicate the order number for paying the invoice.
*   **Project**: if the invoice relates to the project, then select the project.
*   **Payment terms**: indicate the number of days that are allotted to pay the invoice from the moment it is received, this value will later be converted to the date (payment deadline).

### Recurrence Options

**Start issuing**: enter the date you want to start invoicing. If you want the first invoice to be created immediately, then indicate today's date. If you specify a date in the past, the first invoice will be issued according to the recurrence options (once a month, for example) on the date that follows the past date.  

**Stop issuing**: indicate the date you want to stop creating regular invoices. If you do not plan to complete the invoicing, then set the **Never expires** option. 

**Repeat every**: select the period when to create invoices.  

### Invoice Creation Settings 

Determine which scenario will be played after the creation of the invoice. 

**Creat****e**: invoices will be created and saved, they will need to be sent to the client manually. 

**Create and send for approval**: invoices will be created and automatically sent for approval (if the _Use invoice approval workflow_ option before sending is active in the settings of the Finance section). 

**Create and send via e-mail**: accounts will be created and automatically sent by e-mail to the client for payment (if the _Use invoice approval workflow_ option is active, then this option will not be available to employees without the Administrator access level to the Finance section). 

**Create, Charge and Send Invoices:** invoices will be created and automatically sent by e-mail to the client. After the first paid invoice, payments will be done automatically with your client's credit card associated with the recurring invoice before. The invoices by e-mail are sent for reference. 

> _Note_: _Auto charge is_ _available for **Stripe** only._ _Payments will proceed no matter the result and will each time for the according period._

Enter products/services and the price; the terms and payment advice; information on the sales person and add additional signature line, if required. 

After filling in all the fields, save the form. Congratulations, your invoice is created.

Invoice Card
------------

In the invoice card, on the General tab, you can find all the necessary information on a recurring invoice.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/460/47dfbbdf-85e3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   Invoice Amount
*   Next Invoice Date
*   Recurring Period
*   Start issuing recurring invoices date
*   Stop issuing recurring invoices date
*   Status
*   Preferences
*   Project
*   Bill to
*   Bill from
*   Sales person

The main area if this tab comprises the list of invoices that were created based on this recurring invoice. On the Next Invoice tab, you can see the next invoice that will be created according to this recurring invoice and its date (the invoice number is not indicated, because it is not known how many invoices will be created during the recurrence period).

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/460/a3c58de4-85e3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The History tab records all changes made to this template, as well as which invoices and when were created on its basis. The recurring invoice can be edited or deleted (while the related invoices will not be deleted), also duplicated and paused.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/460/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Invoice Templates](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-264--invoice-templates/)

[Next Estimates](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251--what-is-an-estimate/)

# Document Types

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Documents](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/683--docs/ "Documents")
    
4.  Document Types

Document Types
==============

* * *

On the Templates tab, you can see all templates, both default and your own custom ones. They're separated by **document types.** 

**Document type** is the main purpose of all documents, grouped by type. For example, they can be invoices, estimates, proposals, contracts, NDAs, etc.

Some types are default and can't be deleted or changed, for example, invoices and estimates, which are related to the Finance module. Invoices and estimates can be used for their direct purposes only and can't be used outside the Finance module.

The Docs module allows you to create your own custom document types as well. By default, you can use the service agreement type.

Document Type Creation
----------------------

On the Templates tab, click the **New Document Type** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/685/7b4e6bdb-a323-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

Once you click the button, a new type is immediately created, and you'll see the window with the document type's fields.

These fields can also be added or edited in each single document. In that case, the settings of these fields in the document type and other documents won't be changed. All the changes will be applied to only this document.

These fields are used for dynamic variables. To save time from manual filling of each field, you can use user variables and automatically collect data from entities linked to the document. For example, from a CRM contact or organization.

For example, it's necessary to have start and end dates of agreement in each document related to this document's type. In that case, you need to create a new field by clicking the **Add Field** button.

Then give the name to this custom field and set the field type. Since you need to automatically fill in dates, you pick the _date_ field type.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/685/9c1c84af-9f1f-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

These fields can also be added or edited in each single document. In that case, the settings of this fields in the document type and other documents won't be changed. All the changes will be applied to only this document. 

How to Set and Edit Custom Fields for Document Types
----------------------------------------------------

Variables that you want to use for a document type can be changed in the document type settings as well.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/685/b711d7b4-9f27-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

To create a new field, click the **Add Field** button. Custom fields can have different types:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/685/31ec3f5b-9f28-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

After you set the name field and type, you can go to the more detailed settings of a field to make it work correctly. Let's look at each field: 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/685/fec7d790-9f2c-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

1\. **Field Name**. It's not the value of a field, just a name to understand the purpose of a custom fields. 

2\. **Entity type to connect**. Type of entity from which the variable value will be taken. For example, if you connect an organization, values will be taken from the organization linked to the final document draft.

3\. **General settings** will help to use this field as a filter, deactivate it, make it required, etc.

4\. **Alias.** It's an alternative name for a custom field, more detailed, and mostly used for setting webhooks and API integrations. For example, the custom field alias for the discount is a CFV\_46. You can change it to CFV\_DISCOUNT\_AMOUNT, so the final detailed name will be #DOCUMENT|CFV\_DISCOUNT\_AMOUNT# instead of #DOCUMENT|CFV\_46#.

5\. **Cache fields** help to automatically fill in custom fields. For example, you create a document related to a certain organization, and the document needs to include the CEO name. You can fill in the name manually, but you can also pull it in automatically from the CRM organization linked to the document. If field caching is enabled, the information will be filled in automatically from entities linked to the document.

> Note that if the related entity, for example the CEO's name, doesn't contain any value, the value in the document will be missed as well.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/685/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# How to Create and Send Documents

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Documents](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/683--docs/ "Documents")
    
4.  How to Create and Send Documents

How to Create and Send Documents
================================

* * *

By default, you can create a new document from the Docs module. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/687/3672329a-a3d8-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you want the document to be related to any CRM account, you can create documents from the detailed page of this account. For example, from the Organization's page:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/687/31abd18a-a3d8-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

> Note that creating a new document from an entity in Flowlu is possible only if the document type is related to this entity. For example, if you need to create a proposal related to an Opportunity in the CRM module, you need to add an "Entity connection" field to the document type and connect it to CRM opportunities. 

How to Make Up a Document
-------------------------

All variable values will be automatically filled in if the connection with the variable-related connection is set. If not, you can fill in all fields manually in the right sidebar. Manual filling is useful when the information differs from the one in the related entity. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/687/4815c88c-a3d8-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

Also, to change the variable value, you can click on the _pen icon,_ then click the variable (editable values are marked blue) you need to change and set a new value. You can also change the value of each variable on the right sidebar.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/687/58e64f96-a3d8-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

A new value will be applied only to this document and won't affect other documents, templates, or information in related entities. 

Editing Mode
------------

By clicking the _pen icon_ in the right corner of the document, you'll be able to change the content, including variable values and text items. 

If you want to change the appearance of this exact document without making changes to the whole template, first you need to make any changes in the content of the document. Then, after changes are saved, click the _three-dot butto__n_ and go to editing mode.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/687/9313e808-a3d8-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Send a Document
----------------------

In the right sidebar, you'll see a document recipient.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/687/9e3d56e4-a3d8-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

By default, it's a person related to the linked CRM account. If you need to change a recipient, click the _"+ Add Contact"_  button. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/687/a72ad797-a3d8-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

Then, add the name of a new recipient and the email address. If you want a new recipient to be linked to the CRM contact, you can fill in the checkmark below.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/687/b35d0919-a3d8-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

Check if all the information is correct, and click **Send**.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/687/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Types of Organizational Structure Display

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Organizational Structure](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705--organizational-structure/ "Organizational Structure")
    
4.  Types of Organizational Structure Display

Types of Organizational Structure Display
=========================================

* * *

The company structure can be displayed in two formats: chart and list. To switch between them, use the switch at the top of the page.

### Chart

This is a visual and convenient way to build a hierarchical structure. Departments, directions and employees and their connections are visible.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/710/689e2a24-2326-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.jpg)

To move around the chart view, use the left mouse click. Controls also available:  

*   Center the company structure.
    
*   Set scale.
    
*   Full screen display - interface elements are hidden to make it easier to work with the structure. Clicking again returns the interface.
    

### List

In this display it is most convenient to edit the structure. Add departments and employees. For convenience, individual blocks can be rolled up.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/710/af673c16-2326-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/710/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Custom Fields in the Organizational Structure](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705-709--custom-fields-in-the-organizational-structure/)

[Next Communications](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676--interactions/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Email Tracking

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Email](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494--email/ "Email")
    
4.  [Managing Emails](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-515--managing-email/ "Managing Emails")
    
5.  Email Tracking

Email Tracking
==============

* * *

The Email Tracking feature allows you to know when the messages were opened by recipients and whether the links were clicked.

You can activate email tracking:

*   when you connect a new email account
*   in the settings of the current account 

In Flowlu, you can activate:

*   open tracking
*   click tracking

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/499/9bb00e49-bcc1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If these options are enabled in the current email account, then when creating an email you will have the icons to enable tracking of opening and clicking on the link. Click on the appropriate icons to enable tracking for this email.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/499/34dd3cf8-bcc4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

> **Note:** To enable tracking, you should click on the appropriate options before sending an email.

After sending an email with tracking options enabled, you can get information about opening an email or clicking on links on the email page. 

Once an email is read, there is a check-mark next to the sender/recipient addresses.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/499/8780d0dc-bcc4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also find out whether an e-mail has been read from the list of mails.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/499/80cc83ec-a64f-11ea-9c58-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

You can track the links in the Click Tracking section. If you hover over the appropriate link, you'll see the exact date and time of clicking the link, as well as their total number of clicks.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/499/a2b88585-bcc4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Besides, if the tracking options are checked in the notification settings, you will receive an instant notification as soon as your email is opened or the recipient clicked on the links.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/499/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Organizational Structure

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  Organizational Structure

Organizational Structure
========================

* * *

Organizational structure is a crucial tool for all businesses with 30+ employees. Properly organized company structure helps to understand the hierarchy of a business, its goals, and final output.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/705/398b675e-231f-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.jpg)

As a part of a structure, you can create departments, set heads of departments, assign employees, create roles and positions. Department membership is displayed on the page of the user, as well as position.

It helps to quickly navigate within departments, because all teammates of the user are displayed on its page.

**How to Install the Module**  

--------------------------------

Module installation is available for portal administrators only. To do that, click on your icon in the top right corner and click Apps.

In the Apps section, find the Organizational Structure, and click the Install button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/705/b5f56112-231f-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Organizational Structure is placed under the Team module.

**Module settings**
-------------------

To get to the settings, open the module and click on the gear.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/705/10e97657-2328-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also access the module settings from the Applications menu. To do this, follow the path: Profile → Applications → Company structure.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/705/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [Adding and Editing Block in the Organizational Structure](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705-706--adding-and-editing-block-in-the-organizational-structure/)
    
*   [Unassigned Employees](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705-708--unassigned-employees/)
    
*   [Custom Fields in the Organizational Structure](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705-709--custom-fields-in-the-organizational-structure/)
    
*   [Types of Organizational Structure Display](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705-710--types-of-organizational-structure-display/)

# Adding and Editing Block in the Organizational Structure

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Organizational Structure](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705--organizational-structure/ "Organizational Structure")
    
4.  Adding and Editing Block in the Organizational Structure

Adding and Editing Block in the Organizational Structure
========================================================

* * *

To add a new block, click on the Add button.

If you already have a block and want to create a new one, related to the parental block, click the three-dot button on the parental block and click the Add button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/706/1adbb00f-2320-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

**Each block consists of six fields:**

1.  Block name. Here you specify the name of a department, office, or division.
2.  Parental block. Here you need to pick the block to which a new block will be hierarchically related.
3.  Position. Position of all employees related to the block.
4.  Number. Identification number of the position.
5.  Employees. All team members with the same position.
6.  Description. Any text to describe the block, position details, etc. Here you can also define the main tasks of the department and goals.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/706/fb6fe0e9-2320-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Note that one employee can handle more than 1 role because he carries multiple responsibilities.

Not all fields need to be filled. For example, if you’re simply adding a new employee to the department, it's not necessary to fill in the “name” field.

To edit an already created field, click the three-dot button on it and go to the Edit tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/706/1db92473-2321-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/706/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Creating Business Process

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Business Processes](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/702--business-processes/ "Business Processes")
    
4.  Creating Business Process

Creating Business Process
=========================

* * *

Upon entering the module, you will be directed to the "Cards" section. From this window, you can initiate the first process using the Create button or the New Process button.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/703/55a7ab2b-2319-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Creating a Process
------------------

The business process creation window itself contains two fields: "Name" and "Description". The "Name" field is mandatory and marked with an asterisk (\*).

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/703/49a142ee-231a-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

After saving the data, a window with business process settings will open, which includes four sections:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/703/99758213-231a-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

**1) Fields**

A list of custom fields that will make up the business process instance card. When creating a custom field, you can specify it as mandatory to fill in. Use this for information without which the business process cannot be launched. More information about the type of custom fields can be found in [another section of the Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-304-305--types-of-custom-fields/)
.

**2) Users**

A list of users who will have access to the business process. You can set access rights to the business process for both a group of users and individual users.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/703/edc1404b-231a-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

_There are four levels of access:_

*   Can run processes - the user will only see instances that they have launched within the business process to which they have access. Cannot edit instance information or change its status. The ability to leave a comment in the instance card and view automations that have been applied to the instance is available.
*   Can view all processes - does not have the ability to launch new instances, but sees all previously created instances in this process. The same actions are available in the instance card as in the previous access level.
*   Can run and view processes - combines the capabilities of the previous two access levels.
*   Can manage business processes - similar to the rights of the module administrator, with the exception of creating automations and access to editing them. Has access to business process settings, can edit instance card data, create new instances, and manually move them through stages.

**3) Stages**

A list of stages through which an instance will move in this business process. You can  also change the color, delete, or add new stages, add a description and change the name.

The list of stages also has additional structuring. The list is visually divided into two blocks: "Process Stages" and "Final".

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/703/981badcc-231b-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Stages from the first block will be displayed on the board with instances and displayed in the list of instances.

Stages from the second block will not be displayed directly on the board or in the list of instances, as these stages reflect the status with which the instance is completed in the business process.

**4) Settings**

In this section, you can change the name and description of the business process, set a title for instances of this process (you can use variables from the values of custom fields from the "Fields" section), allow deletion of completed instances, and also mark the fields that will be available for filling in when creating an instance.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/703/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [Tasks and Actions of Business Process](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/702-703-704--tasks-and-actions-of-business-process/)

# Communications

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  Communications

Communications
==============

* * *

This module allows you to connect external messages directly to Flowlu without using third-party integrators. This way, you can ensure a seamless 2-way integration to receive and send text messages via messengers, automatically assign manages to chats, quickly create sales opportunities, and keep track of new messages without switching to external apps.

How to Install the Communications module
----------------------------------------

You can install the Communications module from the **Apps** section.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/676/573f0ae8-ef60-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened tab, click the **Install** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/676/66fcf657-ef60-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Done! 

Once the module is installed, you can uninstall it or change roles, permissions, and access settings on its page.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/676/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [How to Connect Messengers](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676-677--how-to-connect-messengers/)

# Projects: Main Settings

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126--projects/ "Projects")
    
4.  Projects: Main Settings

Projects: Main Settings
=======================

* * *

Before you start working with projects, check out the module settings. They allow you to activate additional features and adapt the module to your workflow.

Where are the module settings located?
--------------------------------------

You can open the "Projects" settings in several ways from different locations in the system.

### Method 1: Via Portal Settings

This method is available to [portal administrators](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1473-272-273--give-user-admin-rights/)
.

Click on your avatar in the upper right corner of the screen and select "Portal Settings" from the context menu.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1697/610837b9-e18a-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Go to **Portal Settings → Projects → Main Settings**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1697/656ffd84-e18a-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

### Method 2: Via the Side Menu

This method is available to users with ["Administrator" rights](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-249--access-rights-in-the-projects/)
 for the "Projects" module.

Hover over the "Projects" module in the side menu. In the tab that appears, click on "Settings".

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1697/6cceebbd-e18a-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

### Method 3: Within the Projects Module

Users with ["Administrator" access level](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-249--access-rights-in-the-projects/)
 to the "Projects" module will see a gear icon on any screen within the module. Clicking it opens the module settings.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1697/70e82abf-e18a-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

What can be configured in "Projects"?
-------------------------------------

In the main settings of the module, you will find options that affect the user experience. Most of them are activated by default. Check or uncheck the boxes as needed and remember to save your changes.

### Automatically move the project to the next stage

This option helps managers save time. The project will automatically advance to the next stage based on selected conditions. You can choose the transition conditions or disable this feature via the selector:

*   All checklist items are completed
*   All tasks are completed
*   All milestones are completed
*   Don’t move automatically (manual only)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1697/758da96d-e18a-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

### Employees have access to all projects

**Note:** In this context, "employees" refers to users with the ["Project Manager" access level](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-249--access-rights-in-the-projects/)
 to the module.

*   When activated, this option allows all users with "Project Manager" access to view all projects in the system.
*   If inactive, they will only see projects where they are assigned as the manager.

### Allow viewing project emails

Emails can be linked to projects or specific project tasks in Flowlu through [Email integration](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494--email/)
. This option enables project participants (who don't have direct access to the connected mailbox) to view the original email. For example, if only the project manager has access to the mailbox, enabling this allows other team members involved in the project to see the relevant correspondence.

### Allow deletion of active projects

If activated, you can [delete projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-1478--project-delete/)
 in any status, including active and completed ones.  

**Important:** Projects in Flowlu are deleted permanently and cannot be recovered.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1697/7def85cd-e18a-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

You can also choose to delete all tasks created within the project by toggling the corresponding switch during deletion.

### Highlight overdue projects in red on the board

This adds a red highlighting to the cards of active projects whose deadlines have passed. This makes it easier for your team to identify overdue projects and take action.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1697/84611058-e18a-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

### Display attached images on the project card (Kanban board)

If enabled, the first image attached to the project files will be displayed on the card in Kanban mode. This helps you visually identify specific projects on the board more quickly.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1697/88d26a50-e18a-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

### Use financial management in projects

When enabled, the "Projects" module is linked to the "Finance" module. You can track financial data directly within the project, specifically by creating planned income and expenses.

**Important:** The "Finance" tab in a project is only visible to [users who have access rights](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-285--access-rights-to-the-finance-module/)
 to the "Finance" module.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1697/8fc2da98-e18a-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Data entered here will be reflected in the Payment Calendar.

### Display finances on the project main page

If active, a financial summary block will appear on the project overview page. This allows the project manager or supervisor to quickly assess the project's financial health and profitability.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1697/977856c8-e18a-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

### Managers can create income and expenses

*   If activated: The project manager can create income and expense entries within the project regardless of whether they have access rights to the specific bank accounts.
*   If inactive: The project manager can only create financial entries if they have been granted explicit access to the organization's bank accounts.

[Previous Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126--projects/)

[Next How to Create a Project](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-127--how-to-create-a-project/)

# Flowlu Help Center | External Users Roles

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Client Portal](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/586--client-portal/ "Client Portal")
    
4.  External Users Roles

External Users Roles
====================

* * *

If you have the external users functionality, it is recommended to preset the access rights for external users in the corresponding tab in the Client Portal module.

### Create a New Role

To create a new role for external users, go to **Client Portal** → **External Users** **Roles** and click **New Role**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/590/5095c6bc-47bd-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

Enter the name and description (optional) for your role. The description should be clear for anyone using this role, so they can see exactly what it allows users to do in Flowlu.

You can also specify the expiry date to indicate until what time and date the external user will have access to this role.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/590/c17cdf69-47c1-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

Specify the access rights for each of the modules. External users can access the following modules:

*   CRM (to their CRM account card);
*   Tasks;
*   Projects;
*   Knowledge Base;
*   Invoices and estimates.

In the "Permissions" tab for each of the mentioned above modules, you can set up:  

*   **View fields**. Here you can specify the fields that will be displayed to an external user in projects, tasks, CRM account, etc.
*   **View relations**. Here you can set up whether an external user will see the assignee or the owner of the task, at what stage the project is, etc.
*   **Available actions**. An external user can leave comments, create tasks, convert the estimate into an invoice, etc.
*   **External user notifications**. An external user can be notified when certain changes are made to the corresponding project or task, etc.

> You can associate an external with several roles at once. If a rule conflicts, then the rule that allows a specific action will be taken into account. For example, an external user is associated with two roles at the same time: Freelancers and Clients. If the option to create tasks is enabled for the Freelancers role and disabled for the Clients role, then this user will have this option enabled.  

Do not forget to mark the role as active if you want to start using it.  

### Edit/Delete Role

If you want to edit role settings, go to the list of all roles and click on the appropriate role.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/590/f8ddaadd-4841-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

In the opened window:  

*   change the role activity;
*   define access rights for specific items;
*   complete the description;
*   edit access rights to the modules;
*   add or delete users.

To delete a role, go to the list of all roles and check the box next to the appropriate role or check several if necessary. Click a trash can icon at the bottom of the list and confirm that you want to delete the role.

### Move/Remove Users  

You can delete or change a role for an individual user:

*   on the external user page;

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/590/39ad3c30-4842-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

  

*   in the list of created roles in the "External Users Roles" tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/590/e162afd8-4842-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/590/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Unassigned Employees

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Organizational Structure](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705--organizational-structure/ "Organizational Structure")
    
4.  Unassigned Employees

Unassigned Employees
====================

* * *

To build a company structure, we provided the option of Unassigned Employees. Unassigned employees are users who are not in the structure yet. To open the menu, click the three-dot button in the top right corner and pick the Unassigned Employees option.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/708/f9fb78a2-2322-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened menu, you’ll see all employees who are not in the structure yet and need to be added.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/708/3d6cc4bc-2323-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/708/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Documents

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  Documents

Documents
=========

* * *

Docs is a module where all your custom templates for documents and their final drafts are stored. You can use premade templates or create your own unique ones. Documents and templates can be linked to custom fields from CRM accounts and some other entities in Flowlu, so you can automatically fill in all the necessities.

You can create literally any document type: service agreements, proposals, orders, regulations, etc. Our customizable templates can nail any part of document appearance, while document types will help you link information from other Flowlu modules and entities.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/683/da3071d0-9d6d-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/683/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Setting Up Permissions For External Users

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Client Portal](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/586--client-portal/ "Client Portal")
    
4.  Setting Up Permissions For External Users

Setting Up Permissions For External Users
=========================================

* * *

In Flowlu, you can configure access rights to certain data for external users.

After the external user accepts the invitation, they will be displayed in the appropriate tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/591/0d4dd454-4843-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

After opening the card of an external user, all their contact info, associated CRM account and related company (if it has any) will be displayed in the "**Main**" section. It also shows what role is associated this external user with.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/591/b561abcf-4846-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

  
For a CRM account and a company, you can specify fields that will be available for viewing directly from this tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/591/a7062c09-4844-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

You can also specify the date and time to indicate until what moment the external user will have access to the specified information.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/591/20716f74-4845-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

Specify the access rights for each of the modules. External users can access the following modules:

*   CRM (to their CRM account card);
*   Tasks;
*   Projects;
*   Knowledge Base;
*   Invoices and estimates.

In the "**Permissions**" tab for each of the mentioned above modules, you can set up:  

*   View fields. Here you can specify the fields that will be displayed to an external user in projects, tasks, CRM account, etc.
*   View relations. Here you can set up whether an external user will see the assignee or the owner of the task, at what stage the project is, etc.
*   Available actions. An external user can leave comments, create tasks, convert the estimate into an invoice, etc.
*   External user notifications. An external user can be notified when certain changes are made to the corresponding project or task, etc.

After linking an external user to their CRM account, a corresponding window with the attached external user will appear in the CRM account card. Here you can configure what fields will be displayed and/or, if needed, remove  external user's relation from this CRM account. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/591/ab06df3e-4846-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

After authorization, the specified information from the CRM account and the related company cards will be displayed for an external user in the "My Account" section.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/591/328514c8-4847-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

In the "**Available items**" tab, you can also define access for specified items. For example, you can give a client access to a specific task or project. For each of the added items, you can also indicate the date and time until which defined data will be available.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/591/bd6fbeb9-4847-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

In the "**Available users**" tab, you can configure which employees of your account will be viewable to an external user during authorization. For example, to whom they will be able to assign tasks or whether the project team or project manager will be displayed to them in related project.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/591/2f68afce-4848-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

  
The external user will also be able to send these employees private messages or add them to the chat for discussion.  
  
Next, let's see how to open access to a specific item for external users in your account.

### How to share tasks with external users

Tasks for an external user will be displayed if:

*   Access is given to specific tasks in the "Available items" tab.
*   An external user is owner, assignee, collaborator or follower In the task.
*   In the "Tasks" tab of the associated CRM account.
*   Access is given to view tasks that related to a specified project ("Permissions" → "Projects" → "View relations" → "Tasks")

In the "Tasks" module, an external user can view the execution of tasks for specific projects and assign tasks to employees, leave comments and upload files.  

### How to share knowledge base with external user

Knowledge bases for an external user will be displayed if:  

*   Access is given to specific knowledge bases in the "Available items" tab.
*   A external user is selected in the knowledge base settings → "Access".

In the Knowledge Base module, an external user can view published articles, leave comments, upload and / or delete files. You can also open external view for knowledge bases.

### How to share projects with external users

Projects for external users will be displayed if:

*   Access is given to specific projects in the "Available items" tab.
*   External user was selected as "Client" during creation of the project.
*   Access is given to view projects related to a particular task ("Permissions" → "Tasks" → "View relations" → "Projects").

In the "Projects" module, with the permission of the administrator, an external user can track the progress of the project, assign tasks to employees, leave comments and upload files. They may also have access to files, project tasks, comments, related revenues, expenses, invoices and estimates, project team, and work order.

A user can copy an external link to a project to, for example, share it with your team in a chat.

### How to share invoices with external users

Invoices for external users will be displayed if:

*   Access is given in the "Available items" tab.
*   An invoice in which an external user is listed as a customer, is marked as sent or was sent by e-mail.
*   Access is given to view invoices related to a particular project ("Permissions" → "Project" → "View relations" → "Invoices").

Here, with administrator permission, an external user can leave comments, upload or delete files.  

### How to share estimates with external users

Estimates for external users will be displayed if:

*   Access is given in the "Available items" tab.
*   An estimate in which an external user is listed as a customer, is marked as sent or was sent by e-mail.
*   Access is given to view estimates related to a particular project ("Permissions" → "Project" → "View relations" → "Estimates")

Here, with administrator permission, an external user can leave comments as well as convert estimates to invoices.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/591/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous External Users Roles](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/586-590--external-users-roles/)

[Next Accessing Your Flowlu Client Portal](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/586-1732--accessing-your-flowlu-client-portal/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Calendar Types

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Calendar](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299--calendar/ "Calendar")
    
4.  Calendar Types

Calendar Types
==============

* * *

By default, all users have access to the **Company Calendar** and **Personal Calendar** (which has your name). If your colleagues give you access to their personal calendars, you will see them in the **Shared with me** section with the corresponding employee names.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/300/b9282759-98bb-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Company Calendar
----------------

The Company calendar is available to everyone. Here, all users can create events and invite coworkers to the events. It can be activities related to the whole company, for example, general meetings, booking for a conference room, trainings and so on.  

> **Note:** Company calendar is a system calendar, it cannot be hidden, deleted, or synchronized with a user's Google Calendar. You cannot change user access level for it. You can plan joint activities for only a certain group of employees or a department in the personal calendar or create a separate calendar for this purpose.

On calendar's **Edit** page you can change the name and color for your calendar.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/300/f8ad9b21-98bb-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  
If you need to deny access to all calendars to any of employees, you can do it in the user profile settings or in the **Apps** **→ Calendar** section.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/300/e8e366e0-98bc-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Personal Calendar
-----------------

This calendar has your name. Here, by default, all events to which you are related are displayed. These include:

*   all the events that you have planned for the opportunity, CRM account, or project.
*   all the joint events to which you have been invited by your colleagues.
*   any other events created with reference to this calendar.

You can share this calendar with your colleagues so that they can see your schedule.  

By default, all events are created in this calendar. But if, for example, you want to display events from CRM or projects in your linked Google Calendar, you can change it in the settings.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/300/11482e6a-7fe8-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.jpg)

Default Calendar
----------------

You can choose a default calendar. When you create an event, the default calendar will be selected.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/300/68dded67-95c4-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/300/801053ab-95c4-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

My Tasks  

-----------

By default, this calendar is disabled. In order to activate it, go to the calendar personalization.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/300/4f3cece1-98bd-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Check this option to display the current tasks and, if necessary, the completed ones:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/300/7dfe9284-98bd-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

> **Note:** Only you have access to this calendar. Tasks in the calendar are displayed only if they have a start and end date for them.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/300/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Calendar](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299--calendar/)

[Next How to Create or Delete a Calendar](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299-312--how-to-create-delete-a-new-calendar/)

# Accessing Your Flowlu Client Portal

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Client Portal](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/586--client-portal/ "Client Portal")
    
4.  Accessing Your Flowlu Client Portal

Accessing Your Flowlu Client Portal
===================================

* * *

The Flowlu Client Portal is a secure, centralized workspace designed for collaboration between a company and its external clients or contractors. Instead of managing projects through fragmented email threads, you can access all relevant information — tasks, projects, and invoices — in one dedicated place.

This guide provides instructions for guest users on how to:

*   Complete the Flowlu Client Portal sign up process
*   Log in to the Flowlu Client Portal
*   Access your data via the Flowlu mobile app
*   Set up notifications to stay updated on project stages

Client Portal Sign Up
---------------------

Flowlu is a secure business ecosystem, which means you cannot register an account on your own to gain access to another company's work. Access is granted only via an invitation from the organization you are working with (your service provider).

The Flowlu Client Portal sign up process typically starts in one of two ways:

*   **Email Invitation:** You will receive an automated email with a unique registration link_._

**Note:** If you don't see the email, please check your Spam folder or ask the organization to resend the invitation.

*   **Direct Link:** The representative from the company you work with may provide you with a direct URL to their specific registration page.

Once you click that link, simply enter your email address. Your email address will serve as your login username.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1732/9b95d72e-fc2d-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Then you’ll see a user creation window where you’ll add your first name, last name, and create a password.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1732/a193a3b3-fc2d-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

After finalizing your profile, your account is immediately linked to the company’s workspace. You can now access the shared data at any time.

Client Portal Sign In
---------------------

There are two ways to log in to the Flowlu client portal.

1.  **Standard Login Page:** Visit the main [Flowlu login screen](https://my.flowlu.com/login/)
     and log in with your email and password. If your email is linked to one or more client portals, they will appear automatically after login.
2.  **Custom Account URL:** Each organization has an address like `companyname.flowlu.com` associated with it. However, some organizations may use a fully custom domain, such as `crm.mycompany.com` or any other. You can get a custom account URL from a representative of the company. You can use it directly and bookmark it for convenience.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1732/fe0e3e25-fcd1-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Both methods work equally well. Using a custom domain is optional but can make access faster if you use the portal frequently.

Working in Flowlu Client Portal
-------------------------------

As a Client Portal user, your access is intentionally streamlined to keep the interface focused, simple, and secure. Rather than overwhelming you with internal management tools, the portal serves as a dedicated window into the most critical aspects of your collaboration. Depending on the specific permissions granted by the organization you work with, you can track the real-time progress of your projects and stay updated on the status of every individual task. This transparency ensures you always know which milestones have been reached and what is currently in development.

The Client Portal can be your primary communication hub, allowing you to engage directly with the team through task comments or chat. This keeps all feedback and decisions organized within the project itself, eliminating the need to dig through scattered email chains. Furthermore, you have access to a secure repository for all shared files, contracts, and deliverables, along with a dedicated financial section where you can review, approve, and download invoices or estimates.

Flowlu Mobile App
-----------------

You can stay updated on your projects using the official Flowlu mobile app for [iOS](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/flowlu/id1308907286)
 and [Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.flowlu.flowlu&hl=en)
. There is no separate app for clients — simply log in to the main Flowlu app with your credentials, and the interface will automatically adjust to your client role.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1732/a4c0f27d-fcd2-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

The mobile app is the best way to maintain real-time communication. You can receive push notifications for:

*   **Project Milestones:** Know exactly when a project moves to a new stage (e.g., from "In Progress" to "Quality Check").
*   **New Messages:** Get instant alerts when a team member leaves a comment or sends a chat message.
*   **Billing:** Be notified immediately when a new invoice or estimate is issued for your review.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1732/f379fa7d-fc3f-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Troubleshooting and Lost Access
-------------------------------

If you have lost your credentials or cannot log in, please follow these steps:

*   **Reset Password:** Use the "Forgot password?" link on the sign-in page to receive a recovery link via email.
*   **Lost Portal Link:** If you don't remember the company's specific address, you can log in via the global [Flowlu page](https://my.flowlu.com/login/)
    . All portals associated with your email will be listed there.
*   **Invitation Issues:** If your sign-up link has expired, please contact the person who hired you or invited you. They can manually resend the invitation from their internal settings.

Working With Multiple Companies
-------------------------------

If you are a freelancer or contractor working with several businesses that use Flowlu, you do not need multiple accounts. Using the **My Accounts** menu, you can seamlessly switch between different client portals without logging out, provided all invitations were sent to the same email address.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1732/3332d3d0-fc2f-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

The Flowlu Client Portal centralizes your work and communications, eliminating the stress of searching through endless email threads. With real-time project updates accessible on both desktop and mobile, you’ll always stay in the loop.

[Previous Setting Up Permissions For External Users](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/586-591--setting-up-permissions-for-external-users/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Create or Delete a Calendar

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Calendar](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299--calendar/ "Calendar")
    
4.  How to Create or Delete a Calendar

How to Create or Delete a Calendar
==================================

* * *

In your personal calendar, you can see the events that you create for CRM accounts, opportunities, projects and shared events. Here, you can also create any other activities, without reference to anything.

When you have many different events, creating them in the same calendar can be rather inconvenient. For example, you may need a public calendar, where your colleagues can see your schedule, and a personal calendar that no one can access to.

In Flowlu, you can create any number of calendars, distribute events between them, and view the calendars separately or together.

Creating the Calendar
---------------------

1\. In order to create a new calendar, click on **Create** button:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/312/3222dc92-98be-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened sidebar, select the color of the calendar, which will be displayed on the event pages of this calendar as a cultured bar on the left.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/312/731bf310-98be-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

2\. Enter the name and description, if necessary.

3\. Share your calendar with colleagues. Assign them an access level, from viewing availability level to the full access level. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/312/9477d795-98be-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

4\. Click **Save or Enter**. The calendar is created. All users will be automatically notified about receiving access to your new calendar. Employees will see this calendar in the column **Shared with me** under the name that you have specified.

For you, this calendar will be displayed in **M****y Calendars** section.

Changing the Access Rights
--------------------------

For each employee, you can change the access level at any time. To do this, click on the three vertical dots next to the calendar name and select **Edit**. After the access is changed, the employee will also receive a notification.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/312/d2cf2daf-98be-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened window, assign an access level for each user, add new ones, or delete unnecessary ones.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/312/67132fc7-98bf-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Hide or Delete Unnecessary Calendars
-------------------------------------------

You can hide the calendars you have created or unsubscribe from the calendars you were added to. To do this, click on the button with three vertical dots next to the name and unsubscribe.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/312/94e1d175-98bf-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can not hide the company calendar and personal calendar. At any time you can subscribe back to the calendar. To do this, go to the settings and click the eye icon to make it visible or not.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/312/d570b4b0-98bf-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Going to the calendar settings_

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/312/f1436362-98bf-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/312/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Calendar Types](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299-300--types-of-calendars-in-flowlu/)

# Templates

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Communications](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676--interactions/ "Communications")
    
4.  Templates

Templates
=========

* * *

For each communication case, you can create a template to quickly use it when necessary. Templates are created in the Communications module but used in the customer's chat.

Templates are aimed at saving you time on communicating on common questions similar to those for all employees, such as delivery details, contact information, etc.

How to create Templates
-----------------------

To create a message template, head to the **Communications** module → **Templates** tab.

Click the small arrow next to the Connect button → **Create Template**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/700/79afca1e-ef61-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.jpg)

In the opened window, you can fill in the following information:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/700/47e748a1-ea84-11ee-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

1\. **Name.** Name of the template**.** It's only visible to users of the portal who have access to the template.

2\. **Description**. Detailed information about the template.

3\. **Personal Template**. If enabled, this template will be visible to administrators only and to the owner of the template. If not, the template will be available for each employee. 

4\. **Template content.** Here, you define the text content of our template. By clicking the three-dot button, you can add variables from related CRM accounts, sales opportunities, custom fields, etc. This information will be automatically filled in after you send a message to your client.

How to Use Templates
--------------------

First, you need to have an active channel in the **Communications** module and an active conversation with a client.

Once the template is created, you can use it in a chat with customers. 

To do that, click on the chat icon and go to the **Customers** tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/700/f7eabb9a-ea7f-11ee-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

To use the template, you need to invoke the template command by using "/".

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/700/b2c59c2d-ea80-11ee-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click on the "**Template**" command to select one of your templates.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/700/3c4fd666-ea81-11ee-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click on the template, and it will be applied to the text box. You can also edit this content at any time.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/700/33d99320-ea83-11ee-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Done! You can edit the message or send it as it is by clicking the send button.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/700/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Time Tracking for Tasks

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Time Tracker](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/438--time-tracker/ "Time Tracker")
    
4.  Time Tracking for Tasks

Time Tracking for Tasks
=======================

* * *

The time tracker is located at the top of the task page. Start tracking time by clicking the **Start** button.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/442/4f5ec35e-98c1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you need a break, press **Pause** button. In this case, the countdown and time log recording would be paused, but be continued after resuming.

There can be several records on the time spent for different days or different parts. To end the current time recording and then start a new one (or stop it at all), click the **Stop** button. The next time you turn the timer on, a new recording starts. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/442/68cf8152-98c1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Enter Time Records Manually
---------------------------

If you need to manually add a record or edit an existing one, you can do it in the main menu or directly on the task page

### Change Data via Main Menu

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/442/981c75c7-98c1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   Open the Time Tracker;
*   Find an entry you want to edit and click on it;
*   Make changes in the opened window.

In this way, you can only make changes to the existing entries, but you cannot create a new one.

### Change Data on Task Page

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/442/c4683e5b-98c1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   Open the task for which you want to make changes in the Time Tracker record.
*   At the bottom of the page, open the **Time Elapsed** tab.
*   Here you can find all the Time Tracker records related to this task.
*   Click on the entry which you want to edit and make the changes.
*   To create a new record, click on the corresponding button.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/442/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Time Tracker](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/438--time-tracker/)

[Next How to Issue an Invoice Based on Spent Time](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/438-445--billing/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Events

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Calendar](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299--calendar/ "Calendar")
    
4.  Events

Events
======

* * *

Before scheduling an event, check or uncheck the options next to the calendars for which you want to see the scheduled events. Then switch to a convenient mode of viewing the calendar: daily, weekly, or monthly.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/1216efaa-be57-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Use the switch if you need to know the schedule for the next week or month.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/35abffa7-be57-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Creating the event in the calendar
----------------------------------

When you have determined the date and time, click on the time interval and select the area according to the duration of the event.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/6003afd7-be57-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Enter the name, change the date or time if necessary, or enter the _All day_ option.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/28c6b712-be5c-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Use additional features, such as inviting participants, adding the event reminders, additional privacy settings and so on.

### Inviting Participants

To participate together in an event (meeting, presentation, or conference), you can invite any portal user or an entire user role.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/b705c671-95d2-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

After saving the event, the colleagues will receive a notification and will be able to confirm or decline attendance.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/72d95fd5-be5c-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

At any time, you can change the decision and confirm participation. To do this, go to the event window:

On the event page, you will see all invited and declined invitation employees:

> **Please note:** After the user confirms participation, this event will be displayed on his/her personal calendar or the invitations’ calendar, depending on the settings. All the event details will also be available to this person.

### Adding Reminders

For each event, you can schedule several reminders at once for a certain number of minutes, hours, days, or weeks.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/9e453cfe-be5c-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If this is a joint event, then all accepted the invitation participants will receive a notification at the specified time.

Before saving an event, select the calendar in which you need to display this event. Then, if desired, specify the event colour.

### Additional Settings

When creating an event, you have an option to change the status to _Available_, if the scheduled event does not imply your absence. It can be sending an email, preparing for a conference and so on.

Select the _Busy_ status, if at this time you will be absent from the office, e.g. when you're at the client meeting or conference.

This is necessary for colleagues with the _Viewing availability_ access level to your calendar since they can not access the event name, but only the status.

You can also further deny or provide access to viewing event information for colleagues. If you create a personal event, then only those users who have access level to this calendar not lower the editing one will be able to see it. If you create a public event, then its details will be visible to all users who have access to this calendar, regardless of the access level.

After the event is created, you can quickly change the date and duration on the calendar using the Drag&Drop method.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/f1561b20-be5c-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### How to Change/Delete/Copy an Event

Open the event and click on the button with three dots to delete, edit or copy it

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/b2a32200-95be-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to View Events in the Calendars
-----------------------------------

You can disable or activate the necessary calendars for viewing events by checking the appropriate field. This is especially necessary when you have many calendars connected and it gets difficult to view all the events at once.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/a2870084-be5e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Flowlu will save your preferences and the next time you log in, it will display all the calendars that you have connected.

To quickly see the events of any specific calendar, click to the right of its name on three vertical dots and in one click clear filters from all calendars:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/c10d1f47-be5e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Display Shared Events on a Separate Calendar
---------------------------------------------------

Any employee can invite you to participate in any shared event: meeting, training or conference. After you agree to participate in this event, it is displayed by default in your personal calendar. You can also display shared events on a separate calendar.

To do this personalization, you first need to create a new calendar. Then click on the three dots button - Personalization in the upper right corner:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/2f6c7752-be5e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Then choose in which calendar you want to display events you have been invited to:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/04d213dc-be5e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/314/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [Recurring Events](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299-314-743--recurring-events/)
    

[Previous How to Create or Delete a Calendar](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299-312--how-to-create-delete-a-new-calendar/)

[Next Recurring Events](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299-314-743--recurring-events/)
