# Workload in Time Tracker

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Time Tracker](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/438--time-tracker/ "Time Tracker")
    
4.  Workload in Time Tracker

Workload in Time Tracker
========================

* * *

This report helps track team workload based on tasks and estimated time.

By default, the Workload report is enabled when the "Time Tracker" module is installed. If necessary, you can toggle it on or off in the module settings.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1708/06ec985f-f20c-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Where to Find the Workload Report
---------------------------------

The report is available in the **Time Tracker** module in the left sidebar.

If the module is not in the sidebar, click the **More** button, then select **Time Tracker** from the menu that appears.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1708/163989a9-f20c-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

You can also find the Workload in Reports. Go to **Reports** -> **Time Tracker** -> **Workload**.

Access Rights
-------------

Users will see different data depending on their access level:

*   Employees can see their own workload for tasks where they are the assignee.
*   Managers and Administrators of the Time Tracker module can see the team's workload across the entire portal. When clicking on a workload color indicator, the user will only see tasks they have permission to view.

**Tip:** Set up a filter by employee to monitor the workload of your specific team.

What Is Shown in the Report
---------------------------

The Workload report shows how employee workload is distributed by days or weeks and helps identify overloads or free slots in time.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1708/30375dae-f20c-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Report Settings
---------------

To change Workload report settings, click the **gear icon** in the upper right corner.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1708/3cbc02e7-f20c-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

In the settings, you can include:

*   completed tasks;
*   subtasks;
*   holidays;
*   employee absences.

You can choose which specific types of time off (e.g., Vacation, Sick Leave, Business Trip) should be reflected in the report.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1708/93706cf9-fb78-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Days with registered absences are displayed as cells with a background color corresponding to the specific absence type. This provides a clear visual cue of team availability, helping you plan tasks and avoid overloads during periods when a team member is out of the office.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1708/b0dcc495-fb78-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Data View Types
---------------

The system allows you to choose the view type:

*   **Number of tasks** — shows how many tasks an employee has for a specific period.
*   **Planned hours** — the total number of hours planned for all tasks within a week or day.

You can also choose the period for which to show data: 2 months or 2 weeks. Use the arrows to switch between periods.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1708/e90f24d8-f211-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

For visual planning, the estimated hours of each task are distributed evenly across all working days within the set timeframe.

Formula for distributing hours of a single task:

_Daily Estimated Hours = Total Estimated Time of the task / Number of working days in its duration._

**Note:** Weekends or holidays falling within the task duration are automatically excluded and not counted as working days. If the start date or deadline of a task is set on a weekend, the system will include that day in the calculation. In the report, it will be automatically highlighted as a day with overload, signaling a possible error in deadline planning.

Color identification is based on estimated time, regardless of the number of tasks. If the number of estimated hours exceeds the number of working hours, the indicator turns **red**, signifying an overload for the employee.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1708/5a54b971-f20c-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

You can configure the company's work schedule and working hours in the **Portal Settings**.

Click on the **color indicator** to open the employee's task list. Details for each task are also available for viewing there.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1708/e2eed94e-f20c-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Using the **Filter**, you can display only the necessary tasks — for example, by project, status, or assignee.

[Previous Reports: Estimated and Spent Time](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/438-453--how-to-control-estimated-and-spent-time-using-reports/)

[Next Custom Fields and Lists](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303--custom-fields-and-lists/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Projects

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  Projects

Projects
========

* * *

The **Projects** module allows planning and collaborating on project implementation. Here you can manage work stages and tasks, track time spent on a project, record project budget, issue invoices and calculate costs. The project team have shared access to documents, notes and can exchange comments.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/126/2feb732d-c8aa-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

**Project Workflow** board is designed for visual representation of project's progress. Use a project board to easily manage projects with the same work structure. Here you can see the project's current stage and its milestones. Please note that only projects created by project workflows can be displayed there. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/126/7999ba31-4f7c-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

**Workload Board** allows estimating your team's workload. Here you can see all current projects, their stages and estimated revenue. You may change an assignee just by dragging a card to an appropriate column:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/126/2f8841a1-4f7d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

**See also:** [8 Flowlu Project Management Features You Need to Use](https://www.flowlu.com/blog/project-management/8-flowlu-project-management-features-you-need-to-use/)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/126/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Connect Messengers

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Communications](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676--interactions/ "Communications")
    
4.  How to Connect Messengers

How to Connect Messengers
=========================

* * *

The Communications module ensures integration between Flowlu and external messaging apps, so you can receive and send messages from the system without switching apps.  

Currently, Flowlu supports Viber and Telegram integrations. The list of available integrations will be expanding.

Creating a New Integration
--------------------------

Step-by-step integration guides are explained in the detailed articles for each messenger: 

*   [How to integrate Viber](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676-677-679--how-to-connect-viber/)
    
*   [How to integrate Telegram](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676-677-678--how-to-connect-telegram/)
    

However, all integrations have similar tools to manage communication with clients.

Managers Queue 
---------------

Each integration can have its own automated manager queue. If a person contacts you via this integration, a new chat will be assigned to the manager who is first in the queue. If the queue is empty, new chats will be marked as "unassigned" but you can always assign them to managers later.

**Example**: as shown in the screenshot below, we have two managers in the queue. It means that the first new chat will be automatically assigned to Barbara. The second one is for David, while the third is for Barbara again.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/677/33e4a019-56cd-11ee-8e19-fa163e2ff576.png)

After the queue, you can set the pipeline to which all opportunities created with chats will be taken. For each chatbot (integration), you can set separate pipelines.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/677/65a2e216-56ce-11ee-8e19-fa163e2ff576.png)

Auto-replies
------------

When the bot is created, you can set up automated replies and welcome messages. To do that, find the chatbot you want to set automated replies for and click on it.

In the **Messages Settings** tab, you can set the following options:

*   Welcome text — automated message sent when the user contacts you for the first time via the chatbot.
*   Auto-reply message — automated message sent when the user starts a conversation. Triggers when the person texts you for the first time or reopens the closed chat.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/677/67476525-56d0-11ee-8e19-fa163e2ff576.png)

 "Customers" tab in the Built-in Messenger
------------------------------------------

When the Communications is installed, you can see the Customers tab in the built-in messenger next to the Team tab. All chats from external apps are in this tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/677/5d637598-56d4-11ee-8e19-fa163e2ff576.png)

Let's take a look at each block of the messenger: 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/677/bf972337-56d4-11ee-8e19-fa163e2ff576.png)

**My threads** block shows all chats from external apps. Depending on its status, each chat is placed in a certain group. Currently, there are the following groups: 

1\. **My threads**. In this folder, you can see all opened treads assigned to you.

2\. **Unallocated treads**. This group contains all chats without a manager assigned.

3\. **Other threads**. This group shows chats assigned to other managers.

4\. **Closed threads**. This tab shows all chats that are marked as "Completed". 

> Closed chats can be reopened manually or automatically. If the client texts you again, the chat reopens automatically and is assigned to the same manager as before. 

The **Archive** button takes you to the full list of chats. It's helpful when you need to find chats based on certain filters.

All communication with clients happens in personal chats. Here you can see all communication with the client: messages, managers' replies, and all changes made for this chat (opened, closed, reopened, etc.).

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/677/4de905e1-56d9-11ee-8e19-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the right sidebar, you can see all information related to this chat and client, including:

1\. **Related opportunities and CRM contacts**. When the new chat is created, it automatically creates a new sales opportunity related to this contact. You can edit it later and add more context to the deal. 

You can also create another sales deal from the right-side dashboard. It's useful when a client decides to purchase additional products or services that are not related to the first request.

2\. **Detailed information about the chat**. Start date, last message date, source (bot name), channel (Telegram, Viber, etc.), assignee, follower, and tags.

3\. **Relations with other entities**. Currently, you can link chats to tasks and projects. You can link existing ones or create new ones.

4**. Comments from teammates**. There is just a simple board with comments from you and your teammates. It's a useful tool to make notes about leads and clients.

Quick Actions
-------------

On the upper bar, you can see the list of quick actions. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/677/3a197e65-56e8-11ee-8e19-fa163e2ff576.png)

Each icon has its own action:

1) Close the chat.

2) Search in the message history.

3) Show chat details, enable/disable notifications, assign managers, change followers.

4) Open the information board.

5) Open the chat in the new tab.

6) Close the chat window.

Access Rights
-------------

The Communications has the following access types: 

1) **Administrator**. Can see all chats, manage them, send replies, change assignees and followers, link new chatbots, and integrations. 

2) **Employee**. Can see and manage all chats, send replies, assign managers and followers.

3) **Follower**. Can see only those chats where this user is assigned as the follower. Users with this access type can't manage, close, or open chats, as well as reply to them.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/677/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Integrate Flowlu With Google Calendar

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Calendar](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299--calendar/ "Calendar")
    
4.  How to Integrate Flowlu With Google Calendar

How to Integrate Flowlu With Google Calendar
============================================

* * *

Synchronize your Flowlu calendars with Google and keep all events in one place, wherever you are. You can view Flowlu scheduled meetings and events in the Google Calendar. You can also create new events in Flowlu through the Google Calendar app.  

Synchronization happens automatically. All events created in the Flowlu calendar immediately appear in Google, and vice versa.

1\. To connect Google Calendar, click on the three dots button - Synchronization:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/320/0f666032-be72-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

2\. Select the calendars you want to export to Google Calendar if you have more than one.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/320/4f57193a-be72-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

3\. Sign in to your Google account and give permission to Flowlu for managing Google calendars.

After synchronization, all the calendars and events from Flowlu are exported to Google. And all calendars and events from Google are exported in the Flowlu calendar. Event descriptions and reminders will also be exported. Synced calendars are marked with an appropriate icon.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/320/872b26ab-be72-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Hide Google Calendars
----------------------------

If there are some imported Google calendars that you do not want to be displayed in Flowlu, you can hide them from the list by clicking on three vertical dots:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/320/f56d4ab5-be73-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can enable them back **(1)** or delete them **(2)** at any time on the Personalization page.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/320/b5f2589e-be74-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Going to the Personalization page_

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/320/82485dd4-be74-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Enabling/Disabling the calendars_

How to Disable Sync
-------------------

1\. To disable synchronization with one or more calendars, click on the three dots button - Synchronization in the upper right corner.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/320/de568042-be74-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

2\. Click **Disable Sync** if you want to disconnect all calendars or remove the checkbox next to the calendars you want to disable.

You can sync disabled calendars again at any time.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/320/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Connect Slack to Flowlu

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Integrations](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1476--integrations/ "Integrations")
    
4.  Connect Slack to Flowlu

Connect Slack to Flowlu
=======================

* * *

**Slack** is a business communication platform that allows you to unite your team under one workspace. Its simple interface and multifunctionality will help you to improve communication among team members and facilitate interaction between departments.

Set up the integration of your Flowlu account with Slack workspaces and receive notifications about new tasks, opportunities and projects directly in the messenger.  

### Stage 1. Setting Up Flowlu Accounts

Go to the **Marketplace** section and install Slack app.  
After installing the application, you will see its settings:  

*   "Message" tab allows you to configure various algorithms and conditions for receiving a message in Slack;
*   In "Sign in" tab will be displayed those messenger workspaces that are integrated with your account;
*   "Roles and permissions" and "User Access Settings" tabs allow you to configure access for both a specific group of users and for individual users. The Slack application can only be visible and customizable by administrators.

For setting up integration, you will need to open the appropriate tab and click on the **Connect** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/597/bb054745-804c-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You will be redirected to the Slack site, where you can either log in to an existing workspace or create a new one.  
  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/597/fd87af52-84cb-11ec-bc8b-fa163e2ff576.png)

Next, Flowlu asks for permissions to access the workspace as well and also change the workspace if you have more than one.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/597/d634f2b1-8d96-11ec-bc8b-fa163e2ff576.png)

  
After confirmation, you will automatically go back to the app settings in Flowlu, where you can see what has been integrated from Slack. Under the "Users" tab, the names of users' email addresses will be displayed instead of their nicknames.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/597/97e28b4e-804d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  
  
Check that Flowlu and bot have been added to Slack apps, click **Save** and then proceed directly to setting up messages.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/597/0ba4dae4-84e5-11ec-bc8b-fa163e2ff576.png)

To update your workspace and include new members or new channel names, you can open your integration settings in "Sign in" tab and press the update button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/597/2e27e140-804d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Stage 2. Setting up forwarded messages in Slack  
  

Go to the "Message" tab. Here you can see the list of messages you have created earlier, edit them or create new ones. Click on the "Create a message" button in order to create a new rule.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/597/72139052-804e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  
  
Let's take a closer look at each option.  

*   in the upper right corner you can see message status, “Active” status means that the rule will be executed and, under the appropriate conditions, you will receive a message in Slack. If the status is inactive, then there will be no message;
*   in the "Title" field, you can indicate the name and give a brief description of this message;
*   in the field "Workspace and channel" you can select the workspace and channel / user to which/whom the message will be forwarded;
*   in the "Event" fields, you will need to select appropriate conditions for entities. Currently, conditions are available for tasks, projects and opportunities. The process is the same for each of the entities, a message can be created when:  
     - creating a task, opportunity or project;  
     - deleting a task, opportunity or project;  
     - editing the task, opportunity or project;  
     - adding a comment to a task, opportunity or project;  
     - changing the assignee in the task and opportunity or changing the project manager;  
     - changing the stage of a task, opportunity or project;
*   sender selection. The bot can send a message both under the guise of an application and under the guise of a user (only under the one who set up the integration);
*   it's possible to add an avatar for the bot, which will send a message under the guise of an application. The recommended size is 128x128.
*   the "Message" field contains the message itself that the bot will send. By clicking on the three dots, you can select variables that can substitute a value from a created opportunity or a modified task.   
    

After successful configuration, click **Save** for this rule to come into effect.  
  
The final result will look like this:  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/597/79a5099b-84cf-11ec-bc8b-fa163e2ff576.png)

Or like this, if you select a user as the sender:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/597/9a5f48e1-84cf-11ec-bc8b-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/597/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# How to Integrate Flowlu With Calendly

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Calendar](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299--calendar/ "Calendar")
    
4.  How to Integrate Flowlu With Calendly

How to Integrate Flowlu With Calendly
=====================================

* * *

[Calendly](https://calendly.com/?utm_medium=partner&utm_source=flowlu&utm_campaign=home_page&utm_content=main_inbound_link)
 is a modern meeting scheduling platform that allows you to schedule different kind of events quickly and efficiently.  

Set up the integration of your Flowlu account with Calendly and automatically convert data on scheduled meetings from Calendy into Flowlu events and opportunities.

As soon as the client schedules a meeting on Calendly, it sends this data to Flowlu. The system will automatically create a new event, opportunity and contact / company based on the data received from the client’s response.

> Note: your Calendly account must be on **Standard plan or higher** in order to set up the integration.

How to Set Up Integration with Calendly
---------------------------------------

To create an integration, you need to configure both the Flowlu account and the Calendly account.

### Stage 1. Install the Calendly app

1\. Click your profile picture in the top right corner of your Flowlu screen and select **Apps** in the dropdown menu**.** Scroll down to Integrations section, select the Calendly app and click **Install**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/f0deabf1-ad71-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/229ba26e-ad72-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

2\. Click **Connect Calendly**

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/e37663d7-c3f1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

3\. In the next window set the name for your Calendly token. Do not close this page, as we will get back to it after a new token is created in your Calendly account.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/f8e0cc9f-c3f1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Stage 2. Generate a new token for the integration

1\. Select **Integrations & apps** in the left menu of your Calendly dashboard.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/93d65918-ad74-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

2\. Search for **API and webhooks**

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/db3412b6-ad74-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

3\. Under Personal access tokens, click Get a token now

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/abd94110-ad75-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

4\. In the window that opens, specify the name for your token and click Create Token

  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/3309ca74-275f-11ec-9810-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

5. After you verify the creation of a new token, click Copy token and switch back to your Flowlu account

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/3ffd81f1-ad77-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

  
6\. Paste the token into the Token field and click "Check token" in order to get data about users and all event types in Calendly.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/5dc03129-c3f3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_  
You'll need CRM module access rights in order to use it with Calendly. Please keep this in mind when setting up the integration._  

### Step 3. Configuring the integration

After verification, a new section with the Calendly username and all user's available event types will be displayed. Do not forget to link the Flowlu user with the Calendly user, otherwise Calendly user will be considered inactive. This means that the events of this user will not be created in the calendar, as well as Opportunities, Contacts/Companies.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/1fd6b8b7-c3f4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If event types are unchecked, the system will not take them into account so that Calendar Events, Opportunities, Contacts and Companies will not be created for them.

For each of the selected event types, there are sections for configuring field mapping for an Opportunity, Contact and Organization. They are necessary for the system to identify what data from the scheduled meeting needs to be imported into certain fields of an Opportunity, Contact or Company.

Select a sales pipeline, source, and default tags for each Opportunity. These will be automatically added to Opportunities created from Calendly meetings.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/b952eb20-c3f4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  
  
The name of an Opportunity is not required. If an Opportunity does not have a name, but some of its fields are specified, then an Opportunity will be named as _Event Type_. The rest of the fields can be left blank (not selected). In this case, a Contact or a Company will not be created.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/fbf601ab-c3f4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

After all the settings are configured, click the Save button.

Congratulations! You have successfully set up the integration with Calendly and can automatically create Events, Opportunities and Contacts/Organizations for scheduled events from your Calendly account.   

### **Permissions**

There are two levels of access rights for integration with Calendly: 

*   **Administrator**
*   **Access Denied**

Access rights can be set up in the module settings in the "Apps" section or by clicking the gear button. Only module administrators can set up this integration. 

All opportunities created from Calendly will be displayed in accordance with access rights in the CRM module, not the Calendly integration module.  

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/580/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Attaching Files from Google Drive, OneDrive & Dropbox

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Integrations](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1476--integrations/ "Integrations")
    
4.  Attaching Files from Google Drive, OneDrive & Dropbox

Attaching Files from Google Drive, OneDrive & Dropbox
=====================================================

* * *

Flowlu's integration with Google Drive, OneDrive, and Dropbox allows you to attach files from your cloud storage accounts directly to tasks, projects, and other items. Instead of uploading a copy, Flowlu creates a link to the original file, which helps you save storage space on your portal.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/661/d1a7929d-57f8-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

Key Advantages
--------------

*   **Portal Storage Optimization:** Files are not physically uploaded to the Flowlu server, which helps preserve your portal's disk space.
*   **Direct File Access:** Clicking the link in Flowlu opens the file directly from your cloud storage.
*   **Centralized File Management:** The file is managed and updated in your cloud storage, ensuring the link in Flowlu always points to the most current version.

How to Attach a File from Cloud Storage
---------------------------------------

The process is initiated the first time you attach a file from a cloud service and is similar for Google Drive, Dropbox, and OneDrive.

1.  In any Flowlu item that supports attachments (like a task or project), navigate to the **Files** section and click the **Attach Files** button.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/661/db3e8576-57f8-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)
2.  An overlay window will appear with import options. Select the cloud service you want to use, for example, **Google Drive**.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/661/df869819-57f8-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)
3.  If you are connecting your account for the first time, you will be prompted to authenticate. Click the **Connect to Google Drive** button to proceed.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/661/e6242aa2-57f8-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)
4.  A new "Choose an account" window will open. Select the Google account you wish to link with Flowlu and grant the necessary permissions to continue.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/661/eb0bc68e-57f8-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)
5.  After successfully authenticating, your cloud storage file browser will open. Browse and select the file(s) you wish to attach.
6.  You will be taken to a confirmation screen that lists your selected file(s). The file will be marked with the cloud storage icon. You can click **Add more** to select additional files or click **Upload file** to finalize the attachment.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/661/f39e7ca9-57f8-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)
7.  The file is now successfully attached to your Flowlu item. It will be displayed in the **Files** list with the corresponding cloud storage icon, indicating it is a linked file and not stored on the Flowlu portal.

# Flowlu Help Center | Webhooks

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Integrations](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1476--integrations/ "Integrations")
    
4.  Webhooks

Webhooks
========

* * *

Webhooks are automated messages sent from an app when something happens, such as a task being created or a new contact being added. 

These messages are sent as an HTTP POST request to a unique URL. 

The webhooks let another app to be notified of changes made in Flowlu. For example, you can set up a webhook that will initiate a notification to be pushed to the specific endpoint each time a contact has been updated in your Flowlu account. 

When that request is received on the other end, this will invoke a custom action to automatically happen on another app.

> Flowlu only supports **outgoing webhooks**  
> To learn more about available incoming requests, please explore [Flowlu API](https://flowlu.com/api)

How to create a webhook   

---------------------------

1\. To create a new webhook, go to the **Portal Settings** → **Main Settings** → **Webhooks**. 

2\. Click **Create** in the top right corner.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/569/8f0be04f-6739-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

3\. In the opened window, enter the name (description) of a new webhook. 

4\. Indicate the Endpoint URL.

5\. Select an event which will trigger a webhook. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/569/a4a178b4-6739-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

6\. Check **Active** option to activate the webhook.

> _You can click on a question mark sign to see the list of available fields._

7. Save.

To delete a webhook, click on a record to open its page and select **Delete** in the bottom right corner. 

For more information on how to configure webhooks in Flowlu, see our [Developer Documentation](https://www.flowlu.com/api/)
.   

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/569/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Managing Emails

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Email](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494--email/ "Email")
    
4.  Managing Emails

Managing Emails
===============

* * *

All emails can be found in the **Email app,** you can get there using the icon in the sidebar, or by clicking the email icon at the top of your screen. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/1f967683-c2bb-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you have connected several email accounts, you can quickly switch between them using the tabs above the emails list. The first tab will show emails from all available inboxes.   

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/3a3643a4-c2bd-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Use the button on the right to switch between incoming or outgoing messages. Your **Inbox** shows all of the emails that you’ve received from your contacts, the **Sent** folder is your outbox.  

By default, the latest emails are listed first, but you can change the display order using **Date** column.

In the list of emails, set one or more filters to group emails or to quickly find a specific message. You can filter emails by folder, date, link to an opportunity, contacts and tags. 

> You can learn more about filters [here.](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-461--filters/)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/1ec7c884-c2bf-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

If there is a specific email that you are looking for, you can use the search bar.

To edit data columns displayed in the email list, use the **gear icon** in the top right corner.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/b7408948-c2c0-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click the **sync** button to fetch new emails.

The top-right 3-dot menu opens a dropdown with additional settings for your email account.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/10ff9079-c2c1-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Blocked Addresses 

When you block a sender, messages they send you will automatically go to your Spam folder.

To add a new address, click the **Block Email** button and specify each new address in a separate line.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/0b4a33ee-c37f-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also add a contact to the Blocked Addresses by clicking on the **block** icon next to the email address in your message.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/f7f48253-c37e-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

###   

### Contacts

This tab displays email contacts and associated CRM accounts. Use this tab to edit the email contact, relate it to another CRM account or block it. You will see the renamed email contact when creating a new email and searching for a contact to send it to.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/1ec9ecf1-c37f-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Account Settings

In the settings of an email account, you can change the parameters selected when connecting the account:

*   signature
*   account and sender name
*   sync frequency
*   enable CRM features (such as creating new contacts and opportunities)
*   open and click tracking

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/4c9214c0-c2c1-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

Here you can also configure which folders you want to sync with Flowlu. You can also use filters to show emails from specific folders.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/584f0f48-c2c1-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also set up folder preferences and select a folder of your choice for:

*   sent emails
*   completed emails
*   spam emails  
    

> Note: whether your emails are displayed correctly in the Outbox depends on selecting the appropriate folders for your sent messages.

### Access Management

In Flowlu, you can specify which users can access your emails and set permissions for certain employees, access rights are set up individually for each account connected to the system.

In **Access Management** tab, select users or user roles and set permissions individually for each employee/role to:

*   read emails
*   send emails
*   edit email account and send emails

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/6cb4b378-c2c1-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

###   

### Bulk Actions

You can select multiple emails using bulk edit to use the following actions:  

*   delete
*   mark as read or unread
*   send to spam

You can select several or all messages at once. In the dropdown menu, select the required action from the list.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/77ee4d47-c2c1-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/515/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Estimates

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  Estimates

Estimates
=========

* * *

An estimate is a preliminary evaluation of the products or services planned to be sold to customers.  

**Example**: The project manager needs to estimate the cost of mobile app development. He creates an estimate in Flowlu: indicates what will be done and at which price. Then he sends it to the client for approval. A set of services and costs varies in the process of project approval. After the customer’s approval, the manager converts the estimate into an invoice and sends it to the client for payment.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/251/61a5e2e2-85e5-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Access Settings for Estimates
-----------------------------

All users who have access to the **Finance** application can create estimates. Moreover, in the settings of the application, you can set additional access options. To do this, go to **Portal Settings**  → **Finance** → **Main Settings**. Or you can click on the Gear button, on the Finance module page:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/251/554527ff-85e6-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Here you can prohibit or allow:

● access to a manager to view the estimates created by another employee in the account;

● editing the estimate after sending it to the client via email or after marking it as Sent;

● editing the estimate after converting it to an invoice.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/251/e348362c-85e5-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/251/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [Setting a Custom Estimate Template](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251-252--setting-the-print-form-of-estimate/)
    
*   [How to Create an Estimate](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251-253--how-to-create-an-estimate/)
    
*   [How to Send an Estimate to a Customer](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251-254--how-to-send-an-estimate-to-the-client/)
    
*   [Converting an Estimate Into an Invoice](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251-255--converting-the-estimate/)
    
*   [How to Change the Numbering](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251-390--how-to-change-the-numbering-of-invoices-and-estimates/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Custom Fields

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Custom Fields and Lists](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303--custom-fields-and-lists/ "Custom Fields and Lists")
    
4.  Custom Fields

Custom Fields
=============

* * *

Custom fields are designed for recording any additional data in the following items:

*   projects;
*   Agile projects;
*   tasks;
*   opportunities;
*   companies and contacts;
*   project issues;
*   mind map fields;
*   mind map items;
*   issues (agile projects);
*   knowledge base fields;
*   knowledge base articles;
*   specific knowledge base.  
    

For example, in the opportunity, you can display fields for specifying terms for the customer, discounts, information about the delivery, e.g. address, time, contact phone number, etc. In the task—a field for specifying the cost. In the project—a field for specifying suppliers, contractors or external executors from CRM.

To set up and display the custom fields, you do not need any technical skills. 

1\. Go to the **Portal Settings** → **Custom fields** → **Main Settings** → **General** and select the app or item, for which you need to add the custom field.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/304/82c15691-40a6-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

2\. Click the **Add Field** button:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/304/e0599316-40a6-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

3\. Name your field and choose its [type](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-304-305--types-of-custom-fields/)
. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/304/2a263e62-40a7-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

4\. Save the new field. Then go to its settings, by clicking on its name.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/304/93dedeb3-40a7-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Going to the field settings_

Custom fields can be displayed in the **filter**. Therefore, you are able to create any selections and instantly find the necessary data.

In fact, for all types of custom fields, you can display a filter in the list and search data using it. Click on the field name and go to its settings:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/304/d79c7deb-40a7-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened side panel, activate the corresponding option:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/304/14d387d9-40a8-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

After this, you will see the selected filter field in the list.

If any of the information should be displayed only on the detailed page of the object (project, task, opportunity, CRM account), — deactivate the **Show in list option** in the field settings.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/304/2969d557-40a8-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Information about whether a field is displayed in the list or not can be found in the table of custom fields.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/304/5ff55aca-40a8-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you select the **Field Tooltip** option, you will be able to add an explanation next to the field.

To delete a custom field, check the box next to it and click the **Delete** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/304/cfe0cedb-40a8-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/304/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [Where to Fill Out the Custom Fields](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-304-307--where-to-fill-the-custom-fields/)
    
*   [Types of Custom Fields](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-304-305--types-of-custom-fields/)
    

[Previous Custom Fields and Lists](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303--custom-fields-and-lists/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Onboarding

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  Onboarding

Onboarding
==========

* * *

With Onboarding, you can create step-by-step checklists for your employees or clients invited to your account as external users. It will help you save time in onboarding new hires, as well as quickly train your employees.

Using Onboarding, you can:

*   improve the knowledge of your employees and track teammate performance
*   create your own training courses and monitor the progress
*   create separate training guides for different departments of your company

### Setting Up Onboarding

Go to Marketplace and install the Onboarding app.

The app will appear in the left menu

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/585/d8b6ee55-a445-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

Open the app and click Create Onboarding

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/585/1bff00ec-a446-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

You can add a banner that will be displayed for everone entering the Onboarding.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/585/e4415bdf-a446-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

After adding an image, you can edit CSS for it by clicking the 3-dots button:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/585/d1a92981-5aa3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Stard adding content to the Onboarding by creating a new section:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/585/0f19239c-a447-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

  

Each section can have its own subsection, you can add it right after you finish creating a name for your new Onboarding section.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/585/8eb7bbf4-a447-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

Sections refer to stages of an onboarding, and subsections will become milestones used to simplify monitoring of progress for each stage of onboarding.

For each of the subsections, you can create a list of steps that need to be completed. Describe in details what the step is about and give recommendations. The step can also be duplicated, copied or deleted by clicking on the three dots button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/585/fefe4908-5aa3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can view a full description of a created task by clicking on the blue arrow. To change the order of sections, subsections and steps, click drag the two-stripes button. Use the pencil icon to edit them.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/585/43bc9866-5aa4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Customizing the Onboarding Template

In the Settings section, you can also set the progress type and access type for the onboarding template.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/585/66af9c7e-5aa4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can add onboarding preview that will be displayed if you're given access to more than one onboardings.

Progress type:

*   **By each user**. Onboarding progress is tracked individually for each employee.
*   **By a group of users**. Progress is tracked on a one-for-all basis. If one employee completed the task, then it will be marked as completed for others too.

You can also allow users to turn off Onboarding for their account.

Access type:

*   **All users** - The template is available for all authorized users (internal employees and external users);
*   **Administrators** - only system (account) administrators can see the template;
*   **Internal users** - the template is visible to all internal users, including administrators;
*   **External users** - The template is visible only to external users, that is, clients to whom an invitation was sent to the account;
*   **Customizable for external users -** Access is set for both a specific group of external users and for individual  external users;
*   **Customizable for internal users** - Access is set for both a specific group of users and for individual users.

You can copy the ready-made onboarding template, its exact copy will appear in the list, and if you wish, you can adapt it to an onboarding for another department, thereby saving time on creating and configuring a new template.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/585/70f0c2cc-5aa4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The created step-by-step onboarding will be displayed to employees when they sign in to their account. If several training courses are assigned to the user, they will be displayed as a list.

### Access rights

There are two types of access rights for Onboarding module: **administrator** and **access denied**. The rights are set in the Module settings in the "Applications" section.

The Administrator can create and edit onboarding templates.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/585/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous How to Create a Mind Map](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/369-370--how-to-create-a-mind-map/)

[Next Groups](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/502--workspaces/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Groups

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  Groups

Groups
======

* * *

With Groups, you can create separate workspaces within your Flowlu account that can be used to split company activities/departments/etc. For example, you can divide departments such as development, advertising, sales, support or create a workspace to organize freelancers' work.

The group members will have access to all the necessary data for a particular area of work. All information will be displayed in one place.

In a group, you can configure user access to internal data, which is very convenient for restricting access to confidential information.

### How to Install Groups

The _Groups_ module is optional and not included by default. You can install it in the Apps section:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/502/aa7d7527-89d2-11ee-9772-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click on the _Groups_ app in the list and click **Install**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/502/c63a9d6a-89d2-11ee-9772-fa163e2ff576.png)

After the installation, go to "User Access Settings" tab. Here you can assign access rights to this application. The employees that are not allowed to access this module will not see this module in the main menu. If you set the _Administrator_ access level, the user can create, configure and delete any workspace. The administrator will also see all the created groups (with both shared and restricted access). The users with the _Employee_ permissions can only join the public workspace or the one to which they were invited.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/502/184e0575-89d3-11ee-9772-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/502/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   ﻿[How to Create and Set Up Groups](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/502-503--how-to-create-and-set-up-workspace/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Create a Mind Map

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Mind Maps](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/369--mind-maps/ "Mind Maps")
    
4.  How to Create a Mind Map

How to Create a Mind Map
========================

* * *

To create a mind map, you need to follow only three simple steps.

### Step 1. Install the Mind Maps

Go to the **Apps** section and select the appropriate application:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/ce572b07-98b8-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click the **Install** button.

After installing the application, the window for creating a map opens, and the **Mind maps** section appears on the menu.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/de6e6d12-98ba-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can provide access to this application only to certain employees. You can do this in the **Apps** → **Mind Maps** → **User Access Settings** section or by clicking on the **Gear** button in the upper right corner on Mind Maps page:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/6e97ddef-c4aa-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/2298c41a-c4aa-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

This can also be done in the profile of a specific user.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/61345650-c4ab-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Going to the user profile_

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/8ab3af37-c4ab-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Granting access rights_

### Step 2. Сreating a Map

You can import an already-existing mind map from **XMind 8 Pro**. To do this, go to the **Mind maps** application and click on the appropriate button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/dd3289b9-c4ab-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   To add a new map in Flowlu, click on the **Create** button.
*   In the opened sidebar, enter the map name **(1)** and description **(2)**. If necessary, immediately provide access using the external link **(3)**.
*   Click **Save** or **Enter**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/430bc32f-c4ac-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   Write the key idea or the main issue in the center and **create a branch** using the **Enter** key.
*   **To create a subsection (child node), click on the appropriate section and press Tab key.** Also, a new section and subsection can be created by opening the menu with the right-click button. **To add a sibling section (node), click on the appropriate section and press Enter.** 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/beb26e33-d9d3-11e8-b7da-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

Here you can:

*   change a name, description of a section;
*   add an icon for visualization;
*   determine the priority;
*   reflect the progress;
*   delete a section or subsection.

To quickly change the name of a mind map section, **double–click it with the left mouse button**:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/c666fc73-d9d3-11e8-b7da-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

To quickly open the edit page of the item, **double–click with the left mouse button behind the area with the title**:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/cfb0f20a-d9d3-11e8-b7da-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

Any section can be attached to any subsection, **simply by dragging it to the necessary place**:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/d6e24034-d9d3-11e8-b7da-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

_Dragging the Notes section to the Info section_ 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/33836bf6-d9d4-11e8-b7da-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

_Notes section moved to the Info section_ 

To focus on a specific section of the mind map, you can maximize subsections by clicking on "**+**":

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/3aa80ac2-d9d4-11e8-b7da-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

For each element, you can add a description, comments or files. To do this, click on the necessary element with the right-click button and click the **Edit** button. Alternatively, you can double–click with the left-mouse button behind the area with the element title. In the opened sidebar, fill in all the necessary information and click the **Save** button or the **Enter** key.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/1b07afcc-c4ae-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To add a new sheet for creating additional maps of related topics, click on the "**+**" at the bottom of the page:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/4a355260-d9d4-11e8-b7da-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

To edit the name, description of the mind map or delete it, click on the three dots in the lower right corner:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/51372425-d9d4-11e8-b7da-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

### Step 3. Providing Access for Collaborative Editing

If you want to edit a mind map with coworkers, you need to add collaborators.

To do this, click on the name of the map from the list:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/1b6a2731-c4ad-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

And add collaborators:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/3e0f0097-c4ad-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

After that, they will be able to edit the map. If necessary, you can give access using the external link **(1)** and send it for viewing to any person **(2)**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/d15ffe71-c4ad-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

When the map is created, you can export it and open it in **XMind 8 Pro**. The export button is located to the right of the **Go To Edit** button:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/e62abd22-c4ad-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### How to Proceed to Map Editing

You can go to editing from the mind map list. To do this, you need to point at the name and click on the button with the arrow:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/4d1b5277-c4ae-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Or you can click on the name of the map and go to edit:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/8edc37ec-c4ae-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### How to Delete a Mind Map

To delete a mind map, click on the three dots in the upper right corner of the map page:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/aa3ba415-c4ae-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also delete a map from the general list of the mind maps. The trash can icon will appear when you hover over the map name:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/6669f994-c4ae-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/370/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Overview

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Groups](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/502--workspaces/ "Groups")
    
4.  Overview

Overview
========

* * *

Each workspace may include:

**Feed**. Here you can easily address all members of the workspace and discuss important details. There is also a separate type of messages—announcements. They have a counter, where you can see how many participants have read the message. You can also create a poll from the feed.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/504/7080c09a-5b62-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

**Tasks.** You can sort the list of tasks by assignees and owners. When you create a task in a group, the link to the group is set automatically. If a task is created elsewhere and you want to link it to the group, you can do it manually.

In this section, all group members can see all tasks belonging to the group. Tasks are visible to every member of the group — both in the group’s task list and in all views of the Tasks module.

**![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/504/d47f051a-5b65-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)**

**Projects.** A project created inside this section is automatically linked to this workspace. To link a project created somewhere else, specify the name of the workspace when editing it. In this section, users with the _Employee_ access level see only those projects that they are involved in the _Projects_ module.

**![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/504/7ea7ae9a-5b66-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)**

**Notes**. Here you can store records with important information for all workspace's participants.

**![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/504/ce8970ee-5b66-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)**

**Documents.** This section is available for all members of the workspace.

**![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/504/faf03c84-5b66-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)**

**Users.** This section contains a list of employees who joined this workspace and their contact details.

**![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/504/1a21d2a0-5b67-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)**

**Reports.** They are available only for workspace's administrators. This section includes two charts and a summary table.

The schedule of created and closed tasks reflects the extent to which the workspace team has time to complete the planned tasks.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/504/4d1f8f17-5b67-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The **Time Spent chart** chart shows the ratio of time actually spent on the tasks to the sum of planned hours.

The statistics table displays the workspace results by months:

*   how many tasks have been created;
*   how many tasks have been completed;
*   how much time has been allocated for task execution;
*   how much time was actually spent to complete the tasks.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/504/91bae044-5b67-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/504/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | ﻿How to Create and Set Up Groups

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Groups](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/502--workspaces/ "Groups")
    
4.  ﻿How to Create and Set Up Groups

﻿How to Create and Set Up Groups
================================

* * *

Only the users with the administrator permission can create and configure groups.

To create a new workspace, open the list of workspaces in the menu. Then, click **Create.**

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/503/b86ea3ef-89da-11ee-9772-fa163e2ff576.png)

To create a group, enter a name and click _Save_. You can configure the group by clicking on the three-dot button in the top right corner.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/503/fde691d4-5b61-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The group can be restricted or public. In the public group, any user of your account can enter it. If the access is restricted, only the administrators of the group determine which employees can join it.

The settings and reports are not available to the _employees_ of the group. They also cannot give access to the group to other users. This can only be done by _administrators_ in this group .

If you select to add the Tasks module, you should also define a [task workflow](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-549--custom-task-workflows/)
 for it. 

Users who are not allowed to access the group will not see it in the list of all groups.

Also, in the settings, you can disable sections that you do not need or add the required once. And you can give a group page your own design — an icon and color.

In the settings, the administrator can delete the workspace.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/503/2d855324-5b62-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/503/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Retrospective Template Builder

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Agile Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338--agile-projects/ "Agile Projects")
    
4.  Retrospective Template Builder

Retrospective Template Builder
==============================

* * *

Working according to Agile means running regular retrospectives. Retrospective is a group meeting after the sprint is completed. It mostly runs to discuss aroused issues and problems to avoid them during the next sprint.

The main purpose is to improve team communication in the future. It’s not just a meeting to hang out together, so it differs from team-building activities. Note that a retrospective should be held regularly, after one or two sprints.

Typically, a retrospective is made up of 5 steps:

*   **Step 1: Creating an atmosphere** — comforting the team and setting them up for discussion.
    
*   **Step 2: Collecting the Information** — revision of the previous retrospective, discussion of key events.
    
*   **Step 3: Building of understanding** — the team is defining the most usual problems and looking for their causes
    
*   **Step 4: Developing an action plan** — creating the step-by-step strategy of problem-solving process
    
*   **Step 5: Completion of the retrospective** — short summary. All the team share opinions and impressions of the retrospective.
    

How to Create a Retrospective Template
--------------------------------------

To run a retrospective, you need to have a script for each of 5 stages. You don’t have to spend time searching for the best templates, because we already have pre-made scripts in Flowlu.

In the **Retrospective Template Builder**, you can find cards with a few examples for each stage of the retrospective. All you need to do is to choose one script for one step. With this module, you can make up multiple retrospective scenarios and use them all.

The Retrospective Template Builder will be available after the sprint is completed. Just go to the **Agile project** you want to run a retrospective for, then open the **Project** **Details** page, and select the previous sprint (it has to be completed). 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/626/af2eb289-5907-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click the **Retrospective Template Builder** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/626/b447a712-5907-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The retrospective builder will be open on the sidebar. Use arrows to navigate through the templates.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/626/bae43f65-5907-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can download the retrospective scenario in PDF or print it by clicking the button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/626/bf859954-5907-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Done! Use this scenario to run a retrospective with your team. For this experience to be more helpful, try different templates for each retrospective.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/626/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Epics](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338-348-652--epics/)

[Next Integrations with Agile Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338-1639--integrations-with-agile-projects/)

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

Agile Projects
==============

* * *

With the [Agile](https://www.flowlu.com/features/agile/)
 app, you can manage projects that require addressing constant changes when delivering a product. Usually, such projects include coping with a high degree of uncertainty and turbulence.  

Today, the agile approach is employed in marketing, educational projects, HR, media, legal industries and accounting, and more.

An agile approach to project management is focused on creating maximum value for the consumer, as quickly and as often as possible.

This chapter contains basic information about the Agile Projects app and its structure. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/338/81ea9f09-602a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

**See also:** [What is Agile Project Management and How Flowlu Uses It](https://www.flowlu.com/blog/project-management/what-is-agile-project-management-and-how-flowlu-uses-it/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Tasks

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  Tasks

Tasks
=====

* * *

The **Tasks** module allows you to organize collaborative work, delegate tasks, monitor the progress of your team and deadlines.  

Flowlu task management is designed in such a way that no task will be ever missed out. After the assignee completes the task, the task owner receives a notification. This person can evaluate the work performed: accept it or require changes. You can also track the estimated and actual time for tasks and assess the resources and team performance.

The Tasks module allows multiple views for tasks, including GTD to-do list, Kanban board and a list view for All Tasks. It also includes [Task Templates](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-247--task-templates/)
 section, which stores your team's tasks templates and recurring tasks.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/118/d4a60698-3808-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To-Do List
----------

This section is inspired by David Allen's GTD (Getting Things Done) methodology. Here you can find all the tasks where you're the assignee, owner, or a collaborator. This task view allows you to easily allocate tasks by folders based on their deadlines, relation and assignees. [Learn more](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-413--what-do-the-folders-mean-in-the-tasks-section/)
.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/118/57bc3b98-3809-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Kanban Board
------------

Under Kanban Board tab, you can manage your tasks on a board and instantly see their progress. You can select which board to display depending on the [task workflows](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-549--custom-task-workflows/)
. You can move tasks between stages by simply dragging them. You can also apply filters to show only specific tasks. Click _"Quick Add"_ to quickly add a task to the board. You can also create a new task by clicking on _"Create"_ in the top right corner. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/118/c9039264-380a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In order to see tasks regardless of which workflow they are in, switch to the “Common Kanban” option.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/118/257d2ec2-95c1-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

List View
---------

The list lets you view your own and team's tasks (only for Tasks admins). You can customize the columns, change the sorting and apply filters. This view also allows you to bulk edit or delete the tasks. You can create a new task here by clicking on _"Create"_ in the top right corner. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/118/59e74499-380d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also [import](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-426-432--tasks-import/)
 the tasks from a CSV file by clicking on the _three-dot_ button. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/118/86a42b28-380e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To [export](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-457--how-to-export-data-to-csv/)
 the task to a CSV, click the _export_ button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/118/228cef90-3810-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Task Templates
--------------

This section includes all the [task templates](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-247--task-templates/)
 and [recurring tasks](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-248--how-to-create-recurring-task/)
 added by your team. Here you can easily add new templates. You can also select between displaying only your own templates or all templates at once. You can add a new template by clicking on the _Create_ button. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/118/1019eb98-3811-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Before you start working with the tasks, please make sure to check out the [Tasks settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-414--app-settings/)
.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/118/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Mind Maps

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  Mind Maps

Mind Maps
=========

* * *

**Mind map** is a tool for visual structuring of your ideas and demonstrating the connections between these concepts. It helps you to better analyze, comprehend, recall and generate new information. With the help of the mind maps, you can plan projects and courses, develop business strategies and content plans, run brainstorms, and solve any other creative tasks.

Flowlu mind maps is a convenient tool for teamwork. You can give access to it to your employees **for collaborative map creation, editing, and discussion**. An external link will allow you to share a mind map with any person. For each item on the map, you can add descriptions and comments, record work in progress and priority level, set icons. All this allows you to make your map more visual and meaningful. 

Flowlu mind maps can be uploaded and downloaded from **XMind 8 Pro**, allowing you to use the features of both apps.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/369/09de8a4c-98b8-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/369/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [How to Create a Mind Map](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/369-370--how-to-create-a-mind-map/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Invoices

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  Invoices

Invoices
========

* * *

In Flowlu, you can create invoices in a few seconds and send them to customers for payment directly from your account. The invoice specifies the goods, services, their cost, as well as discounts and taxes.  

You can convert estimates into invoices, issue invoices with a relation to the project, transaction or create them without any link.

Before issuing any invoice, you should:

*   Enter [the data about your organization](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-259--organization-profile-settings/)
     in the Portal Settings, on behalf of which you want to issue invoices. The specified data will be automatically filled out when creating an invoice.
*   [Change the custom template](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-260--setting-the-print-form-of-invoice/)
     of an invoice or create a new custom template if necessary.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/258/aa5686da-810f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/258/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Record the Cash Flow

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  How to Record the Cash Flow

How to Record the Cash Flow
===========================

* * *

In the **Finance** → **Money** tab, you can monitor the cash flow of your business and always be aware of the current performance.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/371/a103b643-881e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Transactions are created on the basis of payments and expenses in the **Finance** application of the **Money** section. One payment or expense can be [split into several transactions](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-371-381-382--how-to-distribute-a-payment-into-multiple-transactions/)
.

In Flowlu the following transactions are available:

*   Income — any inflow money. This may be income from the sales, receiving the loan, investments, etc.
*   Expense — any cost required for something, e.g. rent, salaries, taxes, etc.
*   [Transfer](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-371-381-385--transfer-between-accounts/)
     — money transfer between accounts of the organization;

To start financial accounting, create [organizations](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-259--organization-profile-settings/)
 and bank [accounts](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-371-373--setting-up-bank-accounts-of-the-organization/)
 as well as [financial categories](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-371-372--setting-up-the-financial-categories/)
. Recording of funds using these options will allow you to receive detailed cash flow reports.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/371/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [Finance Categories](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-371-372--setting-up-the-financial-categories/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Stop Email Sync

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Email](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494--email/ "Email")
    
4.  [Setting Up Email Sync](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-512--how-to-set-up-email-sync/ "Setting Up Email Sync")
    
5.  How to Stop Email Sync

How to Stop Email Sync
======================

* * *

To disable email integration, go to the tab with the appropriate account if you have several email accounts connected. Click on the 'three dots' button at the top right corner and navigate to the **Settings**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/514/c213ba8a-b1d4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click on the **Deactivate** option to disable synchronization.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/514/6d206401-b1d5-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You will see a corresponding icon near the disconnected mailboxes.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/514/dc330e13-b1d5-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To delete a mailbox, go to its settings and click **Delete** in the bottom right corner. Please note that you can always re-connect your email account.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/514/fc2270c9-b1d5-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/514/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# CRM

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Mobile App](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487--mobile-app/ "Mobile App")
    
4.  CRM

CRM
===

* * *

Flowlu offers a mobile application that includes a powerful CRM module designed to help you manage customer relationships and sales activities on the go.

With the mobile CRM, you can stay informed about important updates and respond quickly to client inquiries—no matter where you are. It allows you to keep detailed records of contacts and organizations, and manage your sales pipeline efficiently, all from your mobile device.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1488/a395d90b-5262-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

This section explains how to make the most of the CRM features available in the Flowlu mobile app:

*   **Managing Opportunities**: Learn how to track and manage your sales deals from initial contact to final closure.
    
*   **Managing Organizations and Contacts**: Discover how to add, view, and update information about your clients and their companies.
    

  

*   [Managing Organizations and Contacts](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487-1488-1490--managing-organizations-and-contacts/)
    
*   [Managing Opportunities](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487-1488-1489--managing-opportunities/)
    

[Previous AI Voice Task Creation](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487-1504-1705--ai-task-creation/)
