# Flowlu Help Center | Main Features and Settings

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Agile Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338--agile-projects/ "Agile Projects")
    
4.  Main Features and Settings

Main Features and Settings
==========================

* * *

Project
-------

A project is a specific product or service that your team should deliver. This may be a one–time project or ongoing work aimed at improving an existing product.

A project contains a list of user stories and issues. They are produced by your customers, employees, your website visitors and other stakeholders. 

Execution (delivery) of the project is carried out **iteratively** and **incrementally**. It means that it is delivered in parts at regular intervals (sprints). At the same time, each new iteration carries an **increment of the product**—a tangible and valuable outcome for the customer and stakeholders. It can be a new feature that can be already used, or a prototype and so on.

Project Fields:
---------------

*   Title **(1)**—contains the name of your product or the purpose of the project.
*   Project prefix **(2)** (or the project key) is a character–letter code that will be assigned to each issue, which allows you to identify which project it belongs to.

> Please note that: This field must be unique—there cannot be 2 projects with the same key.

*   Description **(3)**—contains the basic information about the Project.
*   [Workflow](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338-339-346--setting-the-workflow/)
     **(4)**—a set of stages that the issue goes through in your project before being considered complete. 
*   Project Lead **(5)** or Product Owner— a person who manages and priortizes the issues (backlog of the product).
*   The project team **(6)** are employees of your company who will work on the issues and deliver the product to the customers.
*   Issue types **(7)** are the building blocks of any project. An issue can be a story, a bug, a task, a request. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/339/f15017da-602a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Issue Types
-----------

An issue is a specific requirement for the product that should be performed (or should not, depending on the Project lead decision).

There are different types of issues. By default, the following types are available in the system:

*   Story (the user story) is a requirement for a product or service answering the question: "Someone needs something for something."

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/339/af2e6f27-640f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   Task – measured and final target. It can be the internal tasks of the team, which is purely technical, not having any direct value for the customer.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/339/262b2d55-6410-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   Bug – an error, remark on the product, which must be eliminated. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/339/9affa84a-640f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   Request – a formal request from a user for something to be provided. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/339/a5386fbd-640f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Issue Fields

*   Type — field for selecting a type of issue;
*   Title — a brief summary of the essence of the issue;
*   Priority — reflects the importance, urgency of an issue for the customer and product;
    *   **Low** — if the issue is not performed, nothing bad will happen, the business will not be harmed;
    *   **Average** — issue must be performed. It is set by default, its completion or non–completion affects the product and the business as a whole, but it does not have any urgency;
    *   **High** — issue must be completed soon. Ignoring the tasks in this status will lead to significant consequences for the business, or will lower customer loyalty. You can increase the priority to a high level, for example, when several clients repeatedly refer to the same bug;
    *   **Critical** — applies mainly to bugs. The task with this priority should be completed as soon as possible, as it is of critical importance for the project, and can significantly affect the project if it is ignored. Such tasks should be included in the current iteration, even if work on it is already underway.
    *   **Blocker** — the highest priority, bug or error that must be eliminated immediately, otherwise the consequences will be catastrophic.
*   Estimation — a numerical expression in conventional units (story points, parrots, human–days, etc.) of the effort required to accomplish this task. On the basis of this number, the owner of the product understands what will be the cost of implementing this task for the team. We recommend using the following ratio: **1 story point is 4 working hours.**
*   Assignee — a member of the team who will perform this issue;
*   Description — detailed description of issue or error, how it should be performed or reproduced, can contain photos, videos, screenshots, files;
*   Category — summarizes several requirements into one large block. For example, the main page of the website, the database, etc.
*   Sprint — an iteration, the time period in which this issue will be performed.
*   Tags — keywords that will help you to find and understand the context of the given issue faster.
*   Links — connections of this issue with others. Links can be **one–way** (clone, duplicate) or **two–way**, when task # 1 **blocks** task # 2. Accordingly, task # 2 **is blocked** by task # 1.

For example, you can not sign up on the website until you start the browser, so the registration task on the website is blocked by the task of launching the browser, and the task of launching the browser blocks the registration on the website. Links will help to build relationships between tasks and their relationship to each other. You can specify arbitrary links in the module settings.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/339/3b88a5bd-6411-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Workflow
--------

[Workflow](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338-339-346--setting-the-workflow/)
 is the sequence of stages that the task in your project goes through before it is considered to be completed. The stages are displayed on the Agile board in the form of columns.

A set of stages in the Standard Workflow:

*   To do—what needs to be done;
*   In workflow—the task is being performed;
*   Done—the task is completed by the performer, but verification or testing is needed;
*   Accepted—the task is completed, the function is ready to use;

A set of stages in the Simplified workflow:

*   To do.
*   In progress.
*   Done.

Stage Statuses
--------------

There are the global statuses which are set in Flowlu by default and assigned to each stage. The statuses have different colour coding, which, respectively, are linked to the stages. Colour bars allow you to quickly assess the progress of work since there can be a lot of stages, but the number of statuses is always unchanged.

There are 4 global statuses in Flowlu:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/339/3a2e8074-6412-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   To do—the blue colour-coding. It corresponds to all the stages, at which the work on the task is not being performed at the given moment;
*   In process—yellow colour coding. It corresponds to all stages where work is being performed on the task;
*   Awaiting approval—purple colour coding. It corresponds to the stages of waiting for verification, testing, etc.;
*   Done—green colour coding. At the stage with this status, the task is considered completed. We do not recommend creating more than one stage with this status.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/339/7f6d70fe-6412-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Global statuses in backlog_  

Category
--------

This is an entity that summarizes a group of issues. Allows you to categorize issues in the project according to certain characteristics and belongings.

Product Backlog
---------------

List of requirements for the project (product). The requirements are in accordance with the priority of their implementation. The backlog should be regularly reviewed re-evaluated by the product owner and the team.

Sprint
------

This is the main Scrum working tool along with the issues. It is an iteration of the delivery part of your project (product increment), which has clear time and scope limits (depends on the team's efficiency and performance). In the principles of Scrum, the sprint has a duration of 2 to 4 weeks, and its deadline cannot be changed after it starts.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/339/46d380c7-6413-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/339/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# My Team

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Mobile App](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487--mobile-app/ "Mobile App")
    
4.  My Team

My Team
=======

* * *

The My Team module in the Flowlu mobile app is your central hub for managing personnel, controlling access permissions, and tracking employee availability. It provides all the essential tools to keep your team organized and informed while on the go.

The module is organized into three main sections: Team, Time off management, and User roles.

Team
----

The Team section serves as your company's digital directory. Here, you can view a complete list of all users in your portal, access their detailed profiles to find contact information or see their online status, and invite new members to join your organization directly from the app.

User Roles
----------

The User roles section is where you control what different users can see and do within Flowlu. You can use it to review existing roles (like Administrator or Employee), configure their access permissions for various modules, and assign team members to the appropriate roles, ensuring everyone has the right level of access.  

Time Off Management
-------------------

Use the Time off management section to track all employee absences, including vacations, sick days, and other types of leave. This feature allows you to view a log of all past, current, and upcoming time off, as well as add new absence records for any team member, giving you a clear overview of team availability.  

  

*   [Team & User Roles](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487-1629-1631--team-user-roles/)
    
*   [Time Off Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487-1629-1630--time-off-management/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Finance

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

3.  Finance

Finance
=======

* * *

With the **Finance** app you can:

*   create estimates, send them to customers for a review, convert them into invoices, accept online payments or record payments manually;
*   manage revenue and expenses including those that are linked to invoices and projects;
*   allocate the cash flow into financial categories: office rent, salaries, product sales revenues, investments, etc.
*   manage cash flow and invoices of several organizations in one single place;
*   use reports to track the revenue and expenses.

This chapter contains guidelines for working with estimates, invoices, transactions and financial reports.

_Company Revenue and Expenses (left)_

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/250/e52b4277-810e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

___Revenues and costs by financial categories__ (right)  
_

# Flowlu Help Center | Project: Overview

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126--projects/ "Projects")
    
4.  Project: Overview

Project: Overview
=================

* * *

In Flowlu, you can comprehensively manage the projects, from coordinating the work of the team to monitoring profitability. All data is recorded and available in one place—in the project card. In this article, you're going to find out more about the purpose of each project section.  

Main Section
------------

The widgets help you to keep track of the following:

*   the number of payments and expenses, as well as the percentage of payments received;
*   the amount of planned and actual time spent, as well as the percentage of spent time resources.

If you do not need to record the time spent on tasks, you can disable this option in the settings of the Tasks app. In this case, only the number of planned and completed tasks will be displayed in the widget:

*   the remaining number of days before the project deadline;
*   the progress of work performed: current project stage is completed milestones;

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/fe6f541d-c89e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   custom fields;
*   you can change the project manager, customer, set a project deadline by clicking on the field with the date;

Additionally, on this page you can:

*   add all main items—invoices, tasks, events, and invoices;
*   move the project to the next stage;
*   record payments and expenses;
*   change milestones and fill in the information on them (report, description, attach files)
*   create a chat if it wasn't created during the project creation.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/3d47adb2-c89f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

Tasks
-----

This section is designed to manage project collaboration. When you add tasks to a project, they become available to all project participants. The project team will see a stage of each task, assignees and the deadline.

Tasks have several views and can be displayed as:

*   cards on the Kanban board.
*   task list.
*   the lists sorted by an assignee.
*   Gantt chart.

Here you can switch the task list view:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/248464a5-c8a0-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Task Board
----------

**The task board** is one of the most useful tools for planning and tracking the planned and completed project tasks. All tasks on the board are presented as cards.

You can:

*   move task cards between stages and see what has been already completed or what is to be done;
*   move the highest priority tasks to the top—this will help you to identify which ones need to be performed first.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/40f995c8-c8a0-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

> **Please note:** When transferring a task to the _In progress_ column, the time tracker does not start automatically, because the task can be performed in several steps. To start the timer, you need to click the _Start_ button in the sidebar. At the stage _Done_, there are tasks completed, but not accepted by the task owner. Only the task owner can transfer these tasks to the _Completed_ _tasks_ column after checking them.

On the board, you can instantly add a task, immediately specifying the description and the person responsible:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/5dfc77c5-c8a0-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The _Assignee_ filter hides the tasks that certain employees do not have to deal with (they are not an owner, or responsible).

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/80187767-c8a0-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

**In each task card, the important information is displayed:**

*   **priority**, as a colored arrow on the task ticket:

turquoise—low priority;

no arrow—medium;

red—high.

**![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/aab91cba-4f82-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)**

*   **planned and actual time**, which makes it easy to control time costs and notice deviations in time;
*   **deadline date**. A date on the card notifies about an overdue date;
*   **an owner and an assignee**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/74a6cab3-4f83-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The total time spent on a project by an employee can be viewed in the task list table.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/c1eee0eb-c8a0-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Task Grouping by the Project Stages
-----------------------------------

In the task board, you can enable grouping of the tasks by stages of the project. There are several options for grouping tasks:

*   for all stages of the project, even if not all stages have tasks;

*   only for those stages that have tasks;

*   without grouping.

You can switch the grouping mode by clicking the _Settings_ button on the project task board.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/f5698caf-c8a0-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Select "**Project Stage**" to enable task grouping. If you need to see all the stages of the project, including those that do not have any tasks, check the box "**Show empty sections**".

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/0843fb30-4f85-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Select "**Do not group**" if you do not plan to use the grouping.

Finance
-------

This section allows you to plan project income and expenses, issue invoices, record the actual payments and track the project profitability.

Read more about all the features of this section in the article on [managing project finances](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-391--managing-the-project-finances/)
.

Team
----

Add your co-workers to the project. This will allow all participants to work in a single workspace: see and add tasks, events, notes, comments, documents, project progress (completed stages and milestones).

To add participants, click on the appropriate button:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/12892d79-c8a1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened window, select the participants and click **Save**:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/3803e40c-c8a1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[About project access rights](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-249--access-rights-in-the-projects/)
.

Events
------

This section contains all the project events—past and planned. Here you can complete events and add new ones. To quickly create a new event, use the hotkeys.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/4c6b404b-c8a1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Work Structure 
---------------

This section allows you to track the work performed by the project — stages, milestones and tasks.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/6ea8d0cf-c8a1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To add a stage, click on the blue 'plus' button to the bottom of the project stage. Clicking 'three dot' button will open a menu to export the work structure to CSV or create MS Word report.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/98d2b7b8-c8a1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   Milestones are added to a certain stage using the "+Milestone" button.
*   Tasks for a stage are added by clicking on the "+Task" button.
*   To change the order of milestones, use drag and drop. 
*   To edit a stage, use the 'pencil' icon.
*   To delete a stage, click on the 'recycle bin' icon.
*   Click on a milestone or a task to edit them. 

To change the order of milestones, use drag and drop. Click on the recycle bin to delete a milestone. To mark a milestone as completed, mark the checkbox next to its name. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/c702ca20-c8a1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can create tasks in a project that are not linked to a milestone. The tasks related to the stage are displayed under all milestones at the end of each stage.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/f566a791-c8a1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Please note: In a custom project, you can add milestones, stages, and tasks. In a workflow project, only milestones and tasks are available for adding.

Each report is displayed under each milestone. Click on the milestone to fill in the report. In the Milestones record, you may edit the report, add tasks related to a milestone, attach files, leave comments, and see full information about the milestone.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/4f4162e2-c8a2-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Progress reports can be filled in only by the project manager and the milestone assignee.   
  
The completed stage is marked with a double check mark. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/fbbd95b6-4f92-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The current stage is marked with a purple color.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/15400a8b-4f93-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Notes  

--------

Add all project notes are located in one place. This may be, for example, recommendations that can be taken into account in the project implementation.

Enter the text of the note in the window to add it and click the **Create** button:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/7b358301-c8a2-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

When adding or editing a note, you can format it. Highlight the text of the note and you will see a panel for formatting:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/cba0cd96-4f93-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Using the editor will help you to make the notes clearer.

Issues
------

This section contains customer issues and suggestions, which arise in the course of the project implementation. After adding a issue, you can track the progress of its execution.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/665d0c99-c8a3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Files
-----

Each team member can view project documents as well as add his own. For convenience, you can distribute documents of the same type in different folders.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/ebece18e-c8a3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The documents can be displayed in the Tile or List view.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/197cb0ce-c8a4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

When you click on a document, there is additional information on this document displayed in the window on the right:

*   size and type of file;
*   by whom and when created;
*   by whom and when changed;
*   you can also view or download this file.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/e089ff56-c8a6-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Lists
-----

This section is not displayed by default. It needs to be set up through the List application.

Find out more: [How to install Lists application](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-308--installing-and-setting-the-record-lists-app/)
.

A section is a set of columns that can be fully customized by a user. They can be used to create a list of contractors or suppliers, maintain a record of contracts, incoming and sent correspondence.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/b87975bc-7db9-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/55c0baa1-7da1-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.gif)

> **Note that:** For the convenience of working with the project, customize the order in which the internal and external tabs are displayed. Just drag the tabs to another place, both main and internal ones.

Chat 
-----

Each project has an individual chat and includes all the team members, as well as the project manager. When you add a new user to the project team, he will automatically join the project discussion. If you didn't create a chat during the project creation, you can still create a chat after it by clicking on the following button:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/7edb765d-c8a9-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/412/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Agile Method: Core Principles

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Agile Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338--agile-projects/ "Agile Projects")
    
4.  Agile Method: Core Principles

Agile Method: Core Principles
=============================

* * *

Agile is a **system of project management principles**. It encompasses various methodologies and practices, but they all share a common foundation. Agile principles simplify the creation of complex projects. They help teams deliver product value to the customer in parts, on time.

The Agile approach recognizes that priorities and goals may change during the course of a project. The team regularly reviews the work done and analyzes the situation. If necessary, priorities are adjusted. That’s why this way of working is called “flexible.”

Agile is based on teamwork. Employees are given more authority, along with increased responsibility. This boosts their motivation, allows for professional growth, and enables them to solve tasks quickly.

Another important component of Agile is feedback. It can come from team members to each other or from the client to the team. This feedback helps the team learn and improve the product.

**Main Advantages of Working with Agile**
-----------------------------------------

### **Continuous contact with clients and stakeholders**

Some project management approaches involve contact with the client only at the beginning and end of the project—during the task acceptance or technical specification phase, and upon delivery of the result. If the client’s requirements were unclear or changed later, the project team may not find out until the very end.

In Agile, contact with the client is continuous throughout the entire process. Delivering the results of each iteration ensures that the team's actions are correct and that the final product fully meets the client’s expectations.

### **Flexibility and adaptation to change**

A client may inform the team mid-project that the scope of work has changed. What to do in this case? In traditional project management, this can impact cost and deadlines or even make changes impossible. In Agile, changes are implemented with minimal effort, regardless of the stage of work.

### **Continuous product development**

Daily meetings positively impact creativity and the generation of new ideas. Agile supports a “meritocracy of ideas” — the best idea wins, regardless of who proposed it. The project team, stakeholders, and the client can collaboratively determine the product’s features and characteristics.

### **Risk minimization**

As mentioned, the project is not only shown to the client at the beginning and end. Therefore, all errors and risks can be identified before the project is completed. This allows for quick fixes without extending the timeline. After all, the later an error is discovered, the harder it is to fix.  

  

*   [Agile Principles](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338-1637-1640--agile-principles/)
    
*   [Who is Agile for, and how to implement it?](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338-1637-1641--who-is-agile-for/)
    
*   [Scrum: Key Points](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338-1637-1642--scrum-key-points/)
    
*   [Sprints in Scrum](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338-1637-1645--sprints-in-scrum/)
    
*   [Kanban method](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338-1637-1652--kanban-method/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Scrum Project Management

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Agile Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338--agile-projects/ "Agile Projects")
    
4.  Scrum Project Management

Scrum Project Management
========================

* * *

The principles of Scrum are aimed at helping your team to create the product/service of the highest value in short time. The product is created here in the form of a series of fixed time iterations.

This approach allows you to split one big project into several small ones, which in Scrum are called sprints. Thus, the project management process will become simpler and more transparent. Also, you will have the opportunity to constantly adjust the work plan, thanks to feedback from customers or your product users.

The Scrum practices are used today not only in the IT field but also in the marketing and educational projects, in recruiting, media, construction and legal companies when launching a new product on the market and many other projects.

In Flowlu, the following tools are available for organizing the teamwork with Scrum:

*   visual and structured [**backlog**](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338-348-350--filling-the-backlog/)
     for collecting the user stories, issues and tasks;
*   **[sprint](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338-348-353--sprint-planning/)** planning;
*   **Kanban board** for tracking progress;
*   **[burndown chart](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/338-348-353-358--burndown-chart/)
    ** for monitoring the working speed of the team.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/348/7cc3b2b6-64d8-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Project backlog_

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/348/a3e08e0a-ea40-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Kanban board_

Kanban Board
------------

All the users who started to use Flowlu before the release of a new version of the Kanban board (05.02.2023) are able to switch between the old and the new versions.

Click the **_three-dot button_** on the top right corner of the Kanban board you want to change and go to the Board Settings.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/348/3ae16f94-ea5a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If the "**Use an old board**" option is enabled, you’ll switch to the previous version without advanced sorting, groping, or Kanban card settings.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/348/4ef6624f-ea5a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If not, your default Kanban board is a redesigned one. In the board settings, you can also change the appearance of Kanban cards. 

You can show or hide the following information:  

*   Description
    
*   Estimates
    
*   Reporter
    
*   Checklist
    
*   Category
    
*   Assignee
    
*   Issue Type
    
*   Subtasks
    
*   Images
    

> Note that settings are applied only to the visual appearance of cards on the board and don’t affect the detailed page of a card. 

The redesigned Kanban board has the following organizing tools:  

*   Sorting
    
*   Grouping
    

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/348/6127129a-ea5a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Sorting

By default, tasks are sorted by stage. You can also use the following options to sort tasks or issues:  

*   Name
    
*   Assignee
    
*   Priority
    
*   Last Modified
    
*   Creation Date
    

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/348/819d9d6a-ea5b-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Grouping

In the Agile module, you can also organize cards on the Kanban board by groups. By default, they’re grouped by stages. You can also group them by using the following options:  

*   Assignee
    
*   Priority
    
*   Type
    
*   Category
    
*   Epic
    

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/348/0dae5dac-ea5b-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Also, there is an option to split them by epics and parental issues.

You can also set up limits for your Kanban board to avoid overloads. For example, only 5 tasks for the "In Progress" column. To do that, go to the specific **Agile project → Board**. Then click the _three-dot button →_ board settings and set up limits for each stage.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/348/b430f4f1-7c7a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/348/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Recurring Tasks

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Tasks](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118--tasks/ "Tasks")
    
4.  Recurring Tasks

Recurring Tasks
===============

* * *

With the recurring tasks, you can eliminate doing manual, repetitive tasks and concentrate on more meaningful tasks. Recurring tasks are created automatically according to the schedule that you specify. Each assignee, owner, collaborator will receive notifications about new tasks.

This feature is essential in tracking the performance of tasks, e.g., preparing a monthly report on the last Friday of the month, reviewing documentation every Tuesday and so on.

In order for tasks to be repeated automatically at a specific time, turn on **Make Recurring** option on the page **Other**. You can do this when creating/editing a task or a task template.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/248/02a8622e-3a3a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

For a recurring task, you can set up the mode and the recurrence interval, the task creation time, the total period during which you want the task to be repeated.

*   **Recurrence interval**. Available modes: Daily, Weekly, Weekday, Monthly, Annually![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/248/676d6d77-3a3a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)
*   **Recurrence interval**. If you set a recurrence interval of 2 days for the Daily mode, then the task will be created in a day. To create a task daily, set the interval to 1 day.

For the Weekly mode, you can select one or several days of the week. For example, you can set the task to be created every Tuesday and Thursday every second week.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/248/a071026c-3a3a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also set an automatic task creation only on weekdays.

For the Monthly mode, the recurrence interval is set in months. Set “1” if the task needs to be repeated every month or “2” if you want it to be repeated in a month. After that, select the calendar day of the month.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/248/c5081328-3a3a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

For the Annually mode, a certain calendar day needs to be selected.

*   **Task creation time**. Determine the exact time for task creation. At this time, notifications about the new task will be sent to all participants.

*   **Task ending time**. Specify the time period during which you want the task to recur. You can specify how many times you need to repeat the task by selecting the option **After** in the **Ends** field:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/248/0b554559-3a3b-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Or, specify a date till which the system will create a recurring task:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/248/2d49c790-3a3b-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can skip specifying the _End date_ by selecting **Never** in this field. You can set the end date or delete the task at any time by going to the recurring task template.

If the recurrence parameters were set up when creating or editing a task, you will see a notification that a template will be created based on this task:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/248/4dba0595-3a3b-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Save the recurring task. Now it will be created according to the parameters specified by you.  

At any time, you can edit them, change the recurrence settings, or delete them.

Notifications about the automatic task creation will be sent to all participants: the owner, the assignee, the collaborator.

All template tasks will be displayed on the template page on the Tasks tab. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/248/4f573f5f-3a3c-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Editing the Recurrence Settings
-------------------------------

You can modify the recurrence settings in the task template.

After open the task template page, click on the **Edit** button:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/248/6171c86b-3a3d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the editing window, go to the page **Other** and click **Edit Recurrence options** link:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/248/a866130c-3a3d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

After changing or deleting the template, all the parameters of previously created template tasks will be saved.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/248/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Task Templates](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-247--task-templates/)

[Next Import Tasks](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-432--tasks-import/)

# Mobile App

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  Mobile App

Mobile App
==========

* * *

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1487/1c00461e-55aa-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

With the [Flowlu mobile app](https://www.flowlu.com/mobile/)
, you can run your entire business from anywhere. It provides a comprehensive suite of tools to manage customer relationships, oversee projects, track tasks, and keep your finances in check, all from your iOS or Android device.

To get started, you can learn the basics of **navigating the app**, from the main menu to the customizable bottom bar. You can tailor the navigation to fit your workflow by adding your most-used modules for one-tap access. For even faster data entry, the app includes **Quick Actions**, allowing you to create new tasks, opportunities, or projects in seconds without navigating away from your current screen.

Make the app your own by **customizing the interface and settings**. You can create personalized home screens with widgets that display your most critical information at a glance, like active opportunities or project statuses. You can also configure your personal profile, manage notification preferences, and choose a visual theme that suits you.

Manage your entire sales pipeline with the powerful **mobile CRM**. You can track and update opportunities through every stage, from initial contact to closing the deal. All your client information is at your fingertips, allowing you to view, add, or edit details about your contacts and organizations from anywhere.

Keep your team aligned and your work on track with comprehensive **project and task management** tools. You can oversee project progress, manage tasks, and collaborate with team members, ensuring that assignments are clear and deadlines are met, no matter where you are.

The **Finance module** allows you to handle key financial operations directly from your device. You can create and send professional invoices and estimates, track their payment status, and record all money transactions, including income and expenses. The app also supports managing imprest funds, giving you a complete overview of cash advances to employees.

# How to Connect WhatsApp and WhatsApp Business

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Communications](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676--interactions/ "Communications")
    
4.  [How to Connect Messengers](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676-677--how-to-connect-messengers/ "How to Connect Messengers")
    
5.  How to Connect WhatsApp and WhatsApp Business

How to Connect WhatsApp and WhatsApp Business
=============================================

* * *

WhatsApp integration allows you to receive and manage WhatsApp chats via Flowlu. As with other integrations with messengers, you can automatically create CRM opportunities related to each chat and quickly access all CRM details via the chat sidebar.  

Creating a Wazzup Account and Linking it to WhatsApp
----------------------------------------------------

To set up the WhatsApp integration, you need to create a [Wazzup](https://wazzup24.com/?utm_p=exXtt9)
 account first. To create the Wazzup account, you need to fill out the email address and phone number.

> **Wazzup** is the integration service for connecting CRM systems and messengers.  
>   
> [Sign up to Wazzup using this link and get a $10 deposit on your account](https://wazzup24.com/?utm_p=exXtt9)
> .

Once the account is created, go to the **Channels** tab on your dashboard.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/688/7b71c7b2-b51a-11ee-a0a4-fa163e2ff576.png)

Сlick **WhatsApp** or **WhatsApp Business**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/688/b1a6f9f2-b51a-11ee-a0a4-fa163e2ff576.png)

Follow the step-by-step guide to connect WhatsApp.

> Note that if you're connecting WhatsApp Business, you'll also need to go through Facebook (Meta Business) verification.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/688/aafeed40-b51b-11ee-a0a4-fa163e2ff576.png)

Once the connection is set, you'll see your phone number in the list of channels.

> When creating a Wazzup account, you receive a **3-day free trial**. Since the 3-day trial period is over, you'll need to purchase one of [Wazzup subscription plans](https://wazzup24.com/help/payment-en/price-plans-en/?_gl=1*19jie88*_ga*NzIwMDYxNjY1LjE3MDUzMjIyMzU.*_ga_7X6RZSKPXF*MTcwNTQ4NDEwOC4yLjAuMTcwNTQ4NDEwOC4wLjAuMA..*_gcl_au*MTQyMDMzOTkwMC4xNzA1MzIyMjM1)
>  to keep using the WhatsApp integration.

Now, you need to connect WhatsApp to your Flowlu CRM module. To do that, go to the **Integration with CRM** tab and click **Flowlu**. 

You'll see the following window:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/688/76e83529-b51c-11ee-a0a4-fa163e2ff576.png)

First, you'll need to paste the unique link that you'll receive by following the next step.

Connecting Flowlu to Wazzup
---------------------------

To receive the unique connection link, go to the Communications module in Flowlu and click the **Connect** button.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/688/23fe3c5a-ef61-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.jpg)

Then, pick the WhatsApp option and copy the link.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/688/33e3b807-b51d-11ee-a0a4-fa163e2ff576.png)

Paste the link to Wazzup, give permissions to access Flowlu, and click the **Add** button.

Integration is ready to work! After setting the connection, you can change the settings of this integration in your Flowlu account. For example, set the manager's queue or pick the CRM pipeline to which all chats will be taken as new sales opportunities. 

Disabling Automatic Opportunity Creation in the Communications Module
---------------------------------------------------------------------

In the Connected Channels settings, you can now choose not to specify a Pipeline for a particular chatbot or integration. When the Pipeline field is "Not set", the system will deliver new messages directly to your built-in messenger without automatically generating a new Opportunity. This feature is ideal for handling general inquiries or support requests that do not require an immediate sales record, helping you keep your CRM clean and focused only on qualified leads.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/688/713be306-07d5-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/688/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [How to Text from Flowlu to WhatsApp](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676-677-688-689--how-to-text-from-flowlu-to-whatsapp/)

# Custom Fields in the Organizational Structure

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Organizational Structure](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705--organizational-structure/ "Organizational Structure")
    
4.  Custom Fields in the Organizational Structure

Custom Fields in the Organizational Structure
=============================================

* * *

Each block can contain custom fields with any information. By default, there is only one field - Product. We recommend using it to understand the final goal of each department or division. It helps to quickly understand what kind of result is expected from these employees.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/709/91a40a9b-2323-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Custom fields can be displayed even in the structure. All you need to do is to turn on the “display in structure” field while creating or editing the block.

This way, the custom field will be displayed in the company structure.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/709/a0338c2f-2323-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

### Setting of Custom Fields

To add new custom field to the company structure, click the gear icon in the module.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/709/b9a4cc6c-2323-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Go to the Custom Fields tab and click the Add Field button.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/709/e274c1b3-2323-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened window, you can fill in the name of the custom field and select its type.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/709/02b7d381-2324-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the “Custom Field” tab you can also:  

1.  Delete the field
    
2.  Set activity
    
3.  Set the display in the list
    

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/709/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Unassigned Employees](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705-708--unassigned-employees/)

[Next Types of Organizational Structure Display](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705-710--types-of-organizational-structure-display/)

# Merge Opportunities

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322--crm/ "CRM")
    
4.  [Opportunities](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323--opportunities/ "Opportunities")
    
5.  Merge Opportunities

Merge Opportunities
===================

* * *

If you communicate with clients via different sources, such as messengers, social media channels, telephony, and email, it commonly happens that some sales deals are duplicating. To prevent miscommunications with your clients, you can merge several sales opportunities into one record.

How to Merge CRM Duplicates
---------------------------

To merge duplicates of sales opportunities, go to the CRM module → Opportunities → List view.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/699/e869500a-ceec-11ee-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

To find duplicates, you can apply filters, for example, a "Name" filter.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/699/914d6a8a-ceed-11ee-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

When duplicates are found, fill in checkmarks next to them, and click the **Merge** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/699/d26110a1-ceed-11ee-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened window, you should pick a parental sales opportunity. Others will be merged with the parental one and removed thereafter. Then click the **Start** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/699/4a627d19-ceef-11ee-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Done! The merge process is automated, and you don't need to perform any additional actions. Once the merging is done, you'll see the parental CRM opportunity with the updated information.

  

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/699/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Link Products to Opportunities](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323-655--how-to-link-products-to-opportunities/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Record Lists

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Custom Fields and Lists](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303--custom-fields-and-lists/ "Custom Fields and Lists")
    
4.  Record Lists

Record Lists
============

* * *

The Record List app allows you to create your own lists (tables) to record important information and quickly find the necessary data using filters and sorting.

Create lists for managing any types of data — proposals, suppliers, equipment, agreements, access to the websites and services, etc.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/308/1c17f85d-40b2-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Link custom list records with CRM accounts and projects. In this case, they will be displayed on their pages.  

For each list, you can open access to certain employees, allow them to edit or only to view the lists.

How to set up the Record Lists
------------------------------

Only the portal administrators can install the Record Lists app. Go to the **Marketplace** and select **Record Lists** in Apps.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/308/64bac0b7-40b2-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click to it and install this application:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/308/1211d2d2-40b3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can give access rights to the lists to employees in two stages: at the application level and at the specific list level.

To set access rights at the application level, go to the **Apps → Record Lists** section. In the **Users and Roles** tab, assign **Administrators** and **Employees**. Administrators will get access to all lists and will be able to create their own. Employees will see only those lists to which they will have access. They will not be able to create their own lists. Additionally, you can deny access to the application.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/308/ed0bd5f5-40b3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Now you can [create the record list](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-308-309--creating-the-list/)
.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/308/b073b0a7-40b4-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_**See also:** [How to Use Custom Fields and Lists to Improve Your Data Management](https://www.flowlu.com/blog/flowlu-tips/how-to-use-custom-fields-and-lists-to-improve-your-data-management/)
_

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/308/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [How to Create a Record List](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-308-309--creating-the-list/)
    
*   [How to Populate a Record List](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-308-310--how-to-add-an-entry-to-the-list/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Edit your User Profile

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Working in Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474--working-in-flowlu/ "Working in Flowlu")
    
4.  Edit your User Profile

Edit your User Profile
======================

* * *

After signing up, you can fill in your profile and add a personal photo. To do this, click on your profile photo in the top right corner.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/239/91996172-6722-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Here are the following options:

*   to go to the profile settings where you can fill in or update your information and set up notifications;
*   to change your account, if you have several ones in Flowlu;
*   to access My Subscription, Personalization, User Management, Marketplace and System Settings;
*   to log out.

To fill in your profile, click **My Profile** button. Here you can find the tabs for the profile settings.  

The **Account** is the main tab. Specify the following:

*   Name
*   Date of birth (it will be displayed in the feed)
*   Time zone

The time zone settings in a personal profile for each user come in handy when your team is working in different time zones. Everyone will see the relevant time in messages and comments.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/239/2d794393-6723-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The time zone settings for the whole website are displayed in the System Settings.

You can change your email address at any time. In the Login (Email) field enter new email address and click **Save**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/239/0da7f447-0886-11f0-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

> **Note:** One user can have several Flowlu accounts and log in using a single email and password. Once email is changed in one account, it is changed in all other accounts. Only user may change an email in the personal profile. Administrator is not able to change a user account data as it violates confidentiality rules.

By clicking the small camera icon on your avatar, you can download a new profile photo by clicking on the **Replace Photo** button. Choose a file on your computer and press the **Save** button. After your photo is uploaded, you can crop it.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/239/b9406c46-6723-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Under the **Change Password** tab, you can quickly change your password at any time. 

*   For this purpose, you need to enter your current password, then your new password and confirm new password one more time. 
*   Your password cannot be shorter than 6 characters.

Under the **Profile** tab, you can specify all the information needed to get in touch with you.

Use Appearance tab to customize menu layout and color theme. 

Under the **Notification Settings** tab, all notifications in your account are turned on by default. 

You can set notifications for your account by yourself. For this purpose, remove the check in the box next to notification you need to turn off. 

For example, you would like to know when an invoice is paid, but you do not want to see notifications on invoice approval. Then, deactivate relevant settings not to see this information.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/239/c981edc2-6723-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Under the **Linked Services** tab, you can connect your Flowlu profile to Google account for quick authorization. Choose **Linked Services** in the profile settings. A page for Google or Apple ID account connection opens in a new tab.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/239/3d7d3caf-6724-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/239/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Notification Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474-415-486--notification-settings/)

[Next Managing Active Sessions](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474-1711--managing-active-sessions/)

# Managing Active Sessions

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Working in Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474--working-in-flowlu/ "Working in Flowlu")
    
4.  Managing Active Sessions

Managing Active Sessions
========================

* * *

Ensuring the security of your account is a priority in Flowlu. To provide you with full control over your account access, Flowlu has a **Sessions Manager**. This tool allows you to monitor all active sessions across different platforms and browsers, helping you identify unauthorized access or simply manage your logins on various devices.

The Sessions Manager is available on all portals and can be accessed by every user individually.

Accessing the Sessions Manager
------------------------------

To view your active sessions, click on your profile picture in the top right corner of the screen and select the edit icon. Find the **Devices** tab and click on it.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1711/b2cb9c5e-f52e-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Monitoring Current and Active Sessions
--------------------------------------

The Devices page is divided into two main areas. At the top, you will see details about your **current session**, including the browser type, operating system, and your current IP address. This helps you confirm the status of the device you are presently using.

Below the current session, the **Active sessions** table provides a detailed list of every other instance where your account is currently logged in.  

Securing Your Account and Terminating Sessions
----------------------------------------------

If you notice a session from an unfamiliar device or simply want to log out of a computer you no longer have access to, you can terminate sessions remotely.

To end a specific session, click the **Log out icon**. This will immediately disconnect your account from that specific device or browser.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1711/43597c05-f530-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1711/4f310c7d-f52f-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

For a quick security reset, you can use the **Sign out of all other sessions** button located just below your current session info. Clicking this will terminate every active login except for the one you are currently using.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1711/25eb7e2a-f52f-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

[Previous Edit your User Profile](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474-239--edit-profile/)

[Next Tags](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474-548--tags/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Signing Up

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Getting Started](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201--getting-started/ "Getting Started")
    
4.  Signing Up

Signing Up
==========

* * *

Creating a Flowlu account is very simple and takes less than a minute.

To create an account, click the **Sign Up** button on the [official website](https://www.flowlu.com/)
 of Flowlu.

There are two ways to create an account.

*   With your email address
*   [With your Google account](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-238-240--how-to-register-in-flowlu-service-via-google/)
      
    

If you're signing up using the first option, enter the following information:

*   your email, where information on signing up and system notifications will be sent to.

Click **Get Started**. 

After successfully signing up for Flowlu, you will get an email confirmation containing a link to your account and login details.

When you sign up for a new account, you create both a company account and a user account. Each company account can be used to collaborate with several users. Thus, these users will be linked to this company account.

Main Elements 
--------------

Let’s take a closer look at the major elements of the interface and fill in your personal profile.   

All users who are invited to your account will be able to post messages, announcements, and polls in the **Company feed**.  

You can choose the **menu layout** in Personalization section. There are three options: top, sidebar and expanded menu.   

On the top panel, there is a “+” button, which allows you to quickly create a task, an event, a project, an opportunity, new organization or contact, etc. Next to it, there is the button for a global search of information in Flowlu.  

In the top right corner, there are buttons for quick access to calendar, emails, notifications, chat, personal notes, online support and latest updates, personal profile and system settings.

If you prefer to take it all in visually, check out the video below to learn the basics.  

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/238/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [Sign Up to Flowlu using Google Account](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-238-240--signup-via-google/)
    
*   [Link your Google account with Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-238-268--link-google/)

# How to Install the Docs Module

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Documents](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/683--docs/ "Documents")
    
4.  How to Install the Docs Module

How to Install the Docs Module
==============================

* * *

To start using the module, you need to install it first. To do that, open the **Apps** tab and find the Docs module, then click on it.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/684/771a6787-9f0e-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click the **Install** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/684/f3015dc4-9f0f-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

Access Rights
-------------

The Docs module has three types of access:

**Administrator** - can change the module's settings, create document types, related documents, edit them, etc.

**Employee** - can't change the module's settings. Has access to document type creation, document editing mode, etc.

**Access Denied**  - can't access the module or related entities.

Access rights can be changed in the module settings in the **Apps** tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/684/ed08857b-9f11-11ee-8f63-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/684/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Next Document Types](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/683-685--document-types/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Creating a New Task

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Tasks](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118--tasks/ "Tasks")
    
4.  Creating a New Task

Creating a New Task
===================

* * *

The faster the tasks are performed, the more efficient the work is. In Flowlu, tasks are set at just a couple of clicks. Create a task, assign a responsible person and collaborators, set the priority and deadline, and monitor the task progress. When the task is completed, you will receive an instant notification.  

How to create a task  

-----------------------

*   You can create a task by clicking the **Create** button in the top right corner in the **Tasks** application.![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/bf4cacb4-38b1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)
*   In any other application with tasks, e.g.—CRM, Projects, Workspace.![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/daaf97f7-38b2-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)
*   Using a 'Plus' button, a task can be created in any module of your account.![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/339e736a-38b3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)
*   In the **Tasks** application, click on the **Add a task** field to quickly create a task. After you indicate its name and assignee, press Enter. You can always add any further information later, e.g., checklist, assignee, detailed information, files.![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/8386af0f-38b6-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Task Fields 
------------

On the task page, you can enter almost all information by simply clicking on any field. To go to the task page, click on its name.  
  
To go to the edit mode, click on the three-dots button in the upper right corner:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/6896184f-d034-11eb-9be9-fa163e7d9ee1.png)

  
Let's take a closer look at what information can be entered and what you can do on the task page.  
  
1\. **Title**. If you need to change the name of the task, just click in this field and enter the information. A click outside the editing area saves the changes.

2\. **Description.** Describe in details what the task is about and give recommendations.

3. **Checklist.** This is useful if the task should be broken down into steps.

4\. You can attach **files** to the task: PDFs, docs, images. Flowlu is also integrated with Google.Drive. Using the appropriate icon, you can attach any document from your Google Drive.

5\. You can set an exact **start date** and a **deadline**.

6\. **Priority**. By default, the task is assigned a medium priority, but you can change it by clicking on the corresponding field. In the list of tasks, the assignee will immediately see that the task is assigned a high priority.

7\. **Owner** and **Assignee**. You can assign a task using the arrow icon in the upper right corner.   
  
8\. **Collaborators and followers**. You can learn more about the difference [here](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-4-125--what-do-roles-mean-owner-assignee-follower/)
.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/277564da-38b8-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

9\. You can also select **[the list](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-413-16--creating-and-sorting-tasks-by-lists/)** in which the task will be placed.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/dacff709-bc1b-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

10\. Create [**subtasks**](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/118-4-551--subtasks/)
 to break complex tasks into more manageable, smaller units. Each subtask has its own assignee, owner and collaborators. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/e5805f97-38b8-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

11\. You can also add a **tag**, **reminder**, a link to an opportunity, a project, a CRM contact/organization.  

12\. Copy the **link** of the task page by clicking on the paper clip in the upper right corner.

13\. Open a page in a new tab by clicking on the square icon with an arrow.

14\. To change an assignee, click the **reassign** button. 

15\. By clicking on the three-dot button, you can print the task, view and set up automation actions (workflow), go to the editing mode, copy or delete a task.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/cde2b5a0-38b9-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

16\. You can also change the task stage or complete a task right from the task page. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/17d2bd90-38ba-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The data below can be entered only in the editing mode of the task:  
  
17\. The scheduled time is specified in the "Estimated time" field. When you want to specify only minutes, write "m" next to the number, and if you want to specify hours, it is enough to specify only the number. If you specify hours and minutes, enter the digits separated by a space. For example: 2 - space - 30. The hours and minutes are set automatically. Save the entered time with the Enter key.  
  
18\. If necessary, activate or deactivate **The assignee can change the deadline for this task** and **This task needs approval from the owner**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/fbd86449-38c2-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  
19\. One the page **Other**, you can also make the task a recurring one and set up **Estimated Time.**

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/917c22e7-38c3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  
When all the fields are completed, press Save or Enter.  

What happens after you've created a task  

-------------------------------------------

An assignee and collaborators are notified of the created task. If the user logs off, the notification is sent to the email.

There are two access rights to tasks:  

1.  Administrator. This individual has access to all tasks in the Flowlu account. An administrator can edit tasks, adjust fields, reassign roles to tasks created by him/her and by other users.
2.  Employee. This individual has access to tasks he/she created or is assigned to (collaborator, follower or assignee).

If a task is assigned to a user with Employee access right, this user cannot edit or delete the task or add collaborators. 

When assigning a new task, you can also allow an assignee to change the deadline of the task. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/a74a6c2c-38c5-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The employee is able to perform the following actions:

*   making checklists and checking the boxes.
*   fill in the report.
*   delegate a task if a user fails to implement a task. 

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/4/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Business Processes

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  Business Processes

Business Processes
==================

* * *

The "Business Processes" module allows you to structure and automate the actions that need to be taken to achieve a result.

It often happens that employees from different departments with different positions are involved in the process. And the more complex the process, the more likely it is that someone will forget to assign a task, agree on something, or pass on information. The "Business Processes" module is needed for seamless interaction between different parts of your company. It allows you to automate processes and improve interdepartmental communication through clearly functioning algorithms within the business process.

**How to install the module**
-----------------------------

You can find the module in the list of all applications on your portal. To go to it, simply click on your profile avatar

Find the Business Processes module and click the Install button:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/702/6b3903b4-2311-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

**Module Access Rights**
------------------------

Once the module has been successfully installed, you can configure access rights for it.  

There are three access levels for the module. These are similar to the access levels for other modules in our system and work in a similar way.

*   **Administrator**

Has full access to all actions within the module and its content, as well as to its settings.

Can assign access rights to this module for other portal users.

Has access to the "Tasks and Automation" section and can edit it. More information about this can be found in another article.

*   **Employee**

Has limited access to actions within the module, which is regulated by granting access directly to the Business Process. More information about these can be found in the following section of the documentation.

*   **Access Denied**

The module will not be displayed in the list of modules and access to it will be restricted for the user.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/702/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [Creating Business Process](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/702-703--creating-business-process/)
    

[Previous Inventory Management and Cashflow and P&L Reports](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-711-716--inventory-management-and-cashflow-and-p-l-reports/)

[Next Creating Business Process](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/702-703--creating-business-process/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Loss Reasons and Sources

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322--crm/ "CRM")
    
4.  [Opportunities](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323--opportunities/ "Opportunities")
    
5.  Loss Reasons and Sources

Loss Reasons and Sources
========================

* * *

Loss Reasons
------------

These are the reasons due to which the opportunities are not won. This can be a price, loss to a competitor, a low-quality lead, etc. The loss reasons are indicated at the closing of the opportunity through the **Lost** button:  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/325/91c6ce6d-5049-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The loss reasons are also displayed in the CRM report, which is available in the section  **Reports → CRM**.  

The loss reasons are set in the **Portal Settings → CRM → Reference → Loss reasons → Create loss reasons**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/325/d266ba1c-5049-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Here you can create, edit, delete or deactivate the loss reason. To edit or delete, hover over the name of the reason. To deactivate — uncheck the _Active_ column.

> **Note:** You can remove the reason only if there are no linked opportunities.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/325/d3963051-504a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Sources of Opportunities
------------------------

To learn which sources are the most effective ones, record the sources of opportunities. To set up opportunity sources, go to **Portal Settings → CRM → Reference → Sources → Create new source**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/325/12e1b985-504b-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The source is indicated when creating the opportunity:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/325/2fdcf2b8-504b-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can create, edit, delete or deactivate the source of the opportunity. To edit or delete, hover over the name of the source. To deactivate, uncheck the _Active_ column. You can delete a source only if there are no opportunities linked to it.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/325/82492d62-504b-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/325/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Required Fields for Sales Pipelines

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322--crm/ "CRM")
    
4.  [Opportunities](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323--opportunities/ "Opportunities")
    
5.  Required Fields for Sales Pipelines

Required Fields for Sales Pipelines
===================================

* * *

Maintaining data integrity is crucial for any sales process. To help your team follow internal regulations and capture critical information at the right moment, Flowlu allows you to configure mandatory fields for specific sales pipelines and individual stages. This ensures that an opportunity cannot progress until the necessary data is provided.

**Note:** The functionality for stage-specific required fields is available only on premium Flowlu subscription plans (except for legacy Team plan).

Configuring Required Fields
---------------------------

To set up these rules, navigate to the CRM module settings via the side menu or click the gear icon in the top right corner of the CRM module and navigate to the Required fields tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1754/7c414a19-080f-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1754/82b0ea75-080f-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

To enable a requirement, select any system or custom field from the list.

**Important:** For technical reasons, you cannot set requirements for Formula fields, Yes/No fields, or Drop-down fields.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1754/b22fcc5f-080f-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1754/b79a8c75-080f-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

In the right-hand sidebar, enable the "Required at the pipeline stage" checkbox. You can then use the interactive menu to select the specific pipelines and stages where this data is mandatory.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1754/bf7b7ec7-080f-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

After that, the settings can be saved. Information about which Pipelines and in which stages the field is required will also be displayed in the list.

How the Validation Works
------------------------

Depending on where you set the requirement, the system responds in different ways to ensure your database remains clean.

### Requirements on the First Stage

If a field is mandatory for the very first stage of a Pipeline, Flowlu will prevent you from saving a new record if that data is missing. The system will immediately notify you of the specific empty fields.

**Important:** If the "Opportunity Amount" is mandatory and you have "Apply the automated calculation of the opportunity’s amount" enabled, the Quick Add button on the Kanban board will be disabled to ensure all product data is entered via the full form.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1754/c99db2d0-080f-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Regarding automated creation, please note that when an opportunity is generated via Web Forms, Telephony, Email, CSV Import, Automation, and API the required field rules are temporarily ignored. This ensures that new leads are always captured. However, these requirements will immediately trigger as soon as a manager tries to move that opportunity to a new stage within the UI.

### Requirements on Later Stages

If mandatory fields are set for subsequent stages, you can manage the opportunity normally on earlier steps. However, as soon as you attempt to drag an opportunity card to a mandatory stage, a pop-up window will appear. This allows the user to fill in the missing information instantly without leaving the Kanban board.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1754/d900283a-080f-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Field completion requirements are also checked when using automated actions of the “Move” and “Field Update” types, as well as when creating/modifying opportunities through the API.

### Bypassing and "The Bridge Effect"

It is important to note that if a required field is only set for one middle stage, a user could move an opportunity directly from stage 1 to stage 3, effectively bypassing the requirement. To prevent this, we recommend making the field mandatory for all subsequent stages in that Pipeline.

Bulk Editing and Automation
---------------------------

The system also enforces validation during mass actions. If you select multiple opportunities to move them to a new stage, Flowlu will check each one for mandatory data.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1754/e4579d13-080f-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1754/eb3782a8-080f-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

If the system detects opportunities with unfilled required fields, it will notify you about this and show the number of opportunities successfully moved to another stage.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1754/ef16e25f-080f-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

[Previous Turning Emails Into Contacts and Opportunities](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323-329-517--turning-emails-into-contacts-opportunities-tasks/)

[Next Import CRM Opportunities](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323-459--opportunities-import/)
