# Flowlu Help Center | Setting a Custom Invoice Template

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  [Invoices](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258--how-to-prepare-an-invoice/ "Invoices")
    
5.  Setting a Custom Invoice Template

Setting a Custom Invoice Template
=================================

* * *

Advanced custom invoice templates allow you to create and customize invoice forms: change blocks and table order, create additional fields to show them by default in your invoices. You can also change appearance settings, text color, invoice background, etc.

Creating a new template
-----------------------

For all users who started to use Flowlu before the release of the Advanced invoice templates, we saved templates made with the previous forms in the Legacy tab.

In general, you have two tabs:

*   Advanced Templates
*   Templates (Legacy)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/718e8a44-eff9-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the Advanced Templates tab, you can create, edit, and delete all new advanced invoice templates.

To create a new template, go to **Portal Settings → Finance → Templates**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/cd0eb075-eff9-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click the **Create** button.

Here you can choose the following presets:

*   Invoice (Germany)
*   Invoice (International)
*   Custom

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/d747bdce-eff9-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened window, you can see a preview window and the right sidebar with template settings.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/2d1ba150-465b-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

You have two common types of views, which you can switch between by clicking the **Preview** button. When the preview is enabled, you can change the visual settings of each block . When the preview is off, you can change general settings and customize each block by adding varieties, editing text, etc.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/8a5c238e-465b-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

### General Settings

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/bb66cd75-465b-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

The general settings for a template are displayed in the right sidebar. Here you can set the following configurations:

*   **Template Status**. By checking the box, you can make the template active, so it’ll be available to select while creating a new invoice. 

*   **Invoice Description**. The description is open only to your teammates, so customers won’t see it. Here you can write any additional information, so it’ll be easier for teammates to navigate through templates.

*   **Payment Button Name**. Here, you can customize the payment button name for your customers. By clicking on this button, your clients will reach the page with payment methods and the PDF form of an invoice.

*   **Payer Type**. You can choose between three options: all, organization, and contact. The invoice template will be automatically selected as one of the options while creating an invoice for this type of payer. For example, if the payer type in settings is set to "contact, this template will be shown as an option only for contacts, not organizations.

*   **Organization**. If it’s set, the invoice template will be allowed only for a certain organization.

*   **Terms & Conditions**. Values from this field will be automatically shown in the variable: "#INVOICE|INVOICE\_TERMS#". For example, once an invoice is created, it’ll turn to the invoice terms & conditions, and the value from this field will be automatically added to the variable "#INVOICE|INVOICE\_FOOTER#"

*   **Manager position**. The value from this field will be automatically added to the variable "#INVOICE|CONTACT\_PERSON\_POSITION#"

*   **Manager Full Name**. The value from this field will be automatically added to the variable "#INVOICE|CONTACT\_PERSON#"

*   **Additional manager**. The value from this field will be automatically added to the variable "#INVOICE|CONTACT\_PERSON2#"

*   **Additional manager position**. The value from this field will be automatically added to the variable "#INVOICE|CONTACT\_PERSON2\_POSITION#"

*   **Show Currency** option. If enabled, the currency’s code will be displayed next to the amount. For example, USD.

*   **Display the currency symbol instead of the currency code**. If enabled, the currency symbol will be displayed next to the amount instead of the code. For example, use $ instead of USD.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/e3ee23a6-f088-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Visual Settings

This tab allows you to customize the whole invoice template and each single block. All visual settings are available on the **Visual Settings** tab or by clicking the **Preview** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/f44acbec-465c-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

By clicking on the **Preview** button, you can see the final result of your invoice template and change it as well.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/76c9c0ef-f089-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

**_Visual settings are split into three categories:_**

*   **Template**. Template settings are applied to the whole invoice template. Here you can change the background color, padding, and add a background image. By clicking the three-dot button, you can quickly reset the template to its default settings. For paddings, light indicators will show which side will be changed.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/4249b088-f08a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **All Blocks**. These settings are applied to all template blocks by default. You can change the font, its size and color, the block background, borders and their colors, padding, corner rounding, and margin. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/ce1340ed-f08a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **Active block.** You can change each single block by clicking on it. All the settings will be applied only to this block. By default, each block has settings of the whole template.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/2ec979c4-465d-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

Each block has its own settings, depending on the type. For example, a header with contact information and a footer with the total amount have different settings and features.  

**_For all block settings, you can make additional changes by clicking the three-dot-button:_**

*   **Apply them all to the modified blocks**. All changes will be applied to other modified blocks. For all modified settings, there is a blue dot next to them.
*   **Reset to default settings**. All changes will be canceled for all blocks.
*   **Apply to the modified blocks**. You can choose which setting to apply to all blocks that were modified.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/c534bd47-465d-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

Invoice Template Blocks
-----------------------

Each invoice consists of blocks, which you can add, edit, delete, and mix.

You can drag and drop each block by holding the button left of the block.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/9221993b-465e-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

By clicking the three-dot button next to the block, you can apply advanced settings, unique to each block. You can also delete or change visual settings. Some blocks can be duplicated, depending on the type. Examples of unique blocks: the "Total" block and "Products".

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/eb838215-465e-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

For blocks with text content, you can find the "variables" button next to the three-dot button. A variable will add an actual value to the final invoice, for example, an organization's phone number.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/cd51b3a4-465f-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

By clicking the **+** button, you can add a new block.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/052f871b-4660-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Intro

It’s a default block different for all templates. For example, here is how it looks in the international invoice template:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/66bac73f-4660-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

And how it looks for a German invoice template:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/9051b859-4660-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

It’s important to note that this block is based on the table structure, and you should consider it while creating a template. To make your work process smooth, use the "Table" option in the toolbar.

To change each cell, simply click on it. If you want to change the table's settings, click the Table icon on the toolbar.

You can add unlimited tables to the template. To add or delete tables, use the table icon on the toolbar.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/e6afa527-4660-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

By clicking the **table icon**, you can make the following changes:

_Table. All changes will be applied to the whole table._

*   Background
*   Paddings
*   Borders and their color

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/284461ae-f093-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Cell. All changes will be applied only to a certain cell._

*   Alignment
*   Centring
*   Background color
*   Borders
*   Width and height
*   Merge/Split

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/3144513d-f093-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Column. All changes will be applied to the whole column of the table._

*   Insert column left
*   Insert column right
*   Delete column

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/238df709-f091-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Line_. _All changes will be applied to the whole line of the table._

*   Add head
*   Insert row above
*   Insert a row below.
*   Delete row

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/0fc11870-f093-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Signature

By default, this block contains two variables: #INVOICE|CONTACT\_PERSON\_POSITION# and #INVOICE|CONTACT\_PERSON#

You can also enable the "Show stamp" option in the block settings and set its position.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/72c70948-4662-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Content

This block is completely empty, so you can set it up according to your needs. There are also some unique settings for this block: background and font color, and its size in pixels.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/7cffef2c-f093-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Image

This block allows you to only add images. In the active block settings, you can expand the image or remove borders.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/8ae6a556-f093-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Items and Total

These blocks have default settings and can’t be added to the template multiple times.

In the block settings, you make changes to the font, borders, text position, etc.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/a02d24f6-f093-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Separator

This block helps to separate parts of the invoice with a line. You can also set the color and width of a separator.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/470ced86-f094-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Page Break

This block splits the invoice into separate pages, which is also taken into account when creating a PDF file of the invoice.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/741324e1-f094-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

All changes are saved automatically.  

How to Use Templates
--------------------

To create an invoice using your custom template, ensure that the template is active. Also, remember to link the template to the organization.

Go to the **Finance module → Invoices** and click the **Create** button.  
  
In the opened window, choose the organization to which you linked a template and select the template from the drop-down menu in the **Custom Template** field.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/b16d777c-4662-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/260/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Organization Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-259--organization-profile-settings/)

[Next Creating an Invoice](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-262--creating-an-invoice/)

 [![footer_logo](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/default/footer_logo.svg) Flowlu.com](https://www.flowlu.com/)

# Payment Calendar

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  Payment Calendar

Payment Calendar
================

* * *

The success of your business and communication with vendors depends on how promptly your financial commitments are executed. With the payment calendar, you can plan upcoming revenues and expenses, as well as predict cash gaps for certain dates. Predicting cash gaps will help you to change the strategy. 

> Note that the payment calendar is only available for users with **A****dministrator access in Finance module**.

Payment Calendar: Main Page
---------------------------

On the main page of Flowlu's payment calendar, you can see all planned revenues and expenses for the whole month. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/c05a44cc-0f41-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the calendar, you can see all planned revenues and expenses for a day. If you want to see the detailed information for a day, you can hover over the date in the calendar and observe the balance for each bank account.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/148dd05d-0f43-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

By clicking on a certain day, you can see a detailed page with planned financial transactions for all bank accounts. Here you can see what needs to be paid or money that is still not received.

Transactions marked with a yellow icon are transferred from previous dates and have not proceeded, so you should pay some extra attention to them and link them to actual revenue or expenses, or simply delete them

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/156a7dba-0f47-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Main Settings

If you want to switch the month, use the small calendar on the left. The dates on which the cash gap occurred are marked in red.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/d2064e9a-0f3e-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also switch to the **Show account balances** mode. This feature will show you the estimated total amount for the day, including all planned revenues and expenses.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/627b9fae-0f3f-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The total balance is shown as gray, below planned revenues and expenses for a day.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/83e28090-0f3f-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To see only those planned transactions that are related to a certain organization or bank account, you can use filters.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/7981451e-0f40-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Cash Gap

A cash gap is a certain amount of money that is needed to cover all financial operations. If you don't have enough funds to cover fees, there is a cash gap.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/2d06e6cc-0f41-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In Flowlu, the cash gap is shown for the upcoming day and marked as red. In case some of the planned revenues or expenses are not met, they'll be transferred to the next day and included in the cash gap. This action will repeat until the planned transaction is not marked as paid, linked to an actual transaction, or simply closed.

### List of Scheduled Payments

You can observe all scheduled payments at once by clicking the **List of scheduled payments** tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/11c56819-0f56-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Here you can switch between three tabs: 

*   Incomplete
*   Complete
*   Regular Payments

On the **Incomplete** tab you can see all estimated revenues and expenses that have not been processed.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/c43d70bc-0f57-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

On the **Complete** tab, you can see all completed transactions.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/dc647cee-0f57-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

On the **Regular Payments** tab, you can see all recurring transactions.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/92538136-0f58-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Create Estimated Revenues and Expenses
---------------------------------------------

Information in the payment calendar is collected from all your bank accounts, both cash flow and P&L transactions. You can swiftly create an estimated revenue or expense directly from the payment calendar.   

### How to Create an Estimated Revenue or Expense

To create an estimated revenue or expense, click on the **Estimated Revenue/Expense** button in the payment calendar. By clicking the small arrow on the right side of the button, you can create recurring revenues and expenses.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/26e01fd0-0e97-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened window, you can specify the name, payment date, link it to the organization or project, set the estimated amount, financial category and responsible person. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/88c6f914-0e9a-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you don't want the transaction to be included in the calculation of the cash gap, click the **Complete** button to mark the payments as executed. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/d9ab1926-0e9d-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If the revenue or expense is already completely or partially paid, you can mark it as paid and fill in the paid amount and date.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/0f25c300-0e9e-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To add more clarification, you can write the description or attach files. 

Click **Save**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/6b1c3a14-0e9f-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### How to Create Estimated Revenues/Expenses for Projects

Financial module in Flowlu is linked with projects, so you can simply link any planned revenue or expense to projects. 

You can do this by following any of two methods below:

#### Method 1

While creating or editing revenue/expense, choose any project to link the transaction to. You can also define the stage of a project at which the transaction will be planned.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/a8ffab6f-0f52-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

#### Method 2

Go to the **Project** module and go to the project you want to plan a transaction for. Go to the finance tab of the project. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/35af32a2-0f53-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click on the small arrow on the **Revenue** or **Expense** button and choose the **Estimated Revenue/Expense** option.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/8d4957f8-0f53-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To learn more about project financial management, [explore the following article](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-391--managing-the-project-finances/)
.

### How to Edit Revenues and Expenses

If you want to edit an already created revenue/expense or link it to the actual revenue and create an invoice, click on the current day in your payment calendar and open the detailed page. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/cf4e2907-0f4e-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click on the planned transaction you want to edit. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/f5c489d6-0f4e-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

On the edit page, you can change any information, including the estimated amount. 

If you want to link the planned revenue/expense to the actual transaction, click the **Add Actual Revenue/Expense** button. You can also create an invoice for this transaction by clicking the **Create Invoice** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/709ac045-0f50-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To copy the planned transaction, click the icon in the top right corner.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/a481cb77-0f50-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To apply changes, click **Save**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/f2f47d1c-0f50-11ee-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/665/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# How to Delete a Project

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126--projects/ "Projects")
    
4.  How to Delete a Project

How to Delete a Project
=======================

* * *

If needed, you can delete any existing Project from your Flowlu account.

Before deleting a project, make sure you have the necessary permissions:

*   **Project Manager** can delete their own projects
    
*   **Project Administrator** can delete any existing projects
    

> **Note:** You can delete unfinished projects only if **Users can delete active projects** option is enabled in **Projects module settings**

How to delete a project?
========================

### **From the project details page**

Go to the project you want to delete, then open the context menu in the upper right corner of the screen and click Delete.

**![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1478/6c68d50c-0bcd-11f0-b0dd-fa163e2ff576.jpg)**

### **From the list of Projects or Project Archive**

Using the list view you can select several projects at the same time. Choose one or several project, check the box next to them and click the trash icon at the bottom of the list.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1478/15cb2076-0bce-11f0-b0dd-fa163e2ff576.jpg)

[Previous How to Complete or Archive Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-129--how-to-archive-delete-project/)

[Next Access Rights: Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-249--access-rights-in-the-projects/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Financial Reports

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  Financial Reports

Financial Reports
=================

* * *

You can find all financial reports in the **Reports** section → **Finance**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/bae4a34e-9011-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Cash Flow Report
----------------

It gives a clear picture of the company financial condition. The report presents income and expenses, divided by type of activity, financial categories and items. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/77dece17-9016-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If your screen does not fit all the information—use the horizontal scroll located below:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/9b63fc44-9016-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The report displays the following key indicators:  

*   the amount of income or expenses in each month during the year for each financial item;
*   the amount of financial savings (in the Cumulative cash flow column) and profits (in the Cash flow column) by months;
*   change in money for the accounting period![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/f326b22f-f63e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)
*   money at the end of the accounting period

Cash flow—the difference between the amounts of income and expenses for the month. If the amount of cash flow is negative, it is indicated by parentheses.

Cumulative cash flow—a balance of accounts at the end of the month.

*   the total amount of cash received or spent at the end of the period.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/91152c50-f63f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

All of the above financial indicators can be viewed with split by organizations, types of activity (operating, investment, financial) and years.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/dfd1144e-f63f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Profit and Loss Report
----------------------

In this report, you can see the profit and loss of your company for the specified period of time. Profit and loss will be sorted into relevant categories that allow you to view revenue, operating costs, taxes, expenses after net profit, as well as other types of expenses.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/2498cd38-f640-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  
The content of revenue and expense categories can be changed in the "Categories" section in the Finance settings. You can either add your own category or remove the existing ones. For these types, it will be possible to see the corresponding types of profit.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/417a76ad-f640-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  
By clicking on any value in this report, you can see the details of transactions for the selected period, open the CRM account page and the transaction itself.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/687cef99-f640-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you do not want payments / expenses to be displayed in this report, then you will need to choose “Not Executed” status when creating or editing it.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/88c6ec3c-f640-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

* * *

You can also hide zero balances from Cash Flow and P&L reports. To do that, go to the report you want to hide zero balances for.

Click the small gear icon in the top right corner and enable the "**Hide categories without payments**" option.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/89ee9ffe-1742-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

Total Budget
------------

In Flowlu, you can also observe the consolidated budget, including signed budgets, of all organizations within your Flowlu account.

> Note that only **Administrators** have access to the total budget.

On this page, you're able to see the consolidated report of all your budgets with the "**Signed" (Accepted)** status.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/06a6ee06-261f-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you don't have a signed budget, the system will offer to create one for you.

To create a budget, click the **Create Budget** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/6c96fc5e-261d-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

As in each single budget, you can switch between CashFlow and P&L modes.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/900f1d7f-261f-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

By clicking the small gear icon, you can apply some advanced settings, such as display chart, differences, etc.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/efabc9d5-2620-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

Settings

In the report, you can see the opening and closing balances, as well as revenues and expenses for all business lines linked to organizations. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/a9758c1d-2621-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you need to see the total budget for a few of your organizations, you can use filters placed above the budget.

> Note that if you use multiple currencies, you need to choose the currency in which you want to display the budget. In a nutshell, the budget can be displayed only in one currency at a time.

You can also filter the budget by organizations, year, time span, and bank accounts.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/e786e758-2622-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/416/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Switch between Flowlu accounts

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Working in Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474--working-in-flowlu/ "Working in Flowlu")
    
4.  Switch between Flowlu accounts

Switch between Flowlu accounts
==============================

* * *

Flowlu allows creating several accounts for different purposes. For example, you can create two accounts for two different organizations or register one account for business purposes and the other for personal purposes.

Creating an extra account is easy. You just have to type in a name of the portal. 

You will sign in using the same email and password. 

All notifications will be displayed in browsers and mobile applications from all of your accounts. To create a second account, press **My Accounts** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/269/5fc72088-6983-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

Click on **Create Account** button.  

In the opened window, enter the portal name and click on the **Create Account** button. After that, you will be transferred to a new portal.  

You will also receive an email containing the link for log into a new account.

Now you can enter your accounts using one email and password directly by portal URL or the following link: [https://my.flowlu.com](https://my.flowlu.com/)
. After that, you will be able to select a company account.   

You can switch between accounts using **My Accounts** button.

Or you can work at several accounts simultaneously. If one of the accounts is closed, you will get notifications from this account in a browser or push notifications to your smartphone to stay informed.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/269/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Flowlu Text Editor](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474-1770--flowlu-text-editor/)

[Next CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322--crm/)

# Tasks

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126--projects/ "Projects")
    
4.  [Project: Overview](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-412--overview-of-project-sections/ "Project: Overview")
    
5.  Tasks

Tasks
=====

* * *

This section is designed to manage project collaboration. When you add tasks to a project, they become available to all project participants. The project team will see a stage of each task, assignees and the deadline.

Tasks have several views and can be displayed as:

*   cards on the Kanban board.
*   task list.
*   the lists sorted by an assignee.
*   Gantt chart.

Here you can switch the task list view:

![](https://support1.aspro.cloudassets/images/735/248464a5-c8a0-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Task Board
----------

**The task board** is one of the most useful tools for planning and tracking the planned and completed project tasks. All tasks on the board are presented as cards.

You can:

*   move task cards between stages and see what has been already completed or what is to be done;
*   move the highest priority tasks to the top—this will help you to identify which ones need to be performed first.

![](https://support1.aspro.cloudassets/images/735/40f995c8-c8a0-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

> **Please note:** When transferring a task to the _In progress_ column, the time tracker does not start automatically, because the task can be performed in several steps. To start the timer, you need to click the _Start_ button in the sidebar. At the stage _Done_, there are tasks completed, but not accepted by the task owner. Only the task owner can transfer these tasks to the _Completed_ _tasks_ column after checking them.

On the board, you can instantly add a task, immediately specifying the description and the person responsible:

![](https://support1.aspro.cloudassets/images/735/5dfc77c5-c8a0-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The _Assignee_ filter hides the tasks that certain employees do not have to deal with (they are not an owner, or responsible).

![](https://support1.aspro.cloudassets/images/735/80187767-c8a0-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

**In each task card, the important information is displayed:**

*   **priority**, as a colored arrow on the task ticket:

turquoise—low priority;

no arrow—medium;

red—high.

**![](https://support1.aspro.cloudassets/images/735/aab91cba-4f82-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)**

*   **planned and actual time**, which makes it easy to control time costs and notice deviations in time;
*   **deadline date**. A date on the card notifies about an overdue date;
*   **an owner and an assignee**.

![](https://support1.aspro.cloudassets/images/735/74a6cab3-4f83-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The total time spent on a project by an employee can be viewed in the task list table.

![](https://support1.aspro.cloudassets/images/735/c1eee0eb-c8a0-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Task Grouping by the Project Stages
-----------------------------------

In the task board, you can enable grouping of the tasks by stages of the project. There are several options for grouping tasks:

*   for all stages of the project, even if not all stages have tasks;

*   only for those stages that have tasks;

*   without grouping.

You can switch the grouping mode by clicking the _Settings_ button on the project task board.

![](https://support1.aspro.cloudassets/images/735/f5698caf-c8a0-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Select "**Project Stage**" to enable task grouping. If you need to see all the stages of the project, including those that do not have any tasks, check the box "**Show empty sections**".

![](https://support1.aspro.cloudassets/images/735/0843fb30-4f85-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Select "**Do not group**" if you do not plan to use the grouping.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/735/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Setting a Custom Estimate Template

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  [Estimates](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251--what-is-an-estimate/ "Estimates")
    
5.  Setting a Custom Estimate Template

Setting a Custom Estimate Template
==================================

* * *

Advanced custom estimate templater allows you to create and customize estimate forms: change blocks and table order, create additional fields to show them by default in your estimates. You can also change appearance settings, text color, estimate background, etc.

Creating a New Template
-----------------------

Settings for templates can be altered in the **Portal Settings** → **Finances** → **Estimates** 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/c49497d6-172b-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

Here you can find the default templates for each organization (if you have more than one). You can modify them or create additional ones. To modify existing ones, click on the template title. Alternatively, click on the **Create** button to add a new one.

There is also a **Legacy** tab. This tab is available for all Flowlu users, who started to use Flowlu before the release of advanced estimate templates. All templates made with old settings are placed in the Legacy tab.

In the opened window, you can see a preview window and the right sidebar with template settings.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/61c82386-172e-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

You have two common types of views, which you can switch between by clicking the **Preview** button. When the preview is enabled, you can change the visual settings of each block . When the preview is off, you can change general settings and customize each block by adding varieties, editing text, etc.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/0222a73a-172f-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

### General Settings

The general settings for a template are displayed in the right sidebar. Here you can set the following configurations:

*   **Template Status**. By checking the box, you can make the template active, so it’ll be available to select while creating a new estimate. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/42f0e114-172f-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **Description**. The description is open only to your teammates, so customers won’t see it. Here you can write any additional information, so it’ll be easier for teammates to navigate through templates. ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/91146888-172f-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **Organization**. If it’s set, the template will be allowed only for a certain organization. ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/2fa2aa23-1730-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)
*   **Terms & Conditions**. Values from this field will be automatically shown in the variable: "#ESTIMATE|ESTIMATE\_TERMS#". For example, once an estimate is created, it’ll turn to the estimate terms & conditions, and the value from this field will be automatically added to the variable "#ESTIMATE|ESTIMATE\_FOOTER#". ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/2ddb2223-1732-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)
*   **Manager position**. The value from this field will be automatically added to the variable "#ESTIMATE|CONTACT\_PERSON\_POSITION#" ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/b3587fcb-1732-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **Manager Full Name**. The value from this field will be automatically added to the variable "#ESTIMATE|CONTACT\_PERSON#" ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/cba358a5-1737-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **Show Currency** option. If enabled, the currency’s code will be displayed next to the amount. For example, USD.

*   **Display the currency symbol instead of the currency code**. If enabled, the currency symbol will be displayed next to the amount instead of the code. For example, use $ instead of USD.

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/e3ee23a6-f088-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

### Visual Settings

This tab allows you to customize the whole estimate template and each single block. All visual settings are available on the **Visual Settings** tab or by clicking the **Preview** button.

By clicking on the **Preview** button, you can see the final result of your estimate template and change it as well.

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/76c9c0ef-f089-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

  

**_Visual settings are split into three categories:_**

*   **Template**. Template settings are applied to the whole estimate template. Here you can change the background color, padding, and add a background image. By clicking the three-dot button, you can quickly reset the template to its default settings. For paddings, light indicators will show which side will be changed.

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/4249b088-f08a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

*   **All Blocks**. These settings are applied to all template blocks by default. You can change the font, its size and color, the block background, borders and their colors, padding, corner rounding, and margin.

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/ce1340ed-f08a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

*   **Active block.** You can change each single block by clicking on it. All the settings will be applied only to this block. By default, each block has settings for the whole template.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/fb3ec2d5-1738-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

Each block has its own settings, depending on the type. For example, a header with contact information and a footer with the total amount have different settings and features.  

**_For all block settings, you can make additional changes by clicking the three-dot-button:_**

*   **Apply them all to the modified blocks**. All changes will be applied to other modified blocks. For all modified settings, there is a blue dot next to them.
*   **Reset to default settings**. All changes will be canceled for all blocks.
*   **Apply to the modified blocks**. You can choose which setting to apply to all blocks that were modified.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/5b0dc606-1739-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

Estimate Template Blocks
------------------------

Each estimate consists of blocks, which you can add, edit, delete, and mix.

You can drag and drop each block by holding the button left of the block.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/aabe5add-1739-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

By clicking the three-dot button next to the block, you can apply advanced settings, unique to each block. You can also delete or change visual settings. Some blocks can be duplicated, depending on the type. Examples of unique blocks: the "Total" block and "Products"

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/d7fc46d9-1739-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

For blocks with text content, you can find the "variables" button next to the three-dot button. A variable will add an actual value to the final estimate, for example, an organization's phone number.

By clicking the **+** button, you can add a new block.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/f8563f2e-1739-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Intro

It’s a default block, which is different for all templates. For example, here is how it looks in the international estimate template:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/1cb77431-173a-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

It’s important to note that this block is based on the table structure, and you should consider it while creating a template. To make your work process smooth, use the "Table" option in the toolbar.

To change each cell, simply click on it. If you want to change the table's settings, click the Table icon on the toolbar.

You can add unlimited tables to the template. To add or delete tables, use the table icon on the toolbar.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/4c898951-173a-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

By clicking the **table icon**, you can make the following changes:

_Table. All changes will be applied to the whole table._

*   Background
*   Paddings
*   Borders and their color

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/284461ae-f093-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

_Cell. All changes will be applied only to a certain cell._

*   Alignment
*   Centring
*   Background color
*   Borders
*   Width and height
*   Merge/Split

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/3144513d-f093-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

_Column. All changes will be applied to the whole column of the table._

*   Insert column left
*   Insert column right
*   Delete column

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/238df709-f091-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

_Line_. _All changes will be applied to the whole line of the table._

*   Add head
*   Insert row above
*   Insert a row below.
*   Delete row

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/0fc11870-f093-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

### Signature

By default, this block contains two variables: #ESTIMATE|CONTACT\_PERSON\_POSITION# and #ESTIMATE|CONTACT\_PERSON#

You can also enable the "Show stamp" option in the block settings and set its position.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/19e5768f-173b-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Content

This block is completely empty, so you can set it up according to your needs. There are also some unique settings for this block: background and font color, and its size in pixels.

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/7cffef2c-f093-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

### Image

This block allows you to only add images. In the active block settings, you can expand the image or remove borders.

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/8ae6a556-f093-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

### Items and Total

These blocks have default settings and can’t be added to the template multiple times.

In the block settings, you make changes to the font, borders, text position, etc.

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/a02d24f6-f093-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

### Separator

This block helps to separate parts of the estimate with a line. You can also set the color and width of a separator.  

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/470ced86-f094-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

### Page Break

This block splits the estimate into separate pages, which is also taken into account when creating a PDF file of the estimate.

![](https://support1.aspro.cloud/files/download/741324e1-f094-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576)

All changes are saved automatically.  

How to Use Templates
--------------------

To create an estimate using your custom template, ensure that the template is active. Also, remember to link the template to the organization.

Go to the **Finance module → Estimates** and click the **Create** button.  
  
In the opened window, choose the organization to which you linked template from the drop-down menu in the **Custom Template** field.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/e6a75134-173b-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/252/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Next How to Create an Estimate](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251-253--how-to-create-an-estimate/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Email Templates

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Email](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494--email/ "Email")
    
4.  [Managing Emails](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-515--managing-email/ "Managing Emails")
    
5.  Email Templates

Email Templates
===============

* * *

Easily compose email templates by automatically inserting variables from your contact or opportunity page, and send messages from Flowlu within a few seconds.

### How do I create a template?

To create a template, compose a new email. Type the content of the message in the email body. Once all the necessary information has been filled in the email, click on the **three dots** button → **Save as template**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/497/b2254e70-bcc5-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Enter a template name. This is the name that you will see on the template selection list—this will not be visible to email recipients.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/497/6c4b1501-bcc6-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Change the subject line and text if necessary.

Compose your text using the toolbar options: select a font, make your text bold, italicized, or underlined, change the text color, set the alignment, add lists, hyperlinks or tables, insert images or videos

Use the variables available in the drop-down list to automatically add data and personalize the email for every recipient.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/497/d9f52afe-bcc6-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Switch to html mode if necessary and edit your template. When you go back to the editor, you will instantly see what your html code looks like.

Click **Save**.

### How do I create an email by template?

In the "Email" module or any other module where the creation of emails is available, click the **New email**.

Click on the **Templates** button.

All the saved templates will be listed. Choose the necessary template from the drop-down list. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/497/7a6e540f-bcc7-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Flowlu will automatically add all the data. You only need to specify the recipient and add files if necessary. 

When you are ready, send your message. 

### How to Manage Templates

To delete or edit a template, you can do it directly from the list of templates by clicking on the appropriate options:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/497/7b057fa1-bcc9-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To delete several templates at once, as well as go to the full list of available templates, click on "Template Management".

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/497/9dfc45b5-bcc9-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the list, you can search and add filters to quickly find the template you need.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/497/4de538e7-bcca-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/497/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Email Tracking](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-515-499--email-tracking/)

[Next Access Rights: Email](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-520--access-rights/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Invoice Templates

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  [Invoices](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258--how-to-prepare-an-invoice/ "Invoices")
    
5.  Invoice Templates

Invoice Templates
=================

* * *

If you issue many standard invoices with the same positions during your work, then Flowlu can make your life easy. You can create a template and issue invoices within 20-30 seconds.

Templates can only be created by the administrators of the Finance app. However, all users of the system who have rights to issue invoices can use these templates.

Invoice templates are created in the same way as invoice itself. Go to **Finance** → **Invoices** and click the arrow to the right of the **Create** button. In the opened menu, select the **Template** option.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/264/1c32e765-85e1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened side panel specify:

*   the template title;
*   the organization/account on behalf of which the invoice will be created more frequently;
*   select the invoice print form, if there are several of them;
*   specify the items, price, discounts.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/264/a24e8b5f-85e1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Find out more about entering data in the invoice at [Managing invoices](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-262-263--managing-invoices/)
 section.

You can create a template invoice from the list of invoices, as well as from Account, Project or Transaction detailed page.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/264/c094013a-85e1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

_Creating a template invoice from the list of invoices_  

All information specified in the invoice template will be automatically generated into the new invoice.

> **Note**. When invoice is created from a template, all data can be changed. For example, you can delete unnecessary items, create additional ones, change the amount of provided services and delivered goods, specify individual discounts, etc.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/264/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous How to Change the Numbering](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-390--how-to-change-the-numbering-of-invoices-and-estimates/)

[Next Recurring Invoices](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-460--recurring-invoices/)

# Customization and Grouping

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Organizational Structure](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705--organizational-structure/ "Organizational Structure")
    
4.  [Adding and Editing Block in the Organizational Structure](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705-706--adding-and-editing-block-in-the-organizational-structure/ "Adding and Editing Block in the Organizational Structure")
    
5.  Customization and Grouping

Customization and Grouping
==========================

* * *

In the Customization tab, you can change the following settings:

*   Pick the block’s color. If the color is not selected, it’ll be automatically inherited from the parental block.
*   Set ordering. Ordering will affect the order of the block's main structure. The lower the value, the higher the block will be.
*   Choose if the subsidiary block needs to be grouped. If this option is turned on, all subsidiary blocks will be placed in a row.
*   Hide the block. If this option is turned on, it will be visible only for users with the Administrator access.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/707/58ac580b-2322-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Grouping
--------

If the child blocks grouping is turned off, all blocks related to the parental one will be placed from left to right.

If child blocks are grouped, they’ll be placed in a row.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/707/c8486df1-2322-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/707/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Adding and Editing Block in the Organizational Structure](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705-706--adding-and-editing-block-in-the-organizational-structure/)

[Next Unassigned Employees](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/705-708--unassigned-employees/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Types of Custom Fields

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Custom Fields and Lists](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303--custom-fields-and-lists/ "Custom Fields and Lists")
    
4.  [Custom Fields](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-304--how-to-add-a-custom-field/ "Custom Fields")
    
5.  Types of Custom Fields

Types of Custom Fields
======================

* * *

*   **Text or text area**. In the _Text_ type, you have one line for input, in the _Text area_—several lines.
*   **Whole Number or Decimal Number**—a field for entering numbers. For example, enter the number of goods, days etc. The number can be positive, negative.
*   **Price**—a field for entering the price. For example, the cost of service. When filling this field, the currency specified in the portal settings will be automatically set.
*   **Date or date and time**—the fields for entering the date and time. For example, you can specify the date and time of delivery.
*   **Dropdown** —the type of field to create multiple options for selection. After entering the data, change the sequence of the options if necessary.![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/305/4df348c4-40ad-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **Checkboxes**—similar to the dropdown select. The difference is that you can choose several options at once:![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/305/f2810ab9-40ad-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)
*   **File**—you can upload any document to the system or attach it from Google Drive.
*   **User**—a field for selecting a user from the system. For example, you can specify a user to whom you need to provide a report about the completed work.
*   **Yes/no**—you can use this field, for example, as confirmation of sending reports to the client.
*   **Auto increment**—a field for automatically assigning a number to the created records or objects of the system (opportunity, projects, CRM accounts). In the settings of this field, you can specify a prefix and the starting number.
*   **Formula** — a field calculates the arithmetic operations you specify using the available variables. Operations such as addition, subtraction, multiplication and division are available in the system. Calculations are possible both from the basic fields already available in the card of a task, project, etc., as well as from previously added custom fields.
*   **P****ercent.**
*   **Object Picker** — turn any field into a clickable hyperlink to a CRM account, list, project, or user. For example, you can add products to an opportunity, attach a Knowledge base's article, and so on:![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/305/3f6fa46c-40b7-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)
*   **Password** — this field keeps passwords behind a secure mask (like \*\*\*\*\*\*). Utilize this type to store passwords in the record lists.

Find out more: [How to create a custom list](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-308-309--creating-the-list/)

After creating the fields, you can sort them in the order in which you want them to be displayed in the accounts, opportunities, projects, etc.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/305/d81df82e-40ae-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/305/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Where to Fill Out the Custom Fields](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-304-307--where-to-fill-the-custom-fields/)

[Next Record Lists](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-308--installing-and-setting-the-record-lists-app/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Create an Estimate

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  [Estimates](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251--what-is-an-estimate/ "Estimates")
    
5.  How to Create an Estimate

How to Create an Estimate
=========================

* * *

The estimates can be created:

**●On** **the company or contact page, in the CRM app**

Go to the **CRM** → **Contacts** or **Organizations** and select the company or contact for whom you want to create an estimate. In the opened window, click the **Create** button → **Create Estimate**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/253/74e0c31c-8680-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

●**on the opportunity page**. Go to the **CRM** → **Opportunities.**

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/253/a6c0ba67-8680-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

● In the **Finance** app → **Estimates** section.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/253/e6313693-8680-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

What to Include to Estimate
---------------------------

● Specify the organization on behalf of which you prepare an estimate if you have more than one (1);  

● Select a customer from the list that you have already created, or add a new one (2);

● Select the currency from the list that you added to the bank accounts (3);

● The person responsible for creating the estimate is chosen by default. If necessary, you can change him/her;

● Select the custom estimate template if you have more than one (4);

● If necessary, specify Reference (5). This field is optional;

● Set the expiry dates of the estimate (6). Next, specify the products, services that you want to offer the customer, and their price;

● Select the price type (you can set them up in the Products & Services application). If necessary, add the columns for specifying a discount, a fee for delivery, a price adjustment (7);

● Specify the product items. Create new ones or select from the catalogue if they were added previously. Specify price, quantity and discounts (8). You can add item header for services or products;

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/253/1bdcf4b0-8686-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Once created, the estimate can be sent to the client or printed out.

All client estimates can be found on the client's or opportunity page, as well as in the Finance → Estimates.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/253/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Setting a Custom Estimate Template](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251-252--setting-the-print-form-of-estimate/)

[Next How to Send an Estimate to a Customer](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251-254--how-to-send-an-estimate-to-the-client/)

# Task Dependencies

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126--projects/ "Projects")
    
4.  [Project: Overview](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-412--overview-of-project-sections/ "Project: Overview")
    
5.  Task Dependencies

Task Dependencies
=================

* * *

A task dependency means that one task cannot begin or finish before another task is completed. Establishing dependencies helps visualize the project's critical path and helps ensure that tasks are performed in the correct sequence. By understanding dependencies, project managers can better plan timelines and resource allocation.

Creating Task Dependencies
--------------------------

There are a couple of different ways you can create task dependencies within your project:

*   **Using the Gantt Chart:** [The Gantt chart](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-412-732--gantt-chart/)
     provides a visual way to create dependencies. By hovering over the end of a task bar, you can drag a line to the start of another task, creating a dependency. With the system you can create multiple dependencies from a single task, and all of them will be shown on the task card.
*   **Using the Task Card:** Within each task card, you'll find a dedicated "Dependencies" section to create and manage these connections. Here's how it works:
    *   You can browse through all available tasks within the project.  
        ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/757/cb54098a-dfae-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)
    *   When creating a new dependency, you have to select a task and specify its relationship to the current task, choosing either "Finishes after" or "Finishes before".  
        ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/757/db0bb17a-dfae-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)
    *   Once a dependency is created, you can access a context menu next to the dependent task to block the relationship. In this context menu, you can select to "Block", which will transform the dependency into a "Blocking dependency".  
        

Blocking Dependencies
---------------------

*   **How to Create:**
    *   To create a blocking dependency from the [Gantt Chart](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-412-732--gantt-chart/)
        , single-click on an existing dependency line and select "Blocking Dependency."
    *   To create a blocking dependency from the Task Card, access the context menu next to the desired dependency and select "Block" .  
        ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/757/b3bc4e3f-dfb0-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)
*   **Impact:** A blocking dependency will prevent the subsequent task from being moved to "Done" status until its prerequisite task is completed. A lock icon will appear on the dependent task, indicating that it cannot be finished.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/757/3a1524eb-dfb1-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Removing Dependencies
---------------------

Dependencies can be removed at any time:

*   **Remove in [Gantt Chart](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-412-732--gantt-chart/)
    :** Click the dependency arrow and select "Remove Dependency".  
    
*   **Remove in Task Card:** Within the task card, access the context menu next to the dependency you wish to remove, and select "Delete".  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/757/6310c227-dfb1-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/757/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Access Rights: Finance

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  Access Rights: Finance

Access Rights: Finance
======================

* * *

For the Finance module, you can set access rights for each employee, thereby providing financial information only to certain individuals. Only portal administrator can assign access rights in the **Portal Settings** section → **Finance** → **Main Settings**  → **Roles and permissions**.

You can also set up access rights in the **Marketplace**, by clicking on the **Finance** module.

You can give the role of Administrator, Employee, Senior Sales or deny access.

Administrators
--------------

**The administrator** can see all information in the Finance application: transactions, invoices, estimates, reports.

Employees
---------

**An employee** has access to estimates and invoices. This person does not have access to transactions or financial reports.  

In the main Finance settings, you can set certain restrictions for employees on invoices and estimates.

For invoices the following settings are available:

**Each user has access to all issued invoices** — this person will be able to see the invoices of other coworkers. Disable this option if you want the employee to see only his/her invoices.

**Each user can record payment for invoices**  — the employee will be able to independently mark invoices as Paid. If you disable this option, only administrators of the Finance module are able to do it. If you have [payment systems connected](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-279--online-payment-of-invoices/)
, then the invoice will be marked as Paid automatically after receiving the online payment.

**Use invoice approval** — if this option is selected, the system will prompt you to assign an [Approver](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-265-267--stage2-invoice-approval/)
. Approver has to be the administrator of the Finance module.

**Restrict changes to approved, to paid and sent invoices** — this will allow you to avoid confusion in the invoices.

There are following settings available for Estimates:

**Each user has access to all estimates (quotes)** — he/she will be able to see the estimates of other employees. Disable this option and the employee will only have access to his/her estimates.

**Disable editing an estimate after it is sent**—nobody will be able to make any changes to the estimate after it is emailed to the client.

**Restrict changes to estimates that were converted to invoices** — an employee will not be able to edit or make changes to estimate after it has been converted into the invoice.

Access Denied
-------------

Deny access and then the employee will not have access to any options of the **Finance** app. Additionally, they will not be able to create any invoices, estimates, transactions.

Senior Sales
------------

Senior Sales are able to create invoices, estimations in the Finance and Project modules. This access level doesn't have access to the **Money** and **Budgeting** tab in the Finance module. 

Access Rights to Money Transactions 
------------------------------------

In the Finance module, you can record, monitor, and edit transactions. All transactions related to certain bank accounts In **Portal Settings**, you can set up access rights for each bank account so employees will be able to see transactions related only to that account. Also, you can set if the employee is able only to observe or edit transactions.

To set up access rights, go to **Portal Settings → Finance → Bank Accounts.** Then, select the bank account you want to grant access to.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/285/eed54e0a-d2b1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Go to the **Users** tab and select a user you want to add. You can choose between two access types:

*   View — user will be able only to observe transactions for this bank account.
*   Editing — user will be able to add and edit transactions for this bank account.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/285/8ec9be92-d2b2-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click **Save** to apply changes. 

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/285/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Financial Reports](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-416--finance-reports/)

[Next Budgeting](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-629--budgeting/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Distribute a Payment to Multiple Transactions

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  [How to Record the Cash Flow](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-371--cash-flow-management/ "How to Record the Cash Flow")
    
5.  [How to Create a Payment or an Expense](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-371-381--how-to-create-the-payment-or-expense-transaction/ "How to Create a Payment or an Expense")
    
6.  How to Distribute a Payment to Multiple Transactions

How to Distribute a Payment to Multiple Transactions
====================================================

* * *

One payment or expense document can be distributed into multiple transactions. Each transaction is linked to a specific financial item, and, if necessary, to an invoice or project.

*   To create multiple transactions for a record, go to the **Finance** app, to the **Money** tab and open it:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/382/a0650a00-86aa-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   Click the **Split the amount** button to create an additional transaction:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/382/ce6bbd79-86aa-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   Specify the financial categories for each transaction **(1****)**.
*   After specifying the amount for the first transaction, the system will automatically calculate the balance. Click on it to automatically fill in the **Payment** or **Expense** fields.
*   If you want to split transactions by percents, fill in the **%** column for each row **(2)**.
*   If necessary, add more transactions via the **Add New Row** button and save the document **(3)**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/382/53e5052c-1987-11ee-8f7d-fa163e2ff576.png)

  
If you create transactions for a smaller amount specified in the record, then when you save it, a balance transaction will be automatically created and marked as an unallocated amount.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/382/0299bf55-875c-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

After distributing the payment into several transactions in the **Money** section, the following will be displayed:

*   in the **Category** column—the number of transactions created. When viewing this item, you will see which financial categories were used to make transactions and for what amount.
*   in the column **Relations**—invoice numbers or project names, if the transactions were assigned to them.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/382/1bfa618d-875d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/382/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Tasks and Actions of Business Process

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Business Processes](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/702--business-processes/ "Business Processes")
    
4.  [Creating Business Process](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/702-703--creating-business-process/ "Creating Business Process")
    
5.  Tasks and Actions of Business Process

Tasks and Actions of Business Process
=====================================

* * *

It is difficult to imagine a debugged process without automation, so we paid special attention to this aspect.

In the business process, there are both automations that are available in other sections of the system, and new ones that are available only in this module. A separate category of automations has also been added - "Tasks", which we will also discuss in this article.

Tasks Automations
-----------------

Automations of the "Tasks" category are designed to solve tasks for:

*   agreeing on further actions with the instance;
*   requesting missing information in the instance card;
*   familiarizing yourself with the information contained in it.

When these automations are triggered, tasks will be created that the responsible person must complete for the successful implementation of the business process instance.

There are 3 types of automations in this category:

1) Approve or Reject

In the automation settings there are 3 tabs: Main, Displayed Fields, Additional Info.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/704/9749667b-231c-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

On the Main tab, you can specify information about the name of this automation, fill in a description, set a delayed execution, and add conditions under which it will start. You can also define the responsible employees who can approve the submitted request or reject it 

An action can be set on the result of the approval of the responsible person, which will happen to the instance card. Available options will include choosing the instance stage, successfully/unsuccessfully completing it, or leaving the instance stage unchanged. This is useful if there are still automations on this stage that should work after approval.

If there are more than one approving employee, you will see a menu with approval options.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/704/15d2bea5-231d-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

On the Displayed Fields tab, you can mark the instance fields that the responsible person for approval will see in the task that will be created by the automation.

On the Additional Info tab, you can assign a responsible person for cases in which the task will require clarification of information from one or another instance field. The fields in this tab can be marked so that the responsible person can clarify the information in them.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/704/3b985fbc-231d-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

2) Request Information

This automation will help to request information from the responsible person in a timely and fully automatic mode. Through the automation settings, you can mark the fields that will be visible to him in the task, as well as determine which fields require clarification from the employee in the task.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/704/62911305-231d-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

3) Get Familiar with the Information

This type of automation allows you to fix certain instance fields in the task, with which the responsible person must familiarize themselves. And the employee will be able to mark the completion of the task using the Confirm button in the task card.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/704/18dd032b-231e-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

All automations of the new type will be considered completed after the completion of the element that was created with their help, i.e. after the completion of the Task.

The Tasks Tab
-------------

All tasks for the current business process can be found on a separate tab of the same name.

Inside it, you can find all your tasks, see a list of all tasks in the process, and archived tasks that have been completed will also be available for viewing.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/704/c4c34157-231e-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the upper part of the detailed task card, there is a button with an action that will allow it to be completed, and below there is information that is available from the instance fields, according to the settings of the automation of this type.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/704/c9be4692-231e-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Notifications
-------------

Users can choose whether they want to receive notifications for every action within the initiated Business Process or only for assigned tasks.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/704/0a503c08-95cb-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/704/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Transfer Between Accounts

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  [How to Record the Cash Flow](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-371--cash-flow-management/ "How to Record the Cash Flow")
    
5.  [How to Create a Payment or an Expense](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-371-381--how-to-create-the-payment-or-expense-transaction/ "How to Create a Payment or an Expense")
    
6.  Transfer Between Accounts

Transfer Between Accounts
=========================

* * *

This is a transfer of money between accounts of one organization of the same or different banks.

The transfer is created in the **Finance** app, in the **Money** section.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/385/784b162c-875d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

When clicking on the Transfer button, a form to fill will open, where you need to specify:

*   organization **(1)**
*   from which account **(2)** and to which account **(3)** the transfer is taking place;
*   amount of transfer.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/385/b3e740e8-875d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If necessary, you can specify the bank charges. For example, a bank transfer fee or withdrawal fee.

The transfer document in the **Money** section will be displayed with a +/– sign and highlighted in grey.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/385/04f1ba27-875e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

On the basis of the transfer record, the payment and expense transactions will be created. Accordingly, in the financial statements, they will not be recorded as income and expense.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/385/90cffe00-875e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Transactions can be found by clicking on the **three dots button** in the upper right corner:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/385/c65a80a2-875e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/385/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)
