# How to Text from Flowlu to WhatsApp

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Communications](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676--interactions/ "Communications")
    
4.  [How to Connect Messengers](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676-677--how-to-connect-messengers/ "How to Connect Messengers")
    
5.  [How to Connect WhatsApp and WhatsApp Business](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676-677-688--how-to-connect-whatsapp/ "How to Connect WhatsApp and WhatsApp Business")
    
6.  How to Text from Flowlu to WhatsApp

How to Text from Flowlu to WhatsApp
===================================

* * *

If you have a WhatsApp integration on, you can not only receive WhatsApp messages in Flowlu but also text your clients first.

You can text any client or contractor with contact information in the Flowlu CRM module. But you can also text any person whose number you have.  

How to Send WhatsApp Messages to CRM Clients/Organizations
----------------------------------------------------------

To send a WhatsApp message from Flowlu to any of your CRM contacts or organizations, the message's number needs to be defined in the CRM account.

If you have the phone number of the contact or organization, click on it and select the WhatsApp option.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/689/52363d58-b521-11ee-a0a4-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened window, you can see information about the CRM account and its phone number. In the text field, you can write a message.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/689/776aee0d-b521-11ee-a0a4-fa163e2ff576.png)

If the "**Create Opportunity**" option is on, a new CRM opportunity will be created automatically once you send a message to your client from Flowlu to WhatsApp.

You can also send a WhatsApp message via CRM opportunity, but only if any CRM contact is linked to this opportunity and has a phone number.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/689/c2115311-b521-11ee-a0a4-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Send WhatsApp Message to Clients via Flowlu Without CRM company/organization
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you have a client's phone number but haven't created a CRM company or organization for this person yet, you can still send a WhatsApp message via Flowlu and start a conversation.

If you have the phone number of a client and want to send a WhatsApp message without creating a CRM account, first click on the _chat icon_ on the top sidebar.

Then, go to the customers' chats tab and click the _pencil icon_ next to the search bar.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/689/2fb0a7bd-b522-11ee-a0a4-fa163e2ff576.png)

Next, you'll see the same messenger window with a phone number field and a field for text content.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/689/61e210cd-b522-11ee-a0a4-fa163e2ff576.png)

**You'll also have two additional options:** 

*   Create CRM contact - automatically creates a CRM contact for each unique phone number to which you sent a WhatsApp message via Flowlu.
*   Create CRM opportunity - automatically creates a CRM opportunity for each unique phone number to which you sent a WhatsApp message via Flowlu.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/689/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous How to Connect WhatsApp and WhatsApp Business](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/676-677-688--how-to-connect-whatsapp/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Creating an Invoice

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  [Invoices](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258--how-to-prepare-an-invoice/ "Invoices")
    
5.  Creating an Invoice

Creating an Invoice
===================

* * *

You can create an invoice from anywhere on your screen.

Option #1
---------

At the top panel, click on the "+" and select the **New invoice** option in the drop-down list.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/262/5530ae99-811d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Option #2  

------------

Go to **Finance** section → **Invoices** and click on the **New Invoice** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/262/7bda7ca6-811d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Option #3   

-------------

Open an opportunity, company, contact or project and click on the **Create** button. 

In the drop-down list, select **New Invoice** option.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/262/df491cec-811d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Option #4  

------------

You can convert any estimate into an invoice. All information from the estimate will be automatically generated in the invoice.

[Learn more.](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-251-255--converting-the-estimate/)

_Let's create an invoice._

1\. **Select the customer**. When creating an invoice, select the payer (contact or organization from CRM). If you do not find it in the search results when typing the customer name, you can create a new customer right in this filed.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/262/e58e77a4-811e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If the invoice is created from the contact, organization, opportunity or project with a specified client, the customer will be pre-filled automatically.

2\. **Select organization**. If you have several organizations, Flowlu will offer you to select the appropriate one. With multicurrency feature, you also need to specify what currency to use for this invoice.

3\. **Select the invoice custom template**. If you have several invoice templates, you can select the appropriate one.

4\. **Indicate the responsible person**. This person will receive notifications about all changes in the invoice: received payments, comments etc.

5\. If you want to link this invoice to the project you can choose it in the corresponding field. You can also indicate estimated revenue from the chosen project.

6\. If necessary, change the invoice date and payment terms. The due date is set up automatically, depending on the [Organization settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-259--organization-profile-settings/)
.

7\. Indicate the type of [price](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-261--creating-the-price-list/)
.

8\. Select the additional options that you want to use in the invoice: discounts, taxes, shipping costs or adjustments.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/262/b1e5a5a7-8121-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

9\. Enter the items. Specify:  

*   **quantity (1)**. It can be a fractional number.
*   **price** **(2)**. The price specified in the **Products** will remain the same.
*   **taxes (3)**. Taxes are calculated automatically, but you can change them. The tax rate is set up in the organization's settings.
*   **discounts (4)**. The discount can be entered as percent or amount of money, e.g. $5.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/262/ec2cc95a-8121-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

10\. If you have selected **Shipping charges** or **Adjustment** to be displayed in the invoice, then specify them in appropriate fields.  

In the Adjustment, you can adjust the total amount of the invoice due to rounding, changes in the exchange rate or order size. If the invoice amount needs to be changed in the negative direction, then it is necessary to put a minus sign before it. For example -1200

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/262/0b48565c-8122-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

11\. If necessary, modify or add the text of the invoice payment terms and conditions.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/262/1df94f2d-8122-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Save. Now the invoice is ready to be sent to the client.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/262/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Populate a Record List

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Custom Fields and Lists](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303--custom-fields-and-lists/ "Custom Fields and Lists")
    
4.  [Record Lists](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-308--installing-and-setting-the-record-lists-app/ "Record Lists")
    
5.  How to Populate a Record List

How to Populate a Record List
=============================

* * *

You can add entries in two ways:

*   in the list.![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/310/9670f787-40ba-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   or, on the CRM account page or the project page, if this type of field was added to the list:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/310/faf03adc-40ba-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the opened sidebar, enter the data and click the **Save** button:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/310/23ccd79d-40bb-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To edit an entry, click on the entry line and change the data in the opened sidebar.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/310/60d8bf17-40bb-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To delete one or more records, go to the Record list, select items and click the **Delete** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/310/83a4a73e-40bb-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Filter and export the list
--------------------------

After the list is filled out, you can quickly find information using several filters, search or sorting.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/310/a6dbff33-40bb-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Also, you can export lists to CSV or Excel.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/310/e3431c2f-40bb-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

> **Note:** Only the columns that are displayed in the table can be exported.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/310/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Accept Online Payments for Invoices

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  [Invoices](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258--how-to-prepare-an-invoice/ "Invoices")
    
5.  How to Accept Online Payments for Invoices

How to Accept Online Payments for Invoices
==========================================

* * *

Issued invoices can be paid by your customers through various popular payment gateways. Integration is set up in a few minutes. It does not require any profound technical knowledge. After a setup, managers will be able to send customers a link to the invoice, which will have buttons for online payment, depending on which payment gateway you connect.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/279/3a0231ad-8512-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

After the payment, the responsible for this invoice employee receives a notification and the invoice status is changed to _Paid_.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/279/7be1e315-8512-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Online payment will be displayed on the invoice page under the **Transactions** section:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/279/8dfa1ce7-8512-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Due to this functionality, your employees will save a significant amount of time and will be able to immediately move the order to work.

  
Why, if you get paid via online banking, transactions are not automatically recorded in the Finance module?  
By and large, it was a detail of the difference between the cash flow and P&L. The financial module in Flowlu records cash flow transactions, while online payments come under P&L.

P&L is your profit for a specific period of time, for example, a month. That’s why some transactions were not created after the payment had been made and users had to create transaction records manually.

You can enable the option to use bank accounts for recording the cash flow in the Finance module for PayPal, Stripe, Square, Skrill, and WayForPay. To record the cash flow, you can choose any bank account and currency linked to your organization or create a new bank account and set up a new organization and currency.

How to Record the Cash Flow
---------------------------

The financial module in Flowlu records cash flow transactions, while online payments come under P&L. P&L is your profit for a specific period of time, for example, a month. To keep records of online payments in Flowlu, you can enable the option in **Portal Settings → Payment Methods & Templates**. 

> This option is available for the following payment services: PayPal, Stripe, Square, Skrill, and WayForPay.

Click the **Create** button in **Portal Settings → Payment Methods & Templates**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/279/8aec3398-c486-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

To record transactions received via payment systems in the Financial module, enable the **"Use bank accounts to record the cash flow"** option. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/279/0d71ae62-c488-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can create a new bank account to record the cash flow and set up the organization and currency. To do that, click the "**Create Account**" button. 

After that, you will be receiving all transactions in the **Finance → Money**.

In this section, you will find detailed instructions on how to connect the payment gateways.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/279/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [How to Set Up PayPal](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-279-281--how-to-enable-the-paypal/)
    
*   [How to Set Up Stripe](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-279-283--how-to-enable-stripe/)
    
*   [How to Set Up Square](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-279-284--integration-with-square/)
    
*   [How to Set Up CloudPayments](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-279-282--how-to-enable-cloudpayments/)
    
*   [How to set up WayForPay](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-279-656--how-to-set-up-wayforpay/)
    

[Previous Stage 4. Receiving the Payment](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-258-265-276--receving-the-payment/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to give Admin rights to a User

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Team Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1473--team-management/ "Team Management")
    
4.  [User Access Permissions](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1473-272--user-access-rights/ "User Access Permissions")
    
5.  How to give Admin rights to a User

How to give Admin rights to a User
==================================

* * *

In Flowlu, Administrators have unlimited access to all settings and can install all the applications. They can invite and delete employees (portal users), set their rights.

Users cannot see portal settings, only the information that portal administrators provide access to.

So, that’s how it works:

A person who creates a Flowlu account is an administrator by default. Invited people are users by default, but they can still be given an administrator role. To do that, go to **My Team**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/273/d9f8be6c-6730-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can find the employee you need and check the box in the **Administrator** column. You can assign any number of administrators (depending on your current subscription plan). You can also deny admin rights of any user.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/273/ecd7fb57-6730-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/273/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Gantt Chart

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126--projects/ "Projects")
    
4.  [Project: Overview](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-412--overview-of-project-sections/ "Project: Overview")
    
5.  Gantt Chart

Gantt Chart
===========

* * *

The Gantt chart is a convenient tool for managing tasks within projects. You can find it in the corresponding project tab.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/0bc53bba-bebe-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Benefits of Using a Gantt Chart
-------------------------------

With the Gantt chart, you can:

*   Easily adjust task deadlines visually.
    
*   Link tasks with dependencies.
    

Creating and Editing Tasks
--------------------------

**To create a new task:**

1.  Click the "+" button next to the project stage.
    
2.  A task creation panel will open, allowing you to enter the task name and assign it to a team member.
    

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/e16ba7a8-b922-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

**To edit an existing task:**

*   Double-click the task row to open it for editing.
    

**Task Status on the Chart:**

*   **Completed tasks:** Marked in gray.
    
*   **Active tasks:** Marked in blue.
    

Adjusting Task Deadlines
------------------------

To modify task deadlines:

*   Use the "boundary extension markers" (vertical dots) to adjust the task duration by dragging them.
    
*   To reschedule a task without changing its duration, drag the task itself to the desired date using the drag-and-drop method.
    

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/f2f9da59-b923-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.gif)

Linking Tasks
-------------

A single task can lead to multiple dependent tasks. You can now create multiple dependencies from a single task. These task dependencies will show on the task card.

**To link tasks:**

*   Hover over the endpoint ("circle") of the first task.
*   Click and hold the left mouse button, then drag a dashed line to the starting point of the dependent task.
*   **Note:** Task dependencies do not automatically shift task schedules. Linking tasks will not change the start time of any task.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/1983ca33-dfaa-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.gif)

**Blocking Task Dependencies**

A "blocking dependency" can be established where one task must be completed before another dependent task can be moved to "Done".

*   To create a blocking dependency, single-click on the existing dependency line on the Gantt diagram and select "Blocking Dependency".
*   The dependent task will show a lock icon.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/4215ba41-dfaa-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

*   When a task is blocked by a dependency, it cannot be moved to the "Done" status.
*   A blocking dependency can be removed by clicking on the dependency again, or within the dependency section of the task detail card.
*   Changes to dependencies are reflected in both the Gantt chart and task cards.

**To remove a link:**

*   Click the dependency arrow and select "Remove Dependency".  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/8f1bb7e2-dfb1-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Auto Scheduling
---------------

Auto Scheduling can be enabled or disabled: Project → Gantt → Gear icon → Automation.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/266ae261-ef59-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

With Auto Scheduling disabled, dependencies do not affect task schedules. You can move tasks without affecting the schedules of related tasks.

With Auto Scheduling enabled:

*   When you create a dependency between tasks, the dependent task's timeline adjusts automatically to match the predecessor’s schedule.
*   You can add a delay (lag) or overlap (lead) between linked tasks by clicking on the dependency link and specifying the delay in hours or days; the dependent task will adjust accordingly, and the lag will be displayed as a blue link line on the Gantt chart.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/7bdabd4a-ef59-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)
*   When you move a predecessor task, the linked task’s start date will automatically adjust.
*   Once tasks are linked with auto-scheduling, you cannot manually change the start date of the dependent task.

Gantt Chart Views
-----------------

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/b744293e-bebd-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Above the diagram are icons for changing its appearance:

1.  **Scale Buttons:** Use the zoom in and zoom out buttons to change the chart's scale.
2.  **Hide Grid:** Hiding the table will expand the diagram's space, allowing for more information to be visible.
3.  **Grouping:** The Gantt chart can be structured by stages or by assignee. Choose the grouping method by clicking the grouping button.
4.  **Gantt Settings:** Click the gear icon to open a menu where you can choose which fields to display on the diagram.

Project Baseline in Gantt Chart
-------------------------------

The Project Baseline allows you to capture a snapshot of your original project schedule to track any deviations or delays as work progresses.

**Note:** Project baselines are available starting from the Advanced subscription plan.

To get started, open a project and navigate to the Gantt tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/308c8f38-12f9-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Click the Baseline icon (two stacked bars) in the top toolbar to open the management menu. To set your initial plan, click Create a baseline.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/cce10c4d-12f6-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

The system will automatically save the current start and end dates for all tasks and milestones, naming the entry with the current date and time. You can now enable baseline on the Gantt chart or create another one.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/788bf657-12f7-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

After you enable a baseline, the Gantt chart provides a clear visual comparison between your original plan and current progress. You will see shadow-like horizontal bars appearing directly beneath each task and milestone on the chart. These bars represent the original time boundaries you saved. Additionally, the baseline dates will be displayed in the Gantt task table for precise tracking.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/d9fe2cfb-12f7-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

While the entire project team can view active baselines, only Project Managers or Administrators have the permission to create or delete them. If a baseline is deleted, it is moved to the Recycle Bin and can be restored if necessary.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/4c4a965c-12f8-11f1-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/732/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [How to Export the Gantt Chart](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-412-732-1729--how-to-export-the-gantt-chart/)
    

[Previous Task Dependencies](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-412-757--project-task-dependencies/)

# Flowlu Help Center | User Roles

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Team Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1473--team-management/ "Team Management")
    
4.  [User Access Permissions](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1473-272--user-access-rights/ "User Access Permissions")
    
5.  User Roles

User Roles
==========

* * *

User roles allow you to categorize employees by departments/occupation (sales, marketing, accounting, etc.) and bulk assign user permissions. 

Each role grants its own set of permissions. Easily allocate access rights to modules both for new and existing employees within a few seconds.

> A role is a customizable, pre-defined set of access rights to certain modules.  

### Create a New Role  

To create a new User Role, go to **My Team** → **User roles** and click **Create user role**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/492/954b35ee-7f3b-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/492/9a48506a-7f3b-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also create a new User Role by clicking **Add** **→ User role** in the top right corner of My Team module.

Enter a name and description (optional) for your role. The description should be clear for anyone using this role, so they can see exactly what it allows team members to do in Flowlu.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/492/457b306f-7f3c-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Select access rights for all available modules in Flowlu.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/492/6778eba4-7f3c-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Select users that will be assigned the created User role.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/492/99efc63c-7f3c-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can select team members for a User role either when creating it or later when editing it.  

Click **Save**.

### Editing or Deleting a User Role

If you want to edit User Roles, go to **My Team** → **User roles** to open the list of all existing roles and click it.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/492/9db8adbb-7f3d-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

In this window you can:  

*   change the role activity
*   set the sorting number
*   edit role description
*   edit access rights to the modules
*   assign new users to the Role or remove already added users

To delete a role, go to the list of all roles and check the box next to the appropriate role or select multiple roles, if necessary. Click the trash can icon at the bottom of the list and confirm the action.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/492/e201395d-7f3d-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Assign a Role to Portal Users  

You can assign a User Role to a portal user using several options:

*   inside a user profile![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/492/a4f1b08f-672f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   in **My Team** module on the role page![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/492/1164259e-7f3f-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   when inviting a new user to the account![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/492/eef96b86-7f3e-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/492/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Export Data from Flowlu

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Account Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270--account-settings/ "Account Settings")
    
4.  [Data Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270-1472--data-management/ "Data Management")
    
5.  Export Data from Flowlu

Export Data from Flowlu
=======================

* * *

You can export your data from Flowlu to a CSV file, so that you don't have to copy the data manually.

Display only those columns that you want to export. You can change the columns settings by clicking on the "gear" button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/457/47dcb7a5-803d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

**Please note that you need to be an Administrator in order to have access to the download button**. For example, you won't be able to export tasks if you don't have Admin access rights to the Task module.  
To export data, go to the appropriate section (module) and click Export where applicable. At the moment, you can export the list of projects (not project pages with details), transactions, record lists, companies and contacts, the list of invoices and estimates, products and services, timesheet, tasks (Reports > Tasks > All Tasks) and financial reports (Reports > Finance > Profit & Loss and Cash flow).

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/457/706ab1ca-803d-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

# Calendar

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Mobile App](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487--mobile-app/ "Mobile App")
    
4.  Calendar

Calendar
========

* * *

The Calendar module in the Flowlu mobile app helps you stay organized by providing a clear overview of your schedule, including meetings, appointments, and important deadlines. You can create personal events, manage company-wide schedules, and sync with your external calendars to keep all your commitments in one place.

Accessing the Calendar
----------------------

To view your schedule, navigate to the Calendar module from the main menu.

1.  From the bottom navigation bar, tap on **Modules**.
2.  Scroll through the list and select **Calendar**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1636/e21b3cb1-9dce-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

You can swipe left or right to navigate between months.

Navigating and Filtering Your Calendar
--------------------------------------

The main view displays a traditional calendar layout. Tapping on a specific date will highlight it and show any scheduled events for that day in a list below.

You can control which calendars are visible on your screen:

1.  Tap the **Calendar** in the top header.
2.  The **"My Calendars"** panel will appear, listing all available calendars (e.g., your personal calendar, "Company Calendar").
3.  Use the checkboxes to select or deselect the calendars you wish to view.
4.  Tap **Apply** to update the calendar display.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1636/1eb81d81-9dcf-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

How to Create a New Event
-------------------------

You can add new events to your schedule at any time.

1.  From the main calendar screen, tap the **plus (+)** icon in the top-right corner. (Alternatively, you can select a day and tap the "New Event").
2.  The **"New Event"** form will open.
3.  Fill in the event details.
4.  Tap **Save** to add the event to your calendar.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1636/5efff667-9dcf-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

Viewing and Managing an Event
-----------------------------

Once created, an event will appear in the list below the calendar when its date is selected.

1.  Tap on an event from the list to open its detailed view.
2.  The event detail screen is organized into **Main** and **Files** tabs. From the Main tab, you can:
    *   View the event name, dates, description, and attendees.
    *   Tap **Mark as Completed** to finish the event.
    *   Add reminders, links to other Flowlu items, and write comments.
3.  To perform more actions, tap the **three-dot menu** in the top-right corner. This menu allows you to:
    *   **Copy link**
    *   **Share**
    *   **Copy event** (to create a duplicate)
    *   **Edit**
    *   **Delete**

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1636/8b72855d-9dcf-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

Calendar Synchronization
------------------------

The app supports two-way synchronization with **Google Calendar on Android** and **Apple Calendar on iOS**.

For detailed, step-by-step guides, please see our articles on how to set up the integration for [Google Calendar](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299-320-730--google-calendar-android/)
 and [Apple Calendar](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/299-729--apple-calendar-sync/)
.

[Previous Lists](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487-1635--lists/)

# Managing Projects

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Mobile App](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487--mobile-app/ "Mobile App")
    
4.  [Tasks & Projects](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487-1504--tasks-projects/ "Tasks & Projects")
    
5.  Managing Projects

Managing Projects
=================

* * *

The Projects module allows you to access and manage your projects directly from the mobile app.

Accessing and Viewing Projects
------------------------------

To view your projects, navigate to the **Modules** screen and select **Projects**. From this section, you can access several predefined lists:

*   **All projects**
*   **Projects by workflows**
*   **My projects**
*   **Archive**

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1506/6b642149-5505-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

Tapping on a list opens the project view. Each item in the list displays the project name, associated company, deadline, and current stage, along with a summary of its **Estimated Revenue**, **Expenses**, and **Profit**.

You can switch between **All Projects**, **My Projects**, and **Archive** using the dropdown menu at the top of the screen.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1506/7221897b-5505-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

To find a specific project, you can use the **Search** bar or apply filters and settings:

*   Tap the **Filters** button to filter by Project Manager, Project Workflow, CRM Account, Stage, Start Date, End Date, Group, or Tags.
*   Tap the **three-dot menu icon** and select **Settings** to **Group by** or **Sort** the project list.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1506/789aa37a-5505-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

The Project Overview
--------------------

Tapping on a project opens its detail page on the **General** tab. This screen provides a summary of the project, including:

*   **Financials**: A summary of actual/plan income, expenses, and profit.
*   **Project Manager**: The team member managing the project.
*   **Timeline**: The project's Start and End Dates.
*   **Progress**: The current project stage with a visual progress bar and checklist of items for that stage.
*   **Customer**: The associated customer's contact information.
*   **Comments**: A field at the bottom to write and send comments.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1506/b044afce-5505-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

Navigating Project Tabs
-----------------------

A project's information is organized across several tabs at the top of the screen:

*   **General**: The main overview screen.
*   **Finance**: A detailed financial breakdown, including Actual / Estimation amounts, Profitability, and Balance.
*   **Tasks**: A complete list of all tasks associated with the project, with its own search and filter options.
*   **Team**: A list of team members, such as the Manager, assigned to the project.
*   **Files**: A browser for all documents and files attached to the project.
*   **Notes**: A space for any project-related notes.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1506/ab5b8844-5505-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

Project Actions
---------------

To perform actions related to the project, tap the **three-dot menu** in the top-right corner. This opens a menu with the following options:

*   **Copy link**
*   **Share**
*   **Create**: Opens a sub-menu to add a:
    *   Create task
    *   New Event
    *   Revenue
    *   Actual Payment
    *   Expense
    *   Actual Expense![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1506/b9afa422-5505-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)  
        
*   **Documents**: Opens a sub-menu to:
    *   Create Invoice
    *   Create Estimate  
        ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1506/bf822eac-5505-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)
*   **Edit**
*   **Archive**

# Flowlu Help Center | Recycle Bin

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Account Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270--account-settings/ "Account Settings")
    
4.  [Data Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270-1472--data-management/ "Data Management")
    
5.  Recycle Bin

Recycle Bin
===========

* * *

With the recycle bin, you can restore deleted files and records from your Flowlu account with a single click.

The records in the recycle bin will be available for a certain period of time based on your account's [subscription plan](https://www.flowlu.com/pricing/)
.  

The Recycle Bin section shows the object name and a related module, deletion date, the user who deleted the object and the date when the object will be permanently deleted.

How to Restore Objects 
-----------------------

In Flowlu, you can restore almost anything, e.g. files, comments, notes, tasks, contacts and organizations, invoices, projects, milestones, etc.

1.  To restore system objects, go to **Portal Settings → Recycle Bin**.![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/600/1da63b27-09be-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)
2.  Select the record you want to recover and click **Restore** (Action). You can also select several records and restore them in bulk.![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/600/740e6f53-7496-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Please note that you cannot restore records in which parent objects are deleted. For example, you would not be able to restore a comment if its task is already removed.  

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/600/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Create Issue

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Email](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494--email/ "Email")
    
4.  [Email Automations](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-690--email-automations/ "Email Automations")
    
5.  Create Issue

Create Issue
============

* * *

This automation rule automatically creates issue related to any of your Agile projects.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/697/c4086f87-ca3d-11ee-98ce-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the automation rule settings window, you can set up the following fields:

1\. **Name**

In this field, you can specify the name of the automation. It'll be visible in the list of email automations only.

2\. **Event**

Here you can set for which action with the email message the automation will be working. Currently, there are three types of triggers:

*   Create - the automation will be working once the mail is created.
*   Update - the automation will be working once the mail is updated.
*   Delete - the automation will be working once the mail is deleted.

3\. **Run**.

It's an optional setting. By default, the automation is proceeding right after meeting the _Event_ rule. Defines when the automation is going to work. Currently, there are two options: **Immediately**, or **X minutes/hours/days after current time**.

4\. **Conditions.**

Defines a condition for an automation rule, so it'll run only when meeting the condition. Conditions are similar to the **"If**" statement.

You can set the following conditions for email automations:

*   Email subject: is/is not/in unknown/has any value.
*   Email type: is/is not/in unknown/has any value.
*   Email content: is/is not/in unknown/has any value.
*   Folder: is/is not/in unknown/has any value.
*   From: is/is not/in unknown/has any value.
*   To: is/is not/in unknown/has any value.

If the option _"After previous automation rule"_ is enabled, the automation will run only when the previous automation is completed.

5\. **Issue Settings**

In this area, you can set the name of the issue, its type, its title, and its description. By clicking the three-dot button, you can add variables to the text area.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/697/0d688a8b-ca3e-11ee-98ce-fa163e2ff576.png)

6. **Type**

Choose the type of issue. The issue will be displayed with the icon related to the type.

7\. **Assignee**  

A user is responsible for the issue.

8\. **Priority**

Pick between low, medium, high, critical, and blocker priority types.

9\. **Estimation**

Estimation of the task in story points.

10\. **Category**

The folder to which the issue will be related. Categories are custom, and you can create your own ones for the whole Agile module.

11\. **Followers**

User who will be able to observe the issue and its progress.

12\. **Custom Fields**

You can create custom files for each Agile project and predefine their value for all automatically created issues.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/697/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Create Event](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-690-696--email-create-event/)

# Create Slack Message

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Email](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494--email/ "Email")
    
4.  [Email Automations](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-690--email-automations/ "Email Automations")
    
5.  Create Slack Message

Create Slack Message
====================

* * *

If the integration with Slack is enabled, you can automatically send messages from Flowlu to Slack related to a certain email.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/698/b3188101-ca43-11ee-98ce-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the automation rule settings window, you can set up the following fields:

1\. **Name**

In this field, you can specify the name of the automation. It'll be visible in the list of email automations only.

2\. **Event**

Here you can set for which action with the email message the automation will be working. Currently, there are three types of triggers:

*   Create - the automation will be working once the mail is created.
*   Update - the automation will be working once the mail is updated.
*   Delete - the automation will be working once the mail is deleted.

3\. **Run**.

It's an optional setting. By default, the automation is proceeding right after meeting the _Event_ rule. Defines when the automation is going to work. Currently, there are two options: **Immediately**, or **X minutes/hours/days after current time**.

4\. **Conditions.**

Defines a condition for an automation rule, so it'll run only when meeting the condition. Conditions are similar to the **"If**" statement.

You can set the following conditions for email automations:

*   Email subject: is/is not/in unknown/has any value.
*   Email type: is/is not/in unknown/has any value.
*   Email content: is/is not/in unknown/has any value.
*   Folder: is/is not/in unknown/has any value.
*   From: is/is not/in unknown/has any value.
*   To: is/is not/in unknown/has any value.

If the option _"After previous automation rule"_ is enabled, the automation will run only when the previous automation is completed.

5\. **Slack Channel Settings**

Pick the group and the Slack channel to which messages will be sending.

# Time Off Management Widget

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Team Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1473--team-management/ "Team Management")
    
4.  [Time Off Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1473-1627--time-off-management/ "Time Off Management")
    
5.  Time Off Management Widget

Time Off Management Widget
==========================

* * *

Time Off Management widget displays information from the My Team module directly on your dashboard.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1482/f0b82592-e255-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

With this widget, you can:

*   View current and upcoming team absences without navigating to the My Team module.
*   Create new absence records for yourself or your teammates.

How to Add the Widget
---------------------

You can add the widget to any of your dashboards.

To add the Time Off Management widget:

*   Go to the Home tab and select the desired dashboard.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1482/14682c81-e256-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

*   On the dashboard, click the Add widget button.
*   In the widget library, go to the Main tab and select Time Off Management.  
    

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1482/244cdff5-e256-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

Creating an Absence
-------------------

To create a new absence, click the “+” button on the widget. A side panel will open where you need to fill in:

*   User: Select the employee for the absence.
    
*   Status: Choose the absence reason (e.g., Vacation, Sick).
    
*   Start and End dates: Set the absence period.
    
*   Comment: Add any notes if needed.
    

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1482/2fe4960e-e256-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

After saving, the new absence will immediately appear in the widget.

Viewing and Tracking Absences
-----------------------------

You can configure the widget to display absences for specific employees, a department, or the entire company.

Click the three-dot menu icon in the top-right corner of the widget and select Settings.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1482/39993d4e-e256-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

In the settings panel on the right, you can:

*   Name: Give the widget a custom title (e.g., "Team Absences").
*   Show employees: Choose the specific users whose absences you want to track.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1482/41c4f7e2-e256-11f0-991d-3a787cc0d110.jpg)

The widget will then update to show all current and upcoming absences for the selected employees, including dates and status.

# Flowlu Help Center | Custom Domain Name for your Flowlu account

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Account Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270--account-settings/ "Account Settings")
    
4.  [Main Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270-1470--main-settings/ "Main Settings")
    
5.  Custom Domain Name for your Flowlu account

Custom Domain Name for your Flowlu account
==========================================

* * *

> _This feature is available as part of the [Ultimate subscription plan](https://www.flowlu.com/pricing/)
> , or as an add-on to your existing Flowlu subscription on a different plan. [Contact our Sales team](https://www.flowlu.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#aad9dfdadac5d8deeaccc6c5ddc6df84c9c5c7)
>  if you want to add this feature to your account._

Set up custom domain to point the default domain for your Flowlu account (example.flowlu.com) to a custom domain. Only [account administrators](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-270-273--how-to-designate-user-as-an-administrator/)
 can configure the custom domain.  

For example, if your company website is available at company.com, you can connect a subdomain such as subdomain.company.com. Or you can set up a separate personal domain for your portal, such as mycompany.com.

Custom domain functionality requires you have an Enterprise subscription plan. It's not available if you are using a trial version of Flowlu.

Step #1. Create a CNAME record
------------------------------

> A CNAME record (Canonical Name record) is a type of resource record in the Domain Name System (DNS) that maps one domain name (an alias) to another (the canonical name).

Go to you DNS provider. 

Create a CNAME record that directs your domain to the default domain for your Flowlu account. 

For instance, if you want to use the domain like example.example.com (third-level or a subdomain) for your Flowlu account, create a CNAME record that points example.example.com to company.flowlu.com.

Generally, when adding a CNAME record you need to enter your custom domain to the _Host_ field and your current Flowlu domain should be entered to the Value/Target.  

You can learn more about how to create the CNAME by exploring your DNS provider's documentation.

Once you create a CNAME record, open whatsmydns.net/#CNAME and enter your custom domain into the field. Press **Search**. This will help you to ensure that you've created a CNAME record correctly.

Step #2. Connect the custom domain to your Flowlu account
---------------------------------------------------------

Go to your Flowlu account. Navigate to **Portal Settings → Main Settings → Branding**. 

Type your custom domain name. 

Scroll down a page and press **Save**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/567/33e1b459-6738-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Well done! Your custom domain for Flowlu account is now live.

> _**Please note:** _when you try open your account page with a custom domain for the first time,_ the page load time may be up to one minute due to _SSL certificate creation.__ 

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/567/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Setup a Custom Email Address](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270-1470-570--setup-custom-email/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Remove Unused Apps

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Account Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270--account-settings/ "Account Settings")
    
4.  [Main Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270-1470--main-settings/ "Main Settings")
    
5.  How to Remove Unused Apps

How to Remove Unused Apps
=========================

* * *

If you're not using a particular app (module) in your Flowlu account, that app can be hidden or deleted. 

There are 3 types of apps available in Flowlu:

*   Core Apps
*   Add-ons
*   Integrations

In this article we'll cover all 3 types and provide options of disabling the apps you're not planning to use.

Disabling Core Modules  

-------------------------

Core Modules are available on all Flowlu accounts and cannot be deleted. However, [Account administrator](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-270-273--how-to-designate-user-as-an-administrator/)
 (super admin) can disable user access to them, so that these apps will not be visible on the side bar. 

The list of core modules includes:

*   Projects
*   Tasks
*   CRM
*   Files
*   My Team
*   Messenger
*   Finance
*   Calendar 

Access to these modules can be restricted in several ways:

### Method #1. Apps Settings

Click your profile picture and select **Apps** in the dropdown menu. Select the app you want to hide. For example, CRM.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/418/562b3402-ad89-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Go to **User Access Settings** tab and set access rights for your team members. The changes will be saved automatically.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/418/5ea001a7-b87c-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Method #2. Inside a User's Profile

Click your profile picture in the top right corner and click the Edit button

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/418/40032647-b881-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

Go to **Access Rights** section and make the necessary changes, then scroll down and click **Save**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/418/afb492f4-b881-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

The same can be done for other users on your portal, all you need to do is open their profile and select **Edit Profile** page:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/418/0115a54f-c12a-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)

If a user does not have access to the module, it can also affect available features for them in other apps. For example, if a user does not have access to Finance, the same tab will also be hidden inside a Project. If a user is denied access to CRM, the account column will not be displayed in Projects, Tasks, and other apps.

How to Delete Apps 
-------------------

If you're not planning to use an app, you can just uninstall it by selecting it in the Apps list and clicking **Uninstall**:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/418/fe17795d-6733-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Uninstalled apps will not be accessible and will disappear from the left menu.  
  

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/418/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Link your Google account with Flowlu

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Getting Started](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201--getting-started/ "Getting Started")
    
4.  [Signing Up](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-238--signup/ "Signing Up")
    
5.  Link your Google account with Flowlu

Link your Google account with Flowlu
====================================

* * *

Flowlu allows linking your account to your Google account which greatly simplifies the authorization process. Therefore, you will not have to keep in mind lots of passwords out of different websites.

> **Note:** You can link any Google account to your Flowlu account even if it does not match an email you entered upon signing up. To connect Flowlu with your Google account, go to your profile page.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/268/8a9de905-6724-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Go to the **Linked Services** tab and link it to any account in Google.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/268/0e39fbae-6725-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

A page for linking Google account opens in a new tab.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/268/bf9918d4-6724-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

After that, click on the **Google** button. A window for system entry to Google account opens. Choose a Google account, which you want to link your Flowlu account to.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/268/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Tags

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Working in Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474--working-in-flowlu/ "Working in Flowlu")
    
4.  Tags

Tags
====

* * *

In Flowlu, you can tag tasks, projects, contacts, organizations, products and services, Agile issues, knowledge base articles. With tags, you can filter your data and easily find the right information. 

How to create a tag
-------------------

You can create a tag when adding a new tag anywhere in your account where tags are available. 

For example, you can create a tag in the project record, task, contact, etc. 

When you click **Add Tag**, a dropdown of all tags will appear. 

Enter the tag name and press **Enter** to save. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/548/83dfe4b4-6736-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to tag an object
--------------------

While creating or viewing an object, click the **Add tag** button. Find the appropriate tag using search. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/548/6694e195-6737-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to manage tags
------------------

If you need to delete or edit the existing tags, go to **Portal Settings** → **Tags**_._ Choose a tag and select the appropriate option. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/548/92083b66-6737-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Only account administrators can edit or delete tags. However, all users can create new tags and use them in their account.

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/548/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Bulk Delete Items

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Account Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270--account-settings/ "Account Settings")
    
4.  [Data Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270-1472--data-management/ "Data Management")
    
5.  How to Bulk Delete Items

How to Bulk Delete Items
========================

* * *

To quickly remove unnecessary objects or start from scratch, use the bulk-delete option.

How to Delete Opportunities in Bulk
-----------------------------------

To delete opportunities in bulk:

1.  Go to **CRM → Opportunities**.
2.  Switch to the list view.
3.  Select the opportunities you need. You can also select all at once.
4.  Delete them by clicking the _trash_ icon. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/566/736db506-7236-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Delete Organizations and Contacts in Bulk
------------------------------------------------

To delete organizations and Contacts in bulk:

1.  Go to **CRM → Organizations** (or **Contacts**).
2.  Select the items you need or all at once.
3.  Delete them by clicking the _trash_ icon.

This process is the same for both Contacts and Organizations. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/566/053e1412-7238-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Delete Tasks in Bulk
---------------------------

To delete tasks in bulk:

1.  Go to **Tasks → List View**.
2.  Select the tasks you need or all at once.
3.  Delete them by clicking the _trash_ icon.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/566/992aeb24-723a-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Delete Projects in Bulk
------------------------------

To delete projects in bulk:

1.  Go to **Projects**.
2.  Select the projects you need or all at once.
3.  Delete them by clicking the _trash_ icon.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/566/1c714951-7490-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Please note that the trash icon will be displayed only if you have the following option activated in **Portal Settings **→** Projects**:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/566/ba5c6167-7490-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Delete Invoices in Bulk  

---------------------------------

If payments have been made on these invoices, then first you need to delete received payments in the **Money** section.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/566/0b3d5085-7492-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Set up the filters if needed. For example, if not all payments need to be deleted, but only for a particular organization, sales rep, etc. You can learn more about filters [here](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-461--filters/)
. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/566/2fde0a0d-7492-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

After that, you can delete invoices in bulk. 

How to Delete Products in Bulk
------------------------------

To delete products in bulk:

1.  Go to **Products**.
2.  Select the products you need or all at once.
3.  Click the _trash_ icon and delete the products. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/566/81ab8458-7492-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

How to Delete Emails in Bulk
----------------------------

To delete emails in bulk:

1.  Go to **Email**.
2.  Choose a specific email account.
3.  Select the messages you need or all at once.
4.  Click the _trash_ icon and delete the emails. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/566/a4ab1d08-7491-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/566/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# How to Apply a Coupon or Promo Code to Your Subscription

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Flowlu Membership & Subscription](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/756--subscription/ "Flowlu Membership & Subscription")
    
4.  [How to Activate a Coupon or Promo Code](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/756-473--apply-code/ "How to Activate a Coupon or Promo Code")
    
5.  How to Apply a Coupon or Promo Code to Your Subscription

How to Apply a Coupon or Promo Code to Your Subscription
========================================================

* * *

If you have a coupon or promo code, you can easily apply it during the checkout process to receive a discount on your subscription. This guide will show you how to navigate to the payment screen and activate your code.

Step 1: Navigate to the Checkout Page
-------------------------------------

1.  Click on your profile picture in the top right corner and select **My Subscription** from the dropdown menu.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1580/6e2e8a9b-9480-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)
2.  On the **Subscription Plans** page, choose your desired plan (e.g., Advanced), select the billing cycle (1 Month or 1 Year), and adjust the number of **User seats**. Once you are ready, click the **Buy now** button at the bottom of the screen.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1580/754a4cc1-9480-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)
3.  A checkout window will appear. Under **Your details**, enter your **Email address**, **Country**, and **Region**, then click **Continue**.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1580/7e0a0dd2-9480-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

You will now see the Order Summary, which is where you can apply your discount.

Step 2: Activate Your Promo Code
--------------------------------

1.  In the **Order Summary** section, click the **Add discount** link.
2.  An input field will appear. Type your valid code into the field.
3.  Click the **Apply** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1580/91ea4aa2-9480-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

Step 3: Complete Your Purchase
------------------------------

After that, you can pay for your subscription using one of the payment methods provided. [Please read this article to find out more on how to buy a subscription.](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/756-467--get-subscription/)

> **N****ote**: you can apply each code **only once**. If you switch to another type of subscription, the promocode is no longer valid for a new subscription, and the total price will be calculated using [our current pricing](https://www.flowlu.com/pricing/)
>  + tax.

> **_If you have any issues or concerns, please contact our customer support via in-app chat or email us at_ [\[email protected\]](https://www.flowlu.com/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#8af9fffafae5f8fecaece6e5fde6ffa4e9e5e7)
> .**

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1580/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous How to Activate a Coupon or Promo Code](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/756-473--apply-code/)

[Next How to Cancel your Subscription](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/756-545--cancel-subscription/)

# How to Change Language in Flowlu

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Account Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270--account-settings/ "Account Settings")
    
4.  [Main Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270-1470--main-settings/ "Main Settings")
    
5.  How to Change Language in Flowlu

How to Change Language in Flowlu
================================

* * *

Flowlu offers support for multiple languages to provide a more comfortable and intuitive experience for users worldwide. You can set the interface language in two ways: for the entire portal or individually for your user account.

Currently supported languages are:

*   English (EN)
*   Spanish (ES)
*   Brazilian Portuguese (PT-BR)

Change Language for the Entire Portal (Portal Settings)
-------------------------------------------------------

1.  Click on your profile picture in the top-right corner of the screen.
2.  From the dropdown menu, select Portal Settings.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1479/624a88dd-46a9-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)
3.  Navigate to the Main Settings and select the Language section.
4.  Select the desired language from the dropdown list.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1479/8edebc5a-46a9-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)
5.  Click the Save button at the bottom of the page.

Change Language for Your User Account (Profile Settings)
--------------------------------------------------------

Each individual user can set their own preferred language. This setting will apply only to your personal Flowlu interface and will override the portal's default language setting. Any user can change their own profile language.

1.  Click on your profile picture in the top-right corner of the screen.
2.  Click the pencil (edit) icon in the dropdown menu.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1479/d21f586f-46a9-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)
3.  You will be taken to your user profile edit screen. Locate the Language field.
4.  Select your preferred language from the dropdown list.
5.  Click the Save button.  
    ![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1479/df870e20-46a9-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

[Previous Custom Domain Name for your Flowlu account](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270-1470-567--setup-custom-domain/)

[Next Data Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270-1472--data-management/)

# Customizing the Bottom Bar

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Mobile App](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487--mobile-app/ "Mobile App")
    
4.  [Getting Started & Navigation](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487-1498--getting-started-navigation/ "Getting Started & Navigation")
    
5.  Customizing the Bottom Bar

Customizing the Bottom Bar
==========================

* * *

The Flowlu mobile app allows you to customize the Bottom Navigation Bar to provide one-tap access to the modules and actions you use most frequently. This article explains how to configure it to match your personal workflow.

Accessing the Menu Setup Screen
-------------------------------

1.  Tap the **Modules** icon (a grid of nine dots) in the bottom navigation bar.
2.  On the Modules screen, tap the **Menu setup** icon (a square with a grid inside) in the top-right corner.

This will open the **Menu setup** screen, where you can manage the items displayed on the Bottom Bar.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/1503/4a3cd37c-55a0-11f0-bfde-3a787cc0d110.png)

How to Customize
----------------

The "Menu setup" screen is divided into two main areas:

*   The **top section** shows a preview of the items currently on your Bottom Bar.
*   The **lower section** contains all available items you can add, organized into categories such as **Modules** and **Actions**.

To customize the bar, use drag and drop:

*   **To add an item:** In the lower section, select the appropriate category (Modules or Actions). Then, drag an icon from that category to an empty slot or desired position in the top section.
*   **To replace an item:** Drag a new icon from the bottom section and drop it on top of an existing icon in the top section.
*   **To reorder items:** Drag the icons within the top section to arrange them in your preferred order.

Once you have finished arranging the items, tap the **Save** button to apply your changes. To revert to the default settings, tap **Clear**.

[Previous Using Quick Actions](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487-1498-1502--using-quick-actions/)

[Next Settings & Customization](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1487-1496--settings-customization/)

# Imprest Fund

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Finance](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250--finance/ "Finance")
    
4.  Imprest Fund

Imprest Fund
============

* * *

**Imprest fund** is a certain amount of cash that is kept on hands for small expenses and regularly replenished.

In Flowlu, you can track imprest funds via the specific module. This module allows you to create separate accounts for employees, give them funds, and track their expenses.

### How to Install the Imprest Fund Module

To install this module, go to the App section and click the **Imprest Fund** icon. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/658/c3ff57ed-ddcf-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Click the **Install** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/658/4211c2e8-ddd1-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

After the module is installed, you can find it in the **Finance** tab.

**![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/658/91f74804-ddd3-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)**

### **Features:** 

*   Creating a personal imprest account for employees.
*   Refund management.
*   Expense creation.
*   Receipt management. 

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/658/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

  

*   [How to Create a Personal Imprest Account](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-658-659--how-to-create-a-personal-imprest-account/)
    
*   [How to Manage Personal Imprest Accounts](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-658-660--how-to-manage-personal-accounts/)
    
*   [Imprest Fund Access Rights](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-658-662--imprest-fund-access-rights/)
    

[Previous Custom Budget Statuses](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/250-629-632--custom-budget-statuses/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Team Chat

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Working in Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474--working-in-flowlu/ "Working in Flowlu")
    
4.  [Team Communication](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474-1477--team-communication/ "Team Communication")
    
5.  Team Chat

Team Chat
=========

* * *

Flowlu lets your team to communicate in real time with the built-in online team chat. Share news, discuss projects, elaborate on assignments, send files and keep everyone on track. 

You can find the chat in the top right corner of your Flowlu account.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/563/3f638535-0696-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Private Chat  

---------------

If you need to reach out your teammate, select this person in the list of contacts and click on his/her name to start a conversation. Please note that this list does not include people who [don't have access](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-270-272--how-to-set-access-rights-to-employees/)
 to the Chat app. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/563/8dab6038-0696-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Group Chat  

-------------

You can also create a group chat for several team members.

Click on the appropriate button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/563/d93f6b88-0696-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Indicate a name for your group chat, select a photo, chat admins (star sign). Select teammates and click 'Create' to save your group chat.   

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/563/c69e6078-0697-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Once you create a new chat, you can search through its history, edit it, leave or mute the chat.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/563/02b82d66-0698-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

The chat allows you to send text messages, include emojis, pictures and files. 

When someone sends a message, you can view the information about a new message next the to the chat icon. 

You can easily reply to messages, forward them, or make edits by clicking on the three-dot menu located next to your message.

# Flowlu Help Center | How to Create a Record List

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Custom Fields and Lists](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303--custom-fields-and-lists/ "Custom Fields and Lists")
    
4.  [Record Lists](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-308--installing-and-setting-the-record-lists-app/ "Record Lists")
    
5.  How to Create a Record List

How to Create a Record List
===========================

* * *

Go to the Record Lists and click **New List**.

Enter the list name and select the icon that will be displayed next to the name.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/309/50574a8c-40b5-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you need to exchange comments for the list entries—check the box next to _Comments on the item page_.

After creating the list, it will appear in the menu. Go to its settings:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/309/8dd4a667-40b5-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Set up your own fields: name them and select the type. Find out more about [types of custom fields](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-304-305--types-of-custom-fields/)
.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/309/e27e4925-40b5-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

> **Note:** If you select the CRM Account, CRM Company, CRM Contact (**Object Picker**) or **Project** field type, lists will also be displayed on their pages. Employees, when opening the CRM Account page or a project, will be able to obtain information and add a new item to the list.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/309/ceb28ce6-40b6-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

List Field Settings
-------------------

After you add all the required fields, set the settings for each of them. To do this, click on the field name.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/309/bb6b39d4-40b7-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Here you can activate the following settings:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/309/602fee49-40b8-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   **Active.** Shows if the field is active or not.
*   **Show in list**. Activate this field if you want it to be displayed in the list table.

*   **Show filters**. Fields can be displayed in the filter. Due to it, you will be able to create any selections and instantly find the necessary data.

*   **The field is required**. The record will not be saved until this field is filled out.

*   **Field Tooltip**. If entered, there will be an explanation next to the field.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/309/9cd63de5-40bc-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Under the **Users** tab, give access to employees. The user can edit this list, add new entries or only view it:

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/309/5287cdf6-40b9-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In the **Settings** tab, you can change the list name, the icon and set up comments display on the item page.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/309/b6d46166-40b9-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/309/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Record Lists](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-308--installing-and-setting-the-record-lists-app/)

[Next How to Populate a Record List](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-308-310--how-to-add-an-entry-to-the-list/)
