# Flowlu Help Center | Comments

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Working in Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474--working-in-flowlu/ "Working in Flowlu")
    
4.  [Team Communication](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474-1477--team-communication/ "Team Communication")
    
5.  Comments

Comments
========

* * *

Comments are an essential part of any effective communication within the company. In comments, employees can leave their notes on tasks, projects, etc., discuss work-related matters, attach files, as well as ask their colleagues for assistance.

In Flowlu, you can comment almost on any item in the system. Just click on the "**Write a message**" field and enter the text. Attach the file to the comment if needed. 

You can also set the formatting for your comments. The editor toolbar is hidden by default. 

To open the editor toolbar, press the "**Aa**" symbol in the bottom right corner. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/476/7ec53bcf-673e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Flowlu will remember your preferences. Next time you click on the "Write a message" field, the toolbar will be already maximized.  

With the editor toolbar, you can make your text bold or italic, apply strike-through formatting, add a numbered or bulleted list, paste code or quotation.  

We also recommend using keyboard shortcuts to save more time and improve your efficiency.

#### **Keyboard Shortcuts**

|     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Action** | **Windows** | **Mac** |
| Remove format | ctrl+shift+m | ⌘+shift+m |
| Undo | ctrl+z | ⌘+z |
| Redo | ctrl+y shift+ctrl+z | ⌘+y shift+⌘+z |
| Bold | ctrl+b | ⌘+b |
| Italic | ctrl+i | ⌘+i |
| Sup | ctrl+h | ⌘+h |
| Sub | ctrl+l | ⌘+l |
| Link | ctrl+k | ⌘+k |
| Numbered list | ctrl+shift+7 | ⌘+shift+7 |
| Bulleted list | ctrl+shift+8 | ⌘+shift+8 |

You can also paste an image from the clipboard or a link to an image or GIF animation into your comment.

When you’re ready, just click the "**Send**" button or press Ctrl+Enter.

You can always edit or delete a comment by clicking on the _three dots button_ in the upper right corner of your comment (1):

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/476/bb72b126-673e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

You can also copy the link to a comment or its reply. Send the link to your teammates in the chat and they will instantly see the necessary comment. There will be no need for them to scroll the comment feed searching the required information. 

To copy the link to the comment, click the _paper clip button_ in the upper right corner of your comment (2).

In addition, you can "like" any comment or its reply to support your colleague. The "like" icon and the information about the number of users who have "liked" the comment will appear below.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/476/d1d6b4d9-673e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Only the last three comments are displayed in Flowlu. To download the full list of comments, press the “**Load All Comments**” button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/476/ef99ded9-673e-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Threads  

You can reply to any comment by clicking on the **Reply** button.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/476/13b8b7d2-673f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Write a text message, tag a user, if needed, and press Ctrl+Enter or click the "**Send**" button.

The number of responses, as well as the time and date of the last response, are displayed under each comment.

In Flowlu, the user will be notified on each comment in various modules as long as he/she is an assignee for the task, event participant, opportunity owner, CRM module administrator, Agile project manager or reporter of the issue, assignee of the invoice or estimate, member of the project team, or have received an announcement in the company feed.

If you want the user to be notified from any system module or item, regardless of whether they are involved in the project, task and so on, please check out another article to find out more on **[mentions](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-476-483--mentions/)
**.  

### Comment Display Settings  

You can easily set up a comment order or thread display in every module (projects, tasks, CRM, etc). Click on the three dots in the bottom right corner of the comment box and set up the following:

*   comment order: newest comments at the top or oldest comments at the top.
*   threads: always collapsed or expanded by default.
*   whether the comment box is fixed on scroll or not.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/476/394ca6c6-673f-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

### Comment Filters

In Opportunities, CRM Accounts and Project, you can sort comments by filters.

In Projects, you can sort comments by emails, events and calls.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/476/4ff98ff8-778c-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

In CRM Opportunities and Accounts, you can sort comments by tasks, emails, events, changes journal, calls, jivosite and invoices. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/476/ad9ea3c6-778c-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/476/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Request a Response

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Working in Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474--working-in-flowlu/ "Working in Flowlu")
    
4.  [Team Communication](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474-1477--team-communication/ "Team Communication")
    
5.  [Comments](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/1474-1477-476--comments/ "Comments")
    
6.  Request a Response

Request a Response
==================

* * *

If you need to solve a problem, require an expert assistance or an urgent response from an employee, use the "Request a Response" option. With this option, no comments will be ignored from now on because the response is required!

1.  Open the task, project, or any other page where you want to request a response from the employee.
2.  Go to the "Request a Response" tab.
3.  Select a username from the drop-down list.
4.  Enter the text.
5.  Press the "**Send**" button or the Ctrl+Enter.
6.  After sending a comment, your colleague will immediately receive a notification.
7.  This comment will also be highlighted in yellow for those who have to send their response and those who require it.

When a response to a comment is received, that comment will be highlighted in turquoise  
for those who have requested it. Also, the person who requested a response will get a notification. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/484/0db0661f-6f07-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.gif)

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/484/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

Notes
=====

* * *

Add all project notes are located in one place. This may be, for example, recommendations that can be taken into account in the project implementation.

Enter the text of the note in the window to add it and click the **Create** button:

![](https://support1.aspro.cloudassets/images/739/7b358301-c8a2-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

When adding or editing a note, you can format it. Highlight the text of the note and you will see a panel for formatting:

Using the editor will help you to make the notes clearer.

# Flowlu Help Center | Use Case: Flowlu for Client Management

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Getting Started](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201--getting-started/ "Getting Started")
    
4.  [Use Cases](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-616--use-cases/ "Use Cases")
    
5.  Use Case: Flowlu for Client Management

Use Case: Flowlu for Client Management
======================================

* * *

Flowlu is an all-in-one tool for project and team management, as well as an easy-to-use CRM. This means that you can handle an entire scycle from the client's first contact to the paid invoice within one platform. In this guide, we will learn how to configure Flowlu for successful client management.

In Flowlu, CRM includes [**contacts** and **organizations**](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-332--companies-and-contacts/)
. Each contact can be associated with a particular organization. It can be this contact's occupation or any other relation.

Once a prospect reaches you out, you need to create a contact/organization (or both) and link it to a new **[opportunity](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323-326--how-to-create-an-opportunity/)
**. You will then manage the sales process in this opportunity record and move this opportunity through the sales pipeline towards a win and a finalized purchase. 

Step 1: Customize Categories and Industries
-------------------------------------------

Each business is unique, so it's crucial that your CRM solution caters to your company's specific needs. In Flowlu, you can set up your own categories (Customer, Partner, Vendor) and industries they represent (Construction, Media, Government). 

Both organizations and contacts can be assigned a category or an industry. 

To set up your own categories and industries, go to **Portal Settings** > **CRM** > **Reference**.

Here you can also set up loss reasons and sources of your [opportunities](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323--opportunities/)
. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/619/e594199e-c706-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Step 2: Add Custom Fields
-------------------------

Create unique fields for your contacts, organizations and opportunities with the [custom fields](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/303-304--how-to-add-a-custom-field/)
. You can choose between various field types such as text, date, price, number, formula, checkbox and much more. For example, you can create a checkbox field for a preferred method of communication for your client or a lead score. After that, you can easily filter your data by the custom fields.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/619/22fa7102-c707-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Use list settings to display only required columns and fields for your client base. 

Step 3: Import Client Base (Optional)  

----------------------------------------

If you're using spreadsheets or another tool for client management, check out our guide for importing [contacts](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-332-429--contacts-import/)
 and [organizations](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-426-430--companies-import/)
 into Flowlu. You can import your clients from a CSV file and then map out all the fields such as phone number, email, description, category, your own custom fields, etc.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/619/72be17d0-c707-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

If you're starting from scratch, then skip this step.

Step 4: Check Additional Settings
---------------------------------

Each module can be additionally customized in Flowlu. Go to the **Portal Settings** > **CRM** > **Main Settings**. 

Most of the settings here are dedicated the user access to the records. Please check that all the permissions are correct before going to the next step.

Plus, here you can enable the cover picture for your opportunities on the board and hide the "All Accounts" section.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/619/db2c5edf-c707-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Step 5: Invite Your Team  

---------------------------

To ensure effective collaboration, invite your teammates to the company account and assign them an [Employee access level](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-249--access-rights-in-the-projects/)
 to the CRM module. In this case, they will see only CRM accounts and opportunities assigned to them (check the previous step). 

Moreover, they won't be able to export your client base via CSV. However, they will be able to leave comments and upload files, change the opportunities' stages and edit the information in their records. They will also be able to create new CRM records. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/619/0992856e-c708-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

> Permissions can be assigned after you add a user or in advance — using [roles](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-270-272-492--user-roles/)
> .

Step 6: Create a Pipeline  

----------------------------

Now let's create a pipeline for new prospects. You can create a new pipeline both on the board and from the **Portal** **Settings** > **CRM** > **Pipelines**. We recommend creating several boards for different professional services or products your company sells. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/619/6e6e5ed5-c708-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Step 7: Add New Prospects  

----------------------------

First, let's answer the following question: **How do you get your leads?** 

**a) With a form on the website**

Place Flowlu's [intake forms](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323-329-330--creating-leads-from-the-web-form/)
 on your website and capture leads automatically. Once the form is submitted, Flowlu creates a new opportunity on a specified pipeline.  

**b) With an email request**

[Connect your email inbox](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-512--how-to-set-up-email-sync/)
 and [generate new opportunities](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/494-515-517--turning-emails-into-contacts-opportunities-tasks/)
 out of new emails and requests. You can pre-define source and pipeline for such opportunities. 

**c) With a phone call**  

With the [telephony integration](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-607--telephony-integration/)
, once you get an inbound call, Flowlu adds a new opportunity to the pipeline of your choice. 

You can also [create new opportunities manually](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-323-326--how-to-create-an-opportunity/)
 at a few clicks. 

Step 8: Set up Automation  

----------------------------

We promise you, the automation rules will be your new best friends. You need just to configure them once. After that they will automatically schedule meetings, send follow-up emails, move the opportunities down the pipeline and assign tasks. Check out our [step-by-step guide on Flowlu automation](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/322-532--automation/)
 to streamline your processes and eliminate the busywork.  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/619/b1fda263-c708-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Step 9: Save Recurring Processes as a Template
----------------------------------------------

If your last stage of the sales cycle ends with initiating a project, create [project workflows](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/126-199--how-to-create-project-workflow/)
 for similar processes. This will significantly save your time and improve productivity. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/619/e34e7812-c708-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

Step 10: Provide External Access to Your Clients
------------------------------------------------

Flowlu's [client portal](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/586--client-portal/)
 gives you an ability to invite clients as guests for collaboration on tasks and projects. You can easily decide what module and fields should be accessible to your clients. 

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/619/1ff10605-c709-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

  

[![start your free trial](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/619/f09c62e4-8628-11ef-919e-fa163e2ff576.png)](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

[Previous Use Case: Flowlu for Project Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/201-616-618--use-case-flowlu-for-project-management/)

# Flowlu Help Center | Import your Data to Flowlu

[Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

* * *

1.  [Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/ "Flowlu")
    
2.  [Flowlu Help Center](https://www.flowlu.com/help/ "Flowlu Help Center")
    
3.  [Account Settings](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270--account-settings/ "Account Settings")
    
4.  [Data Management](https://www.flowlu.com/help/articles/270-1472--data-management/ "Data Management")
    
5.  Import your Data to Flowlu

Import your Data to Flowlu
==========================

* * *

You can import your data into Flowlu from a CSV file. Flowlu allows you to choose the field matching.   

> **Note: Your list of the imported data should be in CSV format. If you have an Excel file, please save it as CSV first.**  

#### Settings  

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/426/b3fe24b3-6f07-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)

*   File format—only CSV;
*   Preferred encoding is UTF-8 (the system recognizes your encoding automatically if it's different);
*   A separator of fields (columns): it's better to enter there a comma, but can also be: semicolon, space, vertical slash, colon;
*   It is preferable that the first row contains the name of your columns;
*   If you want the field to include the names of the responsible users or the owners of the records, you need to fill in the field (column) and specify the user's name (you can choose it during setup).

> Please note the import option is available only for users with Admin access rights to the corresponding module. It means that if you want to import list of tasks then you need to have admin access rights to the Tasks module.

Field Matching
--------------

On the Field Matching step, select the corresponding field name in Flowlu. Please note that if Flowlu does not have fields you need to import, you can create your own custom fields in **Portal Settings** > **Custom Fields** and select the entity you want to create files for. Please remember that you need to create these fields before you start the import.

You're able to import the following field types:

*   text;
*   boolean;
*   user;
*   number;
*   decimal (money, price);
*   date & date with time.

> **If you're unable to import (or can't find the import option), check if the Import module is installed and your user has access to the module.**

Import Module
-------------

To install this module, go to the **Marketplace**.  

Next, check that the app is installed, and if the title doesn't have the checkmark, then you just have to install the app by clicking on **View more** -> **Install**.

![](https://www.flowlu.com/help/assets/images/426/9f65f8ab-6f11-11ed-a147-fa163e2ff576.png)
